    <td style="width: 31.67%; vertical-align: bottom; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt; text-align: center;"><ix:nonNumeric name="dei:TradingSymbol" id="Fact_e8e443ac896f481e9a2b92670f71708d" contextRef="c20260422to20260422">CDE</ix:nonNumeric><br/>
            </td>

    <td colspan="1" style="width: 1%; vertical-align: bottom; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#160;</td>

    <td style="width: 33%; vertical-align: bottom; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">
              <div style="text-align: center;"><ix:nonNumeric name="dei:SecurityExchangeName" id="Fact_81bb54f7f62a4b0fafb7380ffaa9c75d" contextRef="c20260422to20260422" format="ixt-sec:exchnameen">New York Stock Exchange</ix:nonNumeric><br/>
              </div>
            </td>

  </tr>


</table>
      <div style="text-align: left; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"> <br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: left; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">Indicate by check mark whether the registrant is an emerging growth company as defined in <a id="z_9kR3WTr27747Dda1m6GI7v14qcXo5LADE0BiNDQ"></a>Rule 405 of the <a id="z_9kMIH5YVt39A7ENkNevB034q1YD3"></a><a id="z_9kMIH5YVt3DE7HMgNevB034q1YD3"></a>Securities Act of 1933 (&#167;230.405 of this chapter) or <a id="z_9kR3WTy85647Eea1m3Fq45w25rdYp6MBEF1CnnI"></a>Rule 12b-2 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934
        (&#167;240.12b-2 of this chapter).</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: right; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">Emerging Growth Company&#160; <ix:nonNumeric name="dei:EntityEmergingGrowthCompany" id="Fact_77dbc74413194b008fcd64bc4e580d28" contextRef="c20260422to20260422" format="ixt-sec:boolballotbox">&#9744;</ix:nonNumeric></div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div style="text-align: left; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">If an emerging growth company, indicate by check mark if the registrant has elected not to use the extended transition period for complying with any new or revised
          financial accounting standards provided pursuant to <a id="z_9kR3WTr27747FgLcszv1FJtsy47tRfAvu180VOE"></a>Section 13(a) of the <a id="z_9kMLK5YVt39A7FJRSxihovnIB1"></a><a id="z_9kMKJ5YVt3DE7HLRSxihovnIB1"></a>Exchange Act. <a id="z_9kR3WTr5B8457"></a>&#9744;</div>

        <div style="text-align: left; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"> <br/>
        </div>

        <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">
          <hr style="border: none; border-bottom: 4px solid black; border-top: 1px solid black; height: 10px; color: #ffffff; background-color: #ffffff; text-align: center; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"/></div>

      </div>

      <div style="clear: both; margin-top: 10pt; margin-bottom: 10pt;" class="BRPFPageBreakArea">
        <div style="page-break-after: always;" class="BRPFPageBreak">
          <hr style="margin: 4px 0px; width: 100%; border-width: 0; height: 2px; color: #000000; background-color: #000000; clear: both;"/></div>

      </div>

      <!--PROfilePageNumberReset%Num%1%%%-->
      <table cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt; width: 100%; text-align: left; color: #000000; border-spacing: 0;" class="DSPFListTable">


  <tr>

    <td style="width: 63pt; vertical-align: top; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt; font-weight: bold;">Item 1.01.</td>

    <td style="width: auto; vertical-align: top; text-align: justify; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">
              <div style="font-weight: bold;">Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement.</div>
            </td>

  </tr>


</table>
      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; color: #000000; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><a id="z_9kR3WTrAG8467PQtnCEERM355v495BC5SK7QJIJ"></a>On April 22, 2026, Coeur Mining, Inc. (the &#8220;Company&#8221;) completed its previously
        announced private exchange offer (the &#8220;Exchange Offer&#8221;) and consent solicitation (the &#8220;Consent Solicitation&#8221;) relating to the $400,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 6.875% Senior Notes due 2032 (the &#8220;Existing Notes&#8221;) issued by New Gold Inc.&#160; In
        connection with the settlement of the Exchange Offer, the Company issued $385,774,000 aggregate principal amount of its 6.875% Senior Notes due 2032 (the &#8220;Notes&#8221;) in a private exchange to Eligible Holders in reliance on Section 4(a)(2) of the
        Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the &#8220;Securities Act&#8221;), and, outside the United States, in offshore transactions in compliance with Regulation S under the Securities Act.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; color: #000000; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">The Notes are governed by an Indenture, dated as of April 22, 2026 (the &#8220;Indenture&#8221;), among the Company, as issuer, certain of the
        Company&#8217;s subsidiaries named therein, as guarantors thereto (the &#8220;Guarantors&#8221;), and The Bank of New York Mellon, as trustee (the &#8220;Trustee&#8221;).&#160; The Indenture, which includes the form of the Notes, is attached hereto as Exhibit 4.1 and is incorporated
        herein by reference.&#160; The description of the Indenture and the Notes in this report are summaries only and are qualified in their entirety by the terms of the Indenture and the Notes, respectively.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; color: #000000; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">The Company did not receive any cash proceeds from the issuance of the Notes.&#160; The Notes were issued in exchange for Existing Notes
        tendered and accepted in the Exchange Offer, and the Company paid cash consideration in connection therewith, together with fees and expenses related to the Exchange Offer and Consent Solicitation.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; color: #000000; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">The Notes are the Company&#8217;s unsecured senior obligations and rank equally in right of payment with all of its existing and future
        unsecured senior debt and rank senior in right of payment to all of its existing and future subordinated debt.&#160; The Notes are effectively subordinated to any of the Company&#8217;s existing and future secured debt to the extent of the value of the assets
        securing such debt.&#160; Initially, the Company&#8217;s obligations under the Notes are jointly and severally guaranteed by certain of the Company&#8217;s wholly-owned subsidiaries.&#160; In addition, each of the Company&#8217;s restricted subsidiaries that guarantees other
        indebtedness that exceeds $20,000,000 aggregate principal amount, will be required to guarantee the Notes in the future.&#160; The guarantees rank equally in right of payment to all of the Guarantors&#8217; existing and future unsecured senior debt and rank
        senior in right of payment to all of the Guarantors&#8217; existing and future subordinated debt.&#160; The guarantees are effectively subordinated to any of the Guarantors&#8217; existing and future secured debt to the extent of the value of the assets securing
        such debt.&#160; The Notes are also structurally subordinated to the liabilities of subsidiaries of the Company that have not guaranteed the Notes.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; color: #000000; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">The Notes bear interest at a rate of 6.875% per year from the date of issuance.&#160; Interest on the Notes is payable semi-annually in
        arrears on April 1 and October 1 of each year.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: justify; text-indent: 18pt; color: #000000; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">At any time prior to April 1, 2028, the Company may redeem all or part of the Notes upon not less than 30 nor more than 60 days&#8217;
        prior notice at a redemption price equal to the sum of (i) 100% of the principal amount thereof, plus (ii) a make-whole premium as of the date of redemption, plus (iii) accrued and unpaid interest, if any, thereon, to the date of redemption.&#160; In
        addition, the Company may redeem some or all of the Notes on or after April 1, 2028, at redemption prices set forth in the Indenture, together with accrued and unpaid interest.&#160; At any time prior to April 1, 2028, the Company may use the proceeds
        of certain equity offerings to redeem up to 35% of the aggregate principal amount of the Notes at a redemption price specified in the Indenture.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: justify; text-indent: 18pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">Upon the occurrence of a Change of Control (as defined in the Indenture), unless the Company has exercised its right to redeem the Notes, each
        holder of Notes will have the right to require the Company to repurchase all or a portion of such holder&#8217;s Notes at a price equal to 101% of the principal amount thereof, plus accrued and unpaid interest, if any, to the date of repurchase.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: justify; text-indent: 18pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">If the Company or its restricted subsidiaries sell assets under certain circumstances specified in the Indenture and do not use the proceeds for
        certain specified purposes, the Company must offer to use certain net proceeds therefrom to repurchase the Notes and other debt that ranks equal in right of payment to the Notes on a pro rata basis.&#160; The purchase price of the Notes will be equal to
        100% of the principal amount of the Notes repurchased, plus accrued and unpaid interest, if any, to the applicable date of repurchase.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: justify; text-indent: 18pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">The Indenture contains covenants that, among other things, limit the Company&#8217;s ability under certain circumstances to incur additional indebtedness,
        pay dividends or make other distributions or repurchase or redeem capital stock, prepay, redeem or repurchase certain debt, make loans and investments, create liens, sell, transfer or otherwise dispose of assets, enter into transactions with
        affiliates, enter into agreements restricting the Company&#8217;s subsidiaries&#8217; ability to pay dividends and impose conditions on the Company&#8217;s ability to engage in mergers, consolidations and sales of all or substantially all of its assets.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: justify; text-indent: 18pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">The Indenture also contains certain &#8220;Events of Default&#8221; (as defined in the Indenture) customary for indentures of this type.&#160; If an Event of Default
        has occurred and is continuing, the Trustee or the holders of not less than 25% in aggregate principal amount of the Notes then outstanding may declare all unpaid principal of, premium, if any, and accrued interest on all the Notes to be due and
        payable.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div class="BRPFPageBreakArea" style="clear: both; margin-top: 10pt; margin-bottom: 10pt;">
        <div class="BRPFPageNumberArea" style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 8pt; color: #000000; font-weight: normal; font-style: normal;">1</span></div>

        <div class="BRPFPageBreak" style="page-break-after: always;">
          <hr style="border-width: 0px; clear: both; margin: 4px 0px; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: #000000; background-color: #000000;"/></div>

      </div>

    <td style="width: 63pt; vertical-align: top; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt; font-weight: bold;">Item 2.03.</td>

      <div style="text-align: justify; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt; font-style: italic; font-weight: bold;"><a id="z_9kMHG5YVt39A8IJaXtvAkRstjy3"></a><a id="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9BAZXtvAkRstjy3"></a>Press Release</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: justify; text-indent: 18pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><a id="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4567GKPIryC"></a><a id="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4AB8HJOIryC"></a>On April 21, <a id="z_9kMHG5YVt3678BFGCDK"></a>2026, Coeur issued a
        press release (the &#8220;<a id="z_9kR3WTr1786GHYVrt8iPqrhw1"></a><a id="z_9kR3WTr178798XVrt8iPqrhw1"></a><a id="z_9kR3WTr2447DKfVrt8iPqrhw1"></a>Press Release&#8221;) announcing the expiration and final results of the Exchange Offer and Consent
        Solicitation.</div>

      <div style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><br/>
      </div>

      <div style="text-align: justify; text-indent: 18pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">A copy of the Press Release is attached as <a id="z_9kR3WTyAA948HTQ0mhi1TXQ"></a>Exhibit 99.1.&#160; The information set forth in this Item 7.01,
        including Exhibit 99.1, is being furnished and shall not be deemed to be &#8220;filed&#8221; for purposes of Section 18 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended (the &#8220;Exchange Act&#8221;), or otherwise subject to the liabilities of that section.&#160; The
        information in this Item 7.01, including Exhibit 99.1, shall not be deemed incorporated by reference into any filing under the Securities Act, or the Exchange Act, except as shall be expressly set forth by specific reference in such filing.</div>

        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">INDENTURE dated as of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3677BEMG4ytEJKJKR"></a>April&#160;22, 2026 among <a name="z_9kR3WTr1234BGNFov9cOwxyxTVw"></a>Coeur Mining, Inc., a <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4DFL6liuvrw"></a>Delaware corporation,
          the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAINXRsqro8A9E"></a>Guarantors (as defined) and <a name="z_9kR3WTr1234BIgPhC3mxzvVP50nDAgV19DG"></a>The Bank of New York Mellon, as <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt467CLLgb9BByk"></a>trustee.</div>

        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDEBOHy0poDK4q"></a>The <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AAKOSHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAKPTHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AAKQUHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39ABC8LHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39ABC9MHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39ABCANHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39ABCBOHy0poD"></a>Company, the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAINXRsqro8A9E"></a>Guarantors and the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAKHcb9BByk"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAKJeb9BByk"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAKKfb9BByk"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAKLgb9BByk"></a>Trustee agree as follows for the benefit of each other and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBBE8xjhuBwopsw1z23my2tu7816"></a>for the equal
          and ratable benefit of the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAJJTMxnhw"></a>Holders (as defined) of the<font style="font-weight: bold;">&#160;</font><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3566EGGOQO"></a>6.875% Senior Notes <a name="z_9kR3WTr7HCBEDPMu"></a>due <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3676EFBCEH"></a>2032 (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1788ILaQ3uu"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr19BAGLdQ3uu"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Notes</font>&#8221;):</div>
        <div>&#160;</div>
        <div style="text-align: center;">ARTICLE&#160;1.<br>
          <a name="z_Toc227318510"></a>DEFINITIONS AND INCORPORATION<br>
          BY REFERENCE</div>
        <div>&#160;</div>
        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">Section&#160;1.01&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-style: italic;">Definitions</font>.</div>
        <div>&#160;</div>
        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1897FE9DHOiKzqdocaD4"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1899AACDHOiKzqdocaD4"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">144A Global Note</font>&#8221; means a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAIKUIxobmaYB22"></a>Global Note
          substantially in the form of Exhibit A hereto bearing <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDHD4xjJL0repdbE5YTvw44s37"></a>the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9ILUIxobmaYB2VQst11"></a>Global Note Legend and the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAGFaXx2vuzWYqinyz1HqWyz77"></a>Private





          Placement Legend and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9FExqdmqvxns5H434rw7JE07449"></a>deposited with or on behalf of, and registered in the name of, the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAHFN8r2613wvK"></a>Depositary or its nominee that will be issued in a
          denomination equal to the outstanding <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCLG2xjQV8zz"></a>principal amount of the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAKMbS5ww"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAKNcS5ww"></a>Notes sold in reliance on <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAECbc3o5JNU"></a>Rule&#160;144A.</div>
        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">&#160;</div>
        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr18978EP1o70yviIEjz"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Acquired Debt</font>&#8221; means, with respect to any specified <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AAJGYKt862"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAJHZKt862"></a>Person:</div>
        <div>&#160;</div>
        <div>
          <div>
            <div style="margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: 36pt;">(1) <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAIOaMogfvzkuw2H"></a>&#160;&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160;&#160; Indebtedness of any other <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAJGYKt862"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAJHZKt862"></a>Person existing at the time such
              other <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AAJGYKt862"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAJHZKt862"></a>Person is merged with or into or became a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAHHedts0mnlvK"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAGM99uiz8vjosttpbX6LJF"></a>Subsidiary of such
              specified <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AAJGYKt862"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAJHZKt862"></a>Person, whether or not such <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAIOaMogfvzkuw2H"></a>Indebtedness is incurred in connection with, or in contemplation of, such other <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AAJGYKt862"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAJHZKt862"></a>Person merging with or into, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9GO62qegr2xzym"></a>or becoming a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAJIcMuAA0my1mbn32Awxv5U"></a>Restricted Subsidiary of,
              such specified <a name="z_9kMML5YVt39AAJGYKt862"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAJHZKt862"></a>Person; and</div>
            <div style="text-indent: 72pt;"> <br>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div>
            <div style="margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: 36pt;">(2) <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAIOaMogfvzkuw2H"></a>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160; Indebtedness secured by a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAHMcKkq"></a>Lien encumbering any asset acquired by such specified <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AAJGYKt862"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAJHZKt862"></a>Person.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: 36pt;">&#160;</div>
        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;"> &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr18989FQ2ciz0w2pocaD44"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Additional Notes</font>&#8221; means additional Notes (other than the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9DCSMt01jnbZC33"></a>Initial <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8GGWS5ww12DG3n"></a>Notes) issued under this <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAJKVMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAJLWMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAJNYMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAJMXMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAJOZMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAJPaMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAKISMogr7FEz"></a>Indenture <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAEIhNeu1x3IJKvuyear7EAGXYeM"></a>in accordance with Section&#160;2.02 and Section&#160;4.09 hereof,
          as part of the same series as the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9DCSMt01jnbZC33"></a>Initial Notes.</div>
        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">&#160;</div>
        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898CIQ4gkrsiuz"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Affiliate</font>&#8221; of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEACDbKt8621tisBzvK"></a>any specified <a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAJGYKt862"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAJHZKt862"></a>Person means any other <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAJGYKt862"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAJHZKt862"></a>Person directly or indirectly controlling or controlled by or under direct or indirect common control with
          such specified <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person.&#160; For purposes of this definition, &#8220;control,&#8221; as used <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDILsk9mNwB95"></a>with respect to any <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person, means the possession, directly or indirectly, of the power to direct or cause the direction of the management or policies of such <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person, whether through the ownership of voting securities, by agreement or otherwise; <font style="font-style: italic;">provided</font> that beneficial ownership of <a name="z_9kR3WTr134569B9"></a>10% or more of the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9ACia50vuaiBvs"></a>Voting Stock of a <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person will be deemed to be control.&#160; For purposes of
          this definition, the terms &#8220;controlling,&#8221; &#8220;controlled by&#8221; and &#8220;under common control with&#8221; have correlative meanings.</div>
        <div>&#160;</div>
        <div style="margin-left: 36pt;">&#160;&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1897GMP5go4"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Agent</font>&#8221; means any <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5FE6CJgMin0CCuv"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AAGMjMin0CCuv"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAHEaMin0CCuv"></a>Registrar,


          co-<a name="z_9kMHG5YVt467CLHaMin0CCuv"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEADF4sin0CCuvlP5E43"></a>registrar, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AAHGaGw5vuIDowC"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAHIcGw5vuIDowC"></a>Paying Agent or additional paying agent.</div>
        <div>&#160;</div>
        <div style="margin-left: 36pt;">&#160;&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1897AENE0xrjccosXf1x2BG"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Applicable Premium</font>&#8221; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFHCmk9kV8zv5stI"></a>means, with respect to any <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AAKMbS5ww"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AAKNcS5ww"></a>Note on any redemption date, the greater of:</div>
        <div style="margin-left: 72pt;">&#160;</div>
        <div>
          <div>
            <div style="margin-left: 72pt;">(1) <a name="z_9kR3WTr1345DGB9"></a>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160; 1.0% of the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEFH6qwzlSXA1"></a>principal amount of the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AAKMbS5ww"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AAKNcS5ww"></a>Note; or</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div>
            <div style="text-indent: 72pt;"><font style="margin-left: 72pt;"> <br>
              </font></div>
            <div style="margin-left: 72pt;">(2)&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160; the excess of:</div>
            <div style="margin-left: 99pt;"> <br>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div>
                <div>
                  <div style="margin-left: 72pt; text-indent: 36pt;">(a) &#160; &#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; the present value at such redemption date of (i)&#160;the redemption price of the <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AAKMbS5ww"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AAKNcS5ww"></a>Note at <a name="z_9kR3WTr1454BJOE2wrBGGHQ"></a>April&#160;1, 2028 (such redemption price being set forth in the table appearing in Section&#160;3.07(d) hereof) <font style="font-style: italic;">plus</font> (ii)&#160;all required interest payments due on the
                    <a name="z_9kMML5YVt39AAKMbS5ww"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt39AAKNcS5ww"></a>Note through <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3676DLQG4ytDIIJS"></a>April&#160;1, 2028 (excluding accrued but unpaid interest to the redemption date), computed using a discount
                    rate equal to the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9ADhbtdsDDItQz4"></a>Treasury Rate as of such redemption date <font style="font-style: italic;">plus</font> 50 basis points; <a name="z_9kR3WTr5B849HaV11zw0qo41vA"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">over</font></div>
                </div>

        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Hlk224258241"></a>&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1897FDHE0xrjccosXfBxoq7M79"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Applicable Procedures</font>&#8221; means, with respect to any transfer or exchange of or for <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBJIncpqjomnmqz2E6568OPFB45U"></a>beneficial interests in any <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAIKUIxobmaYB22"></a>Global Note, the rules and procedures of the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAHFN8r2613wvK"></a>Depositary, <a name="z_9kR3WTr1234CGON72ompft"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9HKSP94qorhv"></a>Euroclear and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9HIOEndrADDzjs"></a>Clearstream that apply to such transfer or exchange.</div>

        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">&#160;&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898CDLH6tvkMmr"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Asset Sale</font>&#8221; means:</div>
        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">&#160;</div>
        <div>
          <div>
            <div style="margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: 36pt;">(1) &#160; &#160; &#160; &#160;&#160; the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEHF6pjopqgv0lw8G8C9z2u"></a>sale, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC69Bukapur5"></a>lease, conveyance or other disposition of any assets or rights by <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEFB0qwzlHM35utIOsZ7NNDzBEz"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AAKOSHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAKPTHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AAKQUHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39ABC8LHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39ABC9MHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39ABCANHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39ABCBOHy0poD"></a>Company or any of the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AAKOSHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAKPTHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AAKQUHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39ABC8LHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39ABC9MHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39ABCANHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39ABCBOHy0poD"></a>Company&#8217;s <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAJIcMuAA0my1mbn32Awxv5U"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries; <font style="font-style: italic;">provided</font> that the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEHF6pjopqgv0lw8G8C9z2u"></a>sale, lease, conveyance or other disposition of all <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAEG20pnz7z3IDG0zI1wGCuyAOE2EI"></a>or substantially all of the assets <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBGFOHy0poD1rvr8J"></a>of <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC699pw7heut1nomw5t4"></a>the <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AAKOSHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAKPTHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AAKQUHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39ABC8LHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39ABC9MHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39ABCANHy0poD"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39ABCBOHy0poD"></a>Company
              and its <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAJIcMuAA0my1mbn32Awxv5U"></a>Restricted <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8DIgbrqykljt2q1H0sx1"></a>Subsidiaries taken as a whole will be governed by the provisions of Section&#160;4.15 hereof and/or the provisions of
              Section&#160;5.01 hereof and not by the provisions of Section&#160;4.10 hereof; and</div>

          of debtors.</div>

        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">&#160;&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1897AGQ4nohmklkodjFy3"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Beneficial Owner</font>&#8221; has the meaning assigned to such term in Rule&#160;13d-3 and Rule&#160;13d-5 under the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9JIOSxihovnIB1"></a>Exchange Act, except that in calculating the beneficial ownership of any particular &#8220;<a name="z_9kMHG5YVt467CKNfKt862"></a>person&#8221; (as that term is used in Section&#160;13(d)(3) of the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9JIOSxihovnIB1"></a>Exchange Act), such &#8220;<a name="z_9kMIH5YVt467CKNfKt862"></a>person&#8221; will be deemed to have beneficial ownership of all securities that such &#8220;<a name="z_9kMJI5YVt467CKNfKt862"></a>person&#8221; has the right to
          acquire by conversion or exercise of other securities, whether such right is currently exercisable or is exercisable only after the passage of time.&#160; The terms &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1786DJP4nohmklko0EslHE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1ACAEIQ4nohmklko0EslHE"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Beneficially Owns</font>&#8221; and &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1786DIO4nohmklko0EslH0r"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1ACAEHP4nohmklko0EslH0r"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Beneficially





            Owned</font>&#8221; have a corresponding meaning.</div>
        <div>&#160;</div>

        </div>
        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898CHQEkosqtJH2zl1EDI"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Board of </font><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt5FE6CLUCxugw98D"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Directors</font>&#8221; means:</div>
        <div style="text-indent: 36pt;"> <br>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div>
            <div style="margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: 36pt;">(1)&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160; &#160;&#160; with respect to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDELLqZo4647ux628E9v"></a>a corporation, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr4CA47Blkkosqtjn2zl1EDI"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JEFMFlmmqusvlp41n3GFK"></a>board





              of directors of the corporation or any committee thereof duly authorized to act on behalf of such board;</div>

            </div>
          </div>

          <div>

              of the general partner of the partnership;</div>

            </div>
          </div>

            <div style="text-indent: 72pt;"> <br>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div>

              committee of such <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person serving a similar function.</div>

        <div style="margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: 36pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1454EMPK8xtqwBXA2"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1898BAKK8xtqwBXA2"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Business Day</font>&#8221; means any day other than a <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt5ED6DEUGifl"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9BIdGiflTR2xqj5"></a>Legal Holiday.</div>
        <div style="margin-left: 36pt;">&#160;</div>
        <div style="margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: 36pt;">&#160;&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1896DKR1jkbkioeQvA639lewz"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Canadian Pension Plan</font>&#8221; means a pension plan or plan that is subject to applicable pension benefits
          legislation in any jurisdiction of <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4DGL1jkbc"></a>Canada and that is organized and administered to provide pensions, pension benefits or retirement benefits for employees and former employees of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCGH32pmBriyx5rsq0P"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAHHedts0mnlvK"></a>Subsidiary thereof, other than a pension plan established by statute and administered by a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB8GISL7yv51tvBzsTXNB7IDGX"></a>Governmental Authority, including the Canada Pension Plan maintained by the Government of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED6FIN3lmde"></a>Canada and the <a name="z_9kR3WTr1236ABZZucdf"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB6ACaZucdf"></a>Quebec Pension Plan maintained by the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB69HfV161uphuwZj4mnp"></a>Province of Quebec.</div>
        <div style="margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: 36pt;">&#160;</div>
        <div style="margin-left: 36pt; text-indent: 36pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1897FFL1luzslXLhw1YQu2yr5EAG"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Capital Lease Obligation</font>&#8221; means, at the time any determination is to be made, the amount of the
          liability in respect of a capital or finance lease that would at that time be required to be capitalized on a balance sheet prepared in accordance with <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB6DEdB"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAFCdD0jeu"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP as <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEJF5xjLUBE1LCz4"></a>in effect on the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABADGXR8ByI9w1"></a>Issue Date, and the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9CHicrsxiRJxIH69Q"></a>Stated Maturity thereof shall be the date of the last payment of rent or any
          other amount due under such lease prior to the <a name="z_9kR3WTr6B745Csiv69"></a>first date upon which such lease may be prepaid by the lessee without payment of a penalty; <font style="font-style: italic;">provided</font> that any lease that
          is treated as an operating lease pursuant to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED8FGfD"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAFCdD0jeu"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP as in effect prior to giving effect to FASB Accounting <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4DEZapkocrvx"></a>Standards Update ASU
          2016-02 (whether or not such lease were in effect at the time of effectiveness of such FASB Accounting <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED6FGbcrmqetxz"></a>Standards Update ASU 2016-02) shall not be treated as a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9HHN3nw1unZNjy3aSw40t7GCI"></a>Capital Lease Obligation and shall continue to be treated as an operating lease (and any future lease, if it were in effect on the date hereof, that would be treated as an operating lease for
          purposes of GAAP as in effect prior to giving effect to FASB Accounting <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt5ED6FGbcrmqetxz"></a>Standards Update ASU 2016-02) notwithstanding the implementation of FASB Accounting <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt5ED6FGbcrmqetxz"></a>Standards





          Update ASU 2016-02 or any actual or proposed change in <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt5ED8FGfD"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAFCdD0jeu"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP after the date hereof.</div>

              profits and losses of, or distributions of assets of, the issuing <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person, but excluding from all of the foregoing any debt securities convertible into <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAGEM3nw1ungjCwt"></a>Capital Stock, whether or not such debt securities include any right of participation with <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAGEM3nw1ungjCwt"></a>Capital Stock.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898FHP6fktu1252VaD4"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Definitive </font><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDELKpZeuA2pqohz4pZfI9"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Note</font>&#8221; means a certificated <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note




              registered in the name of the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAJJTMxnhw"></a>Holder thereof and issued in accordance with Section&#160;2.06 hereof, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7CJwitux8u43lzFK9r4NPAykmPG"></a>substantially in the form of Exhibit A hereto
              except that such <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note shall not bear the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9ILUIxobmaYB2VQst11"></a>Global Note Legend and shall not have the &#8220;Schedule <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBLL1occpqjomnmqz2E6568OP"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC778xoC6pqjomnmqZWE6568OPFBkdI"></a>of Exchanges of Interests in the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAIKUIxobmaYB22"></a>Global Note&#8221; attached thereto.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898EBKAw58tlupqqmbmFzw"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Disqualified
                Stock</font>&#8221; means any <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAGEM3nw1ungjCwt"></a>Capital Stock that, by its terms (or by the terms of any security into which it is convertible, or for which it is exchangeable, in each case, at the option of the holder
              of the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAGEM3nw1ungjCwt"></a>Capital Stock), or upon the happening of any event, matures or is mandatorily redeemable, pursuant to a sinking fund obligation or otherwise, or redeemable at the option of the holder of the
              <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAGEM3nw1ungjCwt"></a>Capital Stock, in whole or in part, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCGF6vhD4knx7ox628YG38"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9FE2vhstoluzkp0C4346MK2CP68OF"></a>on or prior to the date that is <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455FJKInawF"></a>91&#160;<a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9EG5vhQbAtkjv0MD05"></a>days after the date on which the <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes mature.&#160; Notwithstanding the preceding
              sentence, any <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAGEM3nw1ungjCwt"></a>Capital <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAFIgc5pm42kxKGFDxp1DIPGHUVG"></a>Stock that would constitute <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAGDMCy7AvnwrssodoH1y"></a>Disqualified Stock solely because the
              holders of the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBHFN4ox2vohkDxu"></a>Capital Stock have the right to require the <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company to repurchase such <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBHFN4ox2vohkDxu"></a>Capital
              Stock <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9960vhdo05D81qy739A38O9xYTy5C"></a>upon <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC99A4vhfxyr79w"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9DD3vhqnxArt9By47tPNsz6y"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9DH7vhq44qhj0F0252I96G898FH3Z"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9FH5vhstvC66EAy47tPNsz6y"></a>the occurrence of a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JEFMMtgfmtluwlv7DIE9"></a>change of control or an asset sale will not constitute <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAGDMCy7AvnwrssodoH1y"></a>Disqualified Stock
              if the terms of such <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBHFN4ox2vohkDxu"></a>Capital Stock provide that the <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company may not repurchase or redeem any such <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBHFN4ox2vohkDxu"></a>Capital Stock pursuant to such provisions unless such repurchase or redemption complies with Section&#160;4.07 hereof.&#160; The amount of <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAGDMCy7AvnwrssodoH1y"></a>Disqualified Stock
              deemed to be outstanding at any time for purposes of this <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AAJKVMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AAJLWMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AAJMXMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AAJNYMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AAJOZMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AAJPaMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAKISMogr7FEz"></a>Indenture will be the maximum amount that <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBGIRHy0poD1rvr8J"></a>the <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries may become obligated to pay upon the maturity of, or pursuant to any mandatory redemption provisions of, such

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1896EFNQvk3whiKQ90sv1oq65Dz0y8X"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Excluded




                Foreign Subsidiary</font>&#8221; means (a)&#160;any <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9AAdYrfkopplNTC3vy4rt98G231"></a>Specified Foreign Subsidiary, (b)&#160;any <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC678qqmixugwAsv0xD50GCDUQ8"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC679rqmixugwAsv0xDF2"></a>direct




              <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEGH52xuqm1yk0HJ32Awxv5U"></a>or indirect subsidiary of the <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company which owns no material assets other than equity interests in or equity interests in and debt of <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt8D967B0yp"></a>one or more <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9AAdYrfkopplNTC3vy4rt98G231"></a>Specified Foreign Subsidiaries, or (c)&#160;any other direct or indirect subsidiary <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE78FRHy0poDK4qq7201yIAw79FI4"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEDDERHy0poDK4qq7201yIAw79FI4"></a>of the <a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company, the guarantee of the <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes by which
              could reasonably be expected to constitute an investment in &#8220;<a name="z_9kMIH5YVt5ED6DFeYt0xiXixy33"></a>United States property&#8221; by a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB8HLQij"></a>CFC, or otherwise result in a material adverse tax consequence to the <a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company, as reasonably determined by the <a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr18979ESQ1x90vuQSuml15q028N"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Existing
                Indebtedness</font>&#8221; means all <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDF9ry9jgwv3pqoy7v6"></a>of the <a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAHHedts0mnlvK"></a>Subsidiaries (other than <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness described in clauses (3), (4), (6), (7), (8), (9), (10), (11), (12) or (13) of Section&#160;4.09(b) hereof) in existence
              on the date of this <a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAJKVMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAJLWMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAJMXMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAJNYMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAJOZMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAJPaMogr7FEz"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAKISMogr7FEz"></a>Indenture, until such amounts are repaid.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898CCP4ewbFr2q0sUrC6"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Fair Market
                Value</font>&#8221; means the value that would be paid by a willing buyer to an unaffiliated willing seller in a transaction not involving distress or necessity of either party.&#160; <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAEER6gydHt4s2uWtE8"></a>Fair Market Value
              shall be conclusively determined in good faith by (i)&#160;<a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEIKBxjFK13srGMaRx15"></a>the <a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAEGcKimkhx"></a>Officer of the <a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAEER6gydHt4s2uWtE8"></a>Fair Market Value is less than <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3566EJIFByuuyw06"></a>$50.0&#160;million, an <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt5FE6CIcKimkhx"></a><a             <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898B9NC1yfEDit0oLQG741rwiZ8HD"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Fixed
                Charge Coverage Ratio</font>&#8221; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8BK4ncm5F644"></a>means with respect to any specified <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person for any period, the ratio of the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9CJUHz460vohy3oPsxGCu"></a>Consolidated EBITDA <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8AGeIr6405Dym"></a>of such <a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person for such period to the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9GISE30hGFkv2q3"></a>Fixed Charges of such <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person for such period.&#160; In the event that <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8AEcIr6401uhqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDHJAxjv7uinrssoaW5KIEFK"></a>the specified <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person or any of its <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries
              incurs, assumes, guarantees, repays, repurchases, redeems, defeases or otherwise discharges any <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness (other than ordinary working capital borrowings) or issues, repurchases or redeems
              preferred stock subsequent to the commencement of the period for which the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABADBPE30hGFkv2qNSI963tykbAJF"></a>Fixed Charge Coverage Ratio is being calculated and on or prior to the date on which the event for which <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAJJ4xjfcmpz9qz84AB4ADz"></a>the calculation of the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABADBPE30hGFkv2qNSI963tykbAJF"></a>Fixed Charge Coverage Ratio is made (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787HOS1hku4lu3z5VD05"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Calculation Date</font>&#8221;), then <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9971vhefinwx451781TRGDu"></a>the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABADBPE30hGFkv2qNSI963tykbAJF"></a>Fixed Charge Coverage Ratio will be
              calculated giving pro forma effect (determined in accordance with <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABACCdMiz5mv406l"></a>Regulation&#160;S&#8209;X under the Securities Act, but including any <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB8IQhX3SN65pGPCItV5E76C"></a>Pro Forma Cost
              Savings) to such incurrence, assumption, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAFDQRsqro80m"></a>Guarantee, repayment, repurchase, redemption, defeasance or other discharge of <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness, or such issuance,
              repurchase or redemption of preferred stock, and the use of the proceeds therefrom, as if the same had occurred <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7AE0ot9uimuAEBF0yI65"></a>at the beginning of the applicable <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt8D967Csq6A7BwuE21"></a>four-quarter




              reference period.</div>

                made by <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDHJAxjv7uinrssoaW5KIEFK"></a>the specified <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person or any of its <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted
                Subsidiaries, including through mergers or consolidations, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFJDlk9mNwB956ByvK"></a>or any <a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person or any of its <a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries acquired by <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDHJAxjv7uinrssoaW5KIEFK"></a>the specified <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person
                or any of its <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries, and including all related financing transactions and including increases in ownership of <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted




                Subsidiaries, during the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt8D967Csq6A7BwuE21"></a>four-quarter reference period or subsequent to such reference period and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEIH8xjF6mpz9qz84AaI5A"></a>on or prior to the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9JQU3jmw6nw517XF27"></a>Calculation Date, or that are <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBKI34neqnfkw6C7t"></a>to be made on <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBIFN2puy3tx"></a>the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9JQU3jmw6nw517XF27"></a>Calculation
                Date, will be given pro forma effect (in accordance with <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABACCdMiz5mv406l"></a>Regulation&#160;S&#8209;X under the Securities Act, but including all <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB8IQhX3SN65pGPCItV5E76C"></a>Pro Forma Cost Savings) as
                if they had occurred on the <a name="z_9kR3WTr14567Fviv69vdz"></a>first&#160;day of the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt8D967Csq6A7BwuE21"></a>four-quarter reference period;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9CJUHz460vohy3oPsxGCu"></a>Consolidated EBITDA attributable to discontinued operations, as determined in accordance with <a name="z_9kMON5YVt5ED8FGfD"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAFCdD0jeu"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP, and
                operations or businesses (and ownership interests therein) disposed of prior <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9IG12lcoldiu4A5r"></a>to the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9JQU3jmw6nw517XF27"></a>Calculation Date, will be excluded;</font></div>
            <div><br>

                businesses (and ownership interests therein) disposed of prior to the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9JQU3jmw6nw517XF27"></a>Calculation Date, will be excluded, but only to the extent that the obligations giving rise to such <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9GISE30hGFkv2q3"></a>Fixed Charges will not be obligations <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBHNBxjv7uinrssoaW5KIEFK"></a>of the specified <a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person or
                any of its <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries following the <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39A9JQU3jmw6nw517XF27"></a>Calculation Date;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">any <a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person that is a <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiary on <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDKHP4rw05vz"></a>the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt39A9JQU3jmw6nw517XF27"></a>Calculation Date will be deemed <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEKI74tgv0himwt"></a>to have been a <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiary at all times during such <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt8D967Csq6A7BwuE21"></a>four-quarter period;</font></div>

                <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt8D967Csq6A7BwuE21"></a>four-quarter period; and</font></div>
            <div><br>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(6)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">if any <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness bears a floating rate of interest, the interest expense on such <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness will be calculated as if the rate <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAJI3xjF6mpz9qz84AaI5A"></a>in effect on the <a name="z_9kMON5YVt39A9JQU3jmw6nw517XF27"></a>Calculation Date had been the applicable rate for the entire period (taking into account any <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABACARCfiowvXNrzvo2B7DI"></a>Hedging Obligation applicable to such <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness if such <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABACARCfiowvXNrzvo2B7DI"></a>Hedging Obligation has a remaining
                term as at the <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39A9JQU3jmw6nw517XF27"></a>Calculation Date in excess of <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455CLHBxxz500"></a>12 months).</font></div>
            <div><br>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1897EGQC1yfEDit0o1"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Fixed Charges</font>&#8221;

            <div><br>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">interest rate swap agreements
                (whether from fixed to floating or from floating to fixed), interest rate cap agreements and interest rate collar agreements;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">commodity futures contracts,
                commodity swaps and commodity options;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">other agreements or
                arrangements designed to manage interest rates or interest rate risk; and</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">other agreements or
                arrangements designed to protect such <a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person against fluctuations in <a name="z_9kR3WTr12359Isr75tqp1443onu1t"></a>currency exchange rates or commodity prices.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">For the avoidance of doubt, any agreements or arrangements related to a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB8HHZKt2u2E0lKQ8G85LDw04cg80"></a>Permitted
              Convertible Indebtedness Call Transaction will not constitute a <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABACARCfiowvXNrzvo2B7DI"></a>Hedging Obligation.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>

              Obligations) would appear as a liability upon a balance sheet of the specified <a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a>Person prepared in accordance with <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBGDeE1kfv"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP.&#160; In addition, the term &#8220;<a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness&#8221; includes all <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness of others secured by a <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAHMcKkq"></a>Lien on any asset of the specified <a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a>Person (whether or not such <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness is

              <a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness shall be calculated without giving effect to the effects of Statement of Financial Accounting <a name="z_9kMML5YVt5ED6FGbcrmqetxz"></a>Standards No. 133 and related interpretations to
              the extent such effects would otherwise increase or decrease an amount of <a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness for any purpose under this <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture as a result of
              accounting for any embedded derivatives created by the terms of such <a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness.&#160; Notwithstanding the foregoing <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB8HIcMemlnow517iRv3zs6FBHM"></a>Reclamation Obligations are
              not and will not be deemed to be <a name="z_9kMJ1G6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness.&#160; In connection with <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBGH6xjs9Cvmlx2m7QAw"></a>the purchase by the <a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company




              or any of its <a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries of any business, notwithstanding the foregoing terms of this definition, the term &#8220;<a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness&#8221; shall
              not include post-closing payment adjustments or earn-out or similar obligations to which the seller may become entitled to the extent such payment is determined by a final closing balance sheet or such payment depends on the performance of
              such business after the closing; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>, that
              such post-closing payment adjustments or earn-out or similar obligations shall constitute &#8220;<a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness&#8221; to the extent that at the time of closing or thereafter such payment becomes fixed and
              determinable and the amount is not paid within <a name="z_9kR3WTr1454BECBmawF"></a>30&#160;days thereafter.&#160; Notwithstanding the foregoing, any long-term liabilities recorded on the <a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company&#8217;s




              balance sheet, other than as debt in accordance with <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBGDeE1kfv"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP, pursuant to any <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9IIO8hiv9xkYU56zG8UT81251DC"></a>Deferred Revenue Financing
              Arrangement shall not be deemed to be &#8220;<a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness.&#8221;</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898IGQKmep5DCx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr19BAGGTKmep5DCx"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Indenture</font>&#8221; means this <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture, as amended or supplemented from time to time.</div>

              means the date of original issuance <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9EEyqwzlSXA11IEyq5"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes under this <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kMLK5YVt5ED6DEUGifl"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr18979GbEgdjRP0voh3"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Legal Holiday</font>&#8221; means a <a name="z_9kR3WTr1456A9ZHpA9tdz"></a>Saturday, a <a name="z_9kR3WTr1456AIib3nbx"></a>Sunday or a day on which banking institutions <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9BB3vhOJz"></a>in <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCLL7xjFE2JFx"></a>the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4CKQ9xEAsSM2xkA7"></a>City of New York or at a place of payment are authorized by law, regulation or executive order to remain closed.&#160; If a payment date is a <a name="z_9kMML5YVt5ED6DEUGifl"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9BIdGiflTR2xqj5"></a>Legal Holiday at a place of payment, payment may be made at that place on the next succeeding day that is not a <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt5ED6DEUGifl"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9BIdGiflTR2xqj5"></a>Legal Holiday, and no interest shall accrue on such payment for the intervening period.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898FKaIio"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Lien</font>&#8221; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFGBmk9xsBy0xsH"></a>means, with respect to any asset, any mortgage, lien, pledge, charge, security interest or encumbrance of any kind in respect of such asset, whether or not filed, recorded or otherwise perfected under
              applicable law, including any conditional sale or other title retention agreement, any lease in the nature thereof, any option or other agreement to sell or give a security interest in and any filing of or agreement to give any financing
              statement under the Uniform Commercial Code (or equivalent statutes) of any jurisdiction.</div>

                Condition Acquisition</font>&#8221; means, any acquisition, including by means of a merger, amalgamation or consolidation, by <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCHI3230rt764A1z1"></a>the <a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company




              or <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt8D967B0yp"></a>one or more of its <a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries, the consummation of which is not conditioned upon the availability of, or on obtaining, <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt8D967GAxnyu"></a>third party financing or in connection with which any fee or expense would be payable by <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBIK32x0Bliyx5rsq09x8"></a>the <a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company




              or its <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries to the seller or target in the event financing to consummate the acquisition is not obtained as contemplated by the definitive acquisition agreement.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1896FNbOxqHAv05yx696UYFMMOK57N"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Long
                Derivative Instrument</font>&#8221; means a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9BDQ8ty3wv474SWDKKMI35L"></a>Derivative Instrument (i)&#160;the value of which generally increases, and/or the payment or delivery obligations under which generally decrease, with
              positive changes to the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9DDaKtvt65prumcXst6743vC"></a>Performance References and/or (ii)&#160;the value of which generally decreases, and/or the payment or delivery obligations under which generally increase, with negative
              changes to the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9DDaKtvt65prumcXst6743vC"></a>Performance References.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3456GQeR0q1H"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr18979FbPyozF"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Moody&#8217;s</font>&#8221; means <a name="z_9kR3WTr12368EaPyozFaQA20GDCHta6OGyvcg7"></a>Moody&#8217;s Investors Service, Inc.</div>

              means the aggregate <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBJLrZqyw77tknn20w0QI5D"></a>cash proceeds and <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAB9M3qyLPC570rwzFL"></a>Cash Equivalents received by the <a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company




              <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt9IDCKJnk9Bto3EnU2II8u69u"></a>or any of its <a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7EMys2uw8vjzCzmvK"></a>in respect of any <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAEFNJ8vxmOot"></a>Asset Sale (including, without limitation, any <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDKIpXowH5s0"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9HJpXowu55rill0yuyOG3B"></a>cash or <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAB9M3qyLPC570rwzFL"></a>Cash
              Equivalents received upon the sale or other disposition of any non-cash consideration received in any <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAEFNJ8vxmOot"></a>Asset Sale), net of the direct costs relating to such <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAEFNJ8vxmOot"></a>Asset




              Sale, including, without limitation, legal, accounting and investment banking fees, and sales commissions, and any relocation expenses incurred as a result of the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAEFNJ8vxmOot"></a>Asset Sale, taxes paid or payable as
              a result of the <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAEFNJ8vxmOot"></a>Asset Sale, in each case, after taking into account any available tax credits or deductions and any tax sharing arrangements, all distributions and other payments required to be made
              to minority interest holders in <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries or joint ventures as a result of such <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAEFNJ8vxmOot"></a>Asset Sale, and any reserve for adjustment or indemnification obligations
              in respect of the sale price of such asset or assets established in accordance with <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBGDeE1kfv"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP.</div>

              means, with respect to a holder or beneficial owner, as of a date of determination, either (i)&#160;the value of its <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9A8bQt4AXDy38109C9XbIPPRN8A"></a>Short Derivative Instruments exceeds the sum of the (x)&#160;the value of its

              defined in the <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455EE9AAF"></a>2014 ISDA Credit Derivatives Definitions) to have occurred with respect to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBLKSRsqro8A9405yqvt5A3OTNHF"></a>the <a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company

                support of any kind (including any undertaking, agreement or instrument that would constitute <a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness) other than any <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAHMcKkq"></a>Liens in respect of such <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness permitted by clause (27) of the definition of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9DFcKt2u2E0lTTtzE"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3DFDD9ZKt2u2E0lTTtzE"></a>Permitted Liens or (b)&#160;is directly or

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kMML5YVt5FE6CIcKimkhx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1898CEaIgkifv"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Officer</font>&#8221; means the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3DC676J8dfx2mo3w25rMRx15"></a>Chairman of the Board, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3DC59BL8ljhIV2izH696aWuywt9"></a>Chief Executive <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAEGcKimkhx"></a>Officer,
              the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3DC69GeVrtykhs8"></a>President, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3DC59FP8ljhJHwpqtposhWuywt9"></a>Chief Financial <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAEGcKimkhx"></a>Officer, any <a name="z_9kR3WTr3DC6CDeSgdRZvx2olwC"></a>Vice President,
              the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3DC6CCbZrbqBBwx"></a>Treasurer or the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3DC6AEeLcqtwtsH"></a>Secretary of the <a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company, except that, with respect to any <a name="z_9kR3WTr1454DJmiw4sk"></a>annual




              compliance certificate delivered pursuant to this <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture, such term means only the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5FE7BDNAnljKX4k1J8B8cYw0yvB"></a>Chief Executive <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAEGcKimkhx"></a>Officer, the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5FE7BHRAnljLJyrsvrqujYw0yvB"></a>Chief Financial <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAEGcKimkhx"></a>Officer, or the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3DC5FOS8ljhE6fsBBB721dXvzxuA"></a>Chief
              Accounting <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAEGcKimkhx"></a>Officer of the <a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kMNM5YVt5FE6CIcKimkhx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1898DGbIgkifvAWDzF7uvtm49"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Officer&#8217;s Certificate</font>&#8221; means a certificate signed by an <a name="z_9kMON5YVt5FE6CIcKimkhx"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAEGcKimkhx"></a>Officer of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFNJPHy0poD1rvmox2DA78vBNOI4"></a>the




              <a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company and delivered to the <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAKHcb9BByk"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAKJeb9BByk"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAKKfb9BByk"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAKLgb9BByk"></a>Trustee that
              meets the requirements of Section&#160;12.03 hereof.</div>

                Counsel</font>&#8221; means an opinion from legal <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE79Itn665xrA7uqqx9J6q5KG3s4S"></a>counsel which is reasonably acceptable to the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee, that meets the requirements of Section&#160;12.03 hereof.&#160; The counsel may be an employee of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9HM32rp887zt9DE8u"></a>or counsel to the <a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary of the <a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company.</div>

              means, with respect to the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAHFN8r2613wvK"></a>Depositary, <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3456EIQP94qorhv"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9HKSP94qorhv"></a>Euroclear or <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9HIOEndrADDzjs"></a>Clearstream, a <a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person who has an account with the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAHFN8r2613wvK"></a>Depositary, <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3456EIQP94qorhv"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9HKSP94qorhv"></a>Euroclear or <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9HIOEndrADDzjs"></a>Clearstream, respectively (and, with respect to <a name="z_9kR3WTr1234BFNvv"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AACFSxx"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AACGTxx"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABACHUxx"></a>DTC, shall include <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3456EIQP94qorhv"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9HKSP94qorhv"></a>Euroclear and <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9HIOEndrADDzjs"></a>Clearstream).</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1897GHZIr0s0CyjHN6wRNqtvjr52L9uE"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Permitted




                Bond Hedge Transaction</font>&#8221; means any call or capped call option (or substantively equivalent derivative transaction) on the <a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company&#8217;s common stock purchased by the <a name="z_9kMPBK6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPBK6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPBK6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPBK6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPBK6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPBK6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPBK6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company in connection with the issuance of any <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9FMUHz7zwC4nrvTXzrq6Av57DS"></a>Convertible Indebtedness; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font> that the purchase price for such <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9IJbKt2u2E0lJP8yTPsvxlt74NB"></a>Permitted Bond Hedge Transaction, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">less</font>
              the proceeds received by the <a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company from the sale of any <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDHCZKt2u2E0leWyG0xHyr52L9uE"></a>related <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9FFaKt2u2E0leWyG0xHyr52L9uE"></a>Permitted
              Warrant Transaction, does not exceed the net proceeds received by the <a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company from the sale of such <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9FMUHz7zwC4nrvTXzrq6Av57DS"></a>Convertible Indebtedness issued in
              connection with the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9IJbKt2u2E0lJP8yTPsvxlt74NB"></a>Permitted Bond Hedge Transaction.</div>

                Business</font>&#8221; means:</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the acquisition, exploration,
                development, operation and disposition of mining and precious or base metal processing properties and assets; and</font></div>
