            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">any other business that is
                the same as, or reasonably related, ancillary or complementary to, the business described in clause (1) or to any of the businesses in which <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDBGIRHy0poD1rvr8J"></a>the <a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company




                and its <a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries are engaged on the date of this <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture.</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1896FEWIr0s0CyjHTH62z5KlbLDBRM8A"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Permitted




                Business Investments</font>&#8221; means <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAGLZM6ywC7tvBH"></a>Investments made in (A)&#160;the ordinary course of, or of a nature that are customary in, the mining business as a means of exploiting, exploring for, acquiring,
              developing, processing, gathering, producing, transporting or marketing gold, silver, copper or other precious or base metals used, useful or created in the mining business, including through agreements, acquisitions, transactions, interests
              or arrangements which permit <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one to share (or have the effect of sharing) risks or costs, comply with regulatory requirements regarding ownership or satisfy other customary objectives in the mining
              business, and in any event including, without limitation, <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAGLZM6ywC7tvBH"></a>Investments made in connection with or in the form of (i)&#160;direct or indirect ownership interests in mining properties, gathering or
              upgrading systems or facilities and (ii)&#160;operating agreements, development agreements, area of mutual interest agreements, pooling agreements, service contracts, joint venture agreements, partnership or limited liability company agreements
              (whether general or limited), or other similar or customary agreements, transactions, properties, interests or arrangements, and <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBHMaN7zxD8uwCI"></a>Investments and expenditures in connection therewith or pursuant
              thereto; and (B)&#160;<a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Persons engaged in a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9GMgKt2u2E0lJVJ8417M"></a>Permitted Business.</div>

                Subsidiary of the <a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBLPTIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4BCBLQUIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBLRVIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABCD9MIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABCDANIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABCDBOIz1qpE"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABCDCPIz1qpE"></a>Company;</font></div>

            <div><br>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">any <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBHMaN7zxD8uwCI"></a>Investment by the <a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDE9kk9oPxDD3p14peq65Dz0y8XV"></a>or any <a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiary of the <a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in a <a name="z_9kMPBK6ZWu4ABBKHZLu973"></a><a name="z_9kMPBK6ZWu4BCBKIaLu973"></a>Person, if as a result of such <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBHMaN7zxD8uwCI"></a>Investment:</font></div>

              under this <a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture except where otherwise <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBGD2xjs66B64528DF3"></a>permitted by <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC99B5vhfzB6wyDBBBGB9A7DI"></a>the provisions
              of this <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDMFKFwynmB7x"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company determines in good faith were directly attributable to an <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC888x054rfkoppl"></a>acquisition, <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBHMaN7zxD8uwCI"></a>Investment, disposition, merger, consolidation or discontinued operation or other specified action that occurred during the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt8D967Csq6A7BwuE21"></a>four-quarter period or after
                the end of the <a name="z_9kMON5YVt8D967Csq6A7BwuE21"></a>four-quarter period and <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEIH8xjF6mpz9qz84AaI5A"></a>on or prior to the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABAKRV4knx7ox628YG38"></a>Calculation Date;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>

                prior to the <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABAKRV4knx7ox628YG38"></a>Calculation Date in connection with or as a result of an acquisition, <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBHMaN7zxD8uwCI"></a>Investment, disposition, merger, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7HD578JFx24ytmfw517"></a>consolidation or discontinued operation or other specified action and that are supportable and quantifiable by the underlying accounting records; or</font></div>

                probable based upon specifically identifiable actions to be <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAHH4qinrA644u1C8EJBDJEEMA"></a>taken within <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3676FO9x3802833"></a>six months of the date of the closing of the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAAAz276thmqrrn"></a>acquisition, <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4BCBHMaN7zxD8uwCI"></a>Investment, disposition, merger, consolidation or discontinued operation or specified action.</font></div>

              any other <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAEKS6imtukw1"></a>Affiliate of such <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAJJTMxnhw"></a>Holder that is not a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9CFgLruistkHEqu12s49"></a>Screened Affiliate, (ii)&#160;that has in place customary
              information screens between it and such <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAJJTMxnhw"></a>Holder and <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDECni7V7jnuvlx2"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDGEni7kLu973qrvjuVIuy56w8D"></a>any other <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAEKS6imtukw1"></a>Affiliate




              of such <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder that is not a <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9CFgLruistkHEqu12s49"></a>Screened Affiliate and such screens prohibit the sharing of information <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9IM72ymksohv406B73y6MK8vtFYI4"></a>with respect to <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBIK32x0Bliyx5rsq09x8"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or its <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries, (iii)&#160;whose investment policies are not directed by such <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder or any other <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAEKS6imtukw1"></a>Affiliate of such <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder that is acting in concert with such <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder in connection with its investment in the <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes,




              and (iv)&#160;whose investment decisions are not influenced by the investment decisions of such <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder or any other <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAEKS6imtukw1"></a>Affiliate of such <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder that is acting in concert with such <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders in connection with its investment in the <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898CBbvg"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr245AIMhvg"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">SEC</font>&#8221; means the <a name="z_9kR3WTr46448IkBANevB034q1yuyQfAvu180XcJ"></a>U.S.&#160;Securities and Exchange Commission.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1896FIdLct9uhMRtlk04pz17M"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr18ABBBeLct9uhMRtlk04pz17M"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Secured Indebtedness</font>&#8221; means any <a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness of the <a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWuAJEDLKolACup4FoV3JJ9v7Av"></a>or any of its <a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries (other than <a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness in respect of letters of
              credit which have not been drawn and other than <a name="z_9kMN9K6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness referred to in clause (6) of the definition of such term) secured by a <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien on <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7ADzot9ui"></a>assets <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBHDx27BwkaS0GG6s47s"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or such <a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted




              Subsidiary, excluding <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBHFN4ox2vohkDxu"></a>Capital Stock or <a name="z_9kMNAL6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCBBF4ouxnzaQskvBJI3s6GCz1"></a>of an <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAFLmY2uwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Unrestricted Subsidiary.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898GFbLct9y12ozWB1"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr19BAIHcLct9y12ozWB1"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Securities Act</font>&#8221; means the <a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAIGcNevB034q1YD3"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAIHdNevB034q1YD3"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAIIeNevB034q1YD3"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAIJfNevB034q1YD3"></a>Securities

            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr189786ZOr28VBw16zy7A7VZGNNPL68O"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Short
                Derivative Instrument</font>&#8221; means a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9BDQ8ty3wv474SWDKKMI35L"></a>Derivative Instrument (i)&#160;the value of which generally decreases, and/or the payment or delivery obligations under which generally increase, with
              positive changes to the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9DDaKtvt65prumcXst6743vC"></a>Performance References and/or (ii)&#160;the value of which generally increases, and/or the payment or delivery obligations under which generally decrease, with negative
              changes to the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9DDaKtvt65prumcXst6743vC"></a>Performance References.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898DIhPkqtmnleqAqm219vwu4T"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Significant




                Subsidiary</font>&#8221; means any <a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiary that would be a &#8220;significant subsidiary&#8221; as defined in Article&#160;1, Rule&#160;1-02 of <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABACCdMiz5mv406l"></a>Regulation&#160;S-X,




              promulgated pursuant to the <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAIGcNevB034q1YD3"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAIHdNevB034q1YD3"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAIIeNevB034q1YD3"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAIJfNevB034q1YD3"></a>Securities Act, as such
              Regulation is in effect on the date of this <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture.</div>

                Foreign Subsidiary</font>&#8221; means any direct <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEGH52xuqm1yk0HJ32Awxv5U"></a>or indirect <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JFAFL99ts0mnlvK"></a>subsidiary of the <a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




              that is a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB8HLQij"></a>CFC and any subsidiary thereof, in each case, excluding any <a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4BCBKJdNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6V"></a>Restricted Subsidiary organized under the laws of <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt5ED6FIN3lmde"></a>Canada or any province or territory thereof.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1897AFgapqvgPHvGF47O"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr245AJGaapqvgPHvGF47O"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Stated Maturity</font>&#8221; means, with respect to any installment of interest or principal on any series of <a name="z_9kMNBM6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness, the date on which the payment of interest or
              principal was scheduled to be paid in the documentation governing such <a name="z_9kMNCN6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness as of the date of this <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture, and will not include
              any contingent obligations to repay, redeem or repurchase any such interest or principal prior to the date originally scheduled for the payment thereof.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><a name="OLE_LINK39"></a>&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898FFcbrqykljtI"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Subsidiary</font>&#8221; means, with respect to any specified <a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person:</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">any corporation, association
                or other business entity of which more than <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3566GKHF"></a>50% of the total voting power of shares of <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBHFN4ox2vohkDxu"></a>Capital Stock entitled (without regard to the occurrence of any
                contingency and after giving effect to any voting agreement or stockholders&#8217; agreement that effectively transfers voting power) to vote in the election of directors, managers or <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt467CLLgb9BByk"></a>trustees of the
                corporation, association or other business entity is at the time owned or controlled, directly or indirectly, by that <a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person or <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more of the other <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries of that <a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person (or a combination thereof);
                and</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">any partnership or limited
                liability company of which (a)&#160;more than <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3566GKHF"></a>50% of the capital accounts, distribution rights, total equity and voting interests or general and limited partnership interests, as applicable, are owned or
                controlled, directly or indirectly, by <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7FEv0owA0r"></a>such <a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person or <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more of the other <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries of that <a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person or a combination thereof, whether in the form of membership, general, special or limited
                partnership interests or otherwise, and (b)&#160;such <a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person or any <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8DKibrqykljtIA0BJ4sAB1C8hdCRP"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8EEbbrqykljtIGAFJ4s"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8EK77sgx6thmqrrnZV4JHD"></a>Subsidiary of such <a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person is a controlling general partner or
                otherwise controls such entity.</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1897FLi0i"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">TIA</font>&#8221; means the Trust
              Indenture Act of 1939, as amended (15 U.S.C. &#167;&#167;&#160;77aaa-77bbbb).</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr189789dZrbqBBGmJrsmryz1HfYM63A29"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Treasury




                Management Arrangement</font>&#8221; means any agreement or other arrangement governing the provision of treasury or cash management services, including deposit accounts, overdraft, credit or debit card, funds transfer, automated clearinghouse, <a name="z_9kR3WTr6B746CByr2"></a>zero balance accounts, returned check concentration, controlled disbursement, lockbox, account reconciliation and reporting and trade finance services and other cash management services.</div>

            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr18978BfZrbqBBGrOx2"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Treasury Rate</font>&#8221;
              means, as of any redemption date, the yield to maturity as of the earlier of (a)&#160;such redemption date or (b)&#160;the date on which such <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes are defeased or satisfied
              and discharged, of <a name="z_9kR3WTr464479cWryvgVgvw11rl3n2NNS"></a>United States Treasury securities with a constant maturity (as compiled and published in the most recent Federal Reserve Statistical Release H.15 (519) that has become
              publicly available at least <a name="z_9kR3WTr1456CB0A6mtB0wtzE0j5O"></a>two <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABADCMMAzvsyDZC4"></a>Business Days prior to such date (or, if such Statistical Release is no longer published, any publicly available source
              of similar market data)) most nearly equal to the period from the redemption date to <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3676DLQG4ytDIIJS"></a>April&#160;1, 2028; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>,
              <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>, that, if the period from the redemption date to <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3676DLQG4ytDIIJS"></a>April&#160;1, 2028 is less than <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3676EN5yp12ft"></a>one year, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr1456CE6velt8"></a>weekly average yield on actively traded <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt68669BeYt0xiXixy33tn5p4PPU"></a>United States Treasury securities adjusted to a constant
              maturity of <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3676EN5yp12ft"></a>one year will be used.&#160; Any such <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9ADhbtdsDDItQz4"></a>Treasury Rate shall be obtained by the <a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898IFaZ799wi"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr19BAIJfZ799wi"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr245AJJeZ799wi"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Trustee</font>&#8221; means <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3456DKiRjE5oz1xXR72pFCiX3BFI"></a>The Bank of New York Mellon, until a successor replaces it <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEID4xjdp52wohhtx2GGLGEFCINP"></a>in accordance with <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBFF6vhq44942306B"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDHDlk0xrjccosxBBGB9A7DE7"></a>the applicable provisions of this <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture and thereafter means the successor serving hereunder.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1898DAbByhcs"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">U.S.&#160;GAAP</font>&#8221; means <a name="z_9kR3WTr6A648AofnotqlxB1gjm0G6roor4NNNJE"></a>generally accepted accounting principles set forth in the opinions and pronouncements of the <a name="z_9kR3WTr46446GQ1an6662xwZf52xt7B19hY48C"></a>Accounting




              Principles Board of the <a name="z_9kR3WTr46446DNBmsxjcoXS9G78LM735UOAQI56"></a>American Institute of Certified Public Accountants and statements and pronouncements of the <a name="z_9kR3WTr46447HVCrklokjnOAjwFFFB65lt837vA"></a>Financial
              Accounting Standards Board or in such other statements by such other entity as have been approved by a significant segment of the accounting profession, which are in effect from time to time; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font> that, with respect to determinations for purposes of the definition of &#8220;<a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3AB9IIO8hiv9xkYU56zG8UT81251DC"></a>Deferred Revenue Financing Arrangement,&#8221; whether such
              arrangements constitute debt for purposes of <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBGDeE1kfv"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP and whether payments thereunder constitute financing cash flows for purposes of <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBGDeE1kfv"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP, such determinations will be made under <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBGDeE1kfv"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP as in effect <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAJK5xjfn083zypk16"></a>as of the
              closing date of such <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3AB9IIO8hiv9xkYU56zG8UT81251DC"></a>Deferred Revenue Financing Arrangement.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div class="BRPFPageBreakArea" style="clear: both; margin-top: 10pt; margin-bottom: 10pt;">
              <div style="text-align: center;" class="BRPFPageNumberArea"><font style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 8pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal;">26</font></div>
              <div class="BRPFPageBreak" style="page-break-after: always;">
                <hr noshade="noshade" style="margin: 4px 0px; width: 100%; border-width: 0; height: 2px; color: #000000; background-color: #000000; clear: both;"></div>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898DHiW0suAA0my1mMIrw56DEHEhmPG"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Unrestricted




                Definitive </font><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDICjA9inwx4585YdG7"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Note</font>&#8221; means a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAHJR8hmvw3474XcF6"></a>Definitive Note that
              does not bear and is not required to bear <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCLJ5xj"></a>the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAGFaXx2vuzWYqinyz1HqWyz77"></a>Private Placement Legend.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898EFfW0suAA0my1mPS7ylwkiLC"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Unrestricted




                Global </font><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCJInXcs80nomfx2nXdG7"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Note</font>&#8221; means a <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note that does not
              bear and is not required to bear <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCLJ5xj"></a>the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAGFaXx2vuzWYqinyz1HqWyz77"></a>Private Placement Legend.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1898DJkW0suAA0my1mbn32Awxv5U"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Unrestricted




                Subsidiary</font>&#8221; means <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDGBkk9pgwv3pqoyN"></a>any <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary of the <a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company that is designated by the <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAEJSGmqusvLJ41n3GFK"></a>Board of <a name="z_9kMML5YVt5FE6CLUCxugw98D"></a>Directors <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFNLRHy0poD1wxtojD57NNDzBEzo"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




              as an <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAFLmY2uwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Unrestricted Subsidiary pursuant to a resolution of the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAEJSGmqusvLJ41n3GFK"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7HCDKDjkkosqtjn2zl1EDI"></a>Board of <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt5FE6CLUCxugw98D"></a>Directors of the <a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, but only to the extent that such <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary:</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">has no <a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness other than <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB8GMdSzdPhsBFE2OJo4"></a>Non-Recourse Debt;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">except as permitted by
                Section&#160;4.11 hereof, is not party to any agreement, contract, arrangement <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEABBz296qixCFytxt43DGEEFG2"></a>or understanding <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCAEB4zxxwuw8vjzHDE8u"></a>with <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDGHqi7DAut1nomwL"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8FM9vhbZitu3KGyluJ"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9A81vhfzFxs8F4mz0vK2mG8AQQG2E"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a><a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWuAJEDLLgNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6VTB"></a>Restricted Subsidiary of the <a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company unless the terms of any such agreement, contract, arrangement or
                understanding are not materially less favorable, taken as a whole, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC897v0644Bwk"></a>to <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBGH227BwkaS0GG6s47s"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or such <a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary than those that might be obtained at the time from <a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Persons who are not <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAEKS6imtukw1"></a>Affiliates of the <a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company; and</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">is a <a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person with respect to which neither <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBKJOHy0poDE5AxuJ"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                nor any of its <a name="z_9kMHz1J7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries has any direct or indirect obligation (a)&#160;to subscribe for additional <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBHHRM922JjTB3235LM"></a>Equity Interests or (b)&#160;to
                maintain or preserve such <a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person&#8217;s financial condition or to cause such <a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person
                to achieve any specified levels of operating results.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9GNmD9MvA84"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr256AJNjB7Kt862"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">U.S.&#160;Person</font>&#8221; means a <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1787ELkB7Kt862"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1BDBB9eB7Kt862"></a>U.S.&#160;Person as defined in Rule&#160;902(k)
              promulgated under the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr18978AgY3ytsYg9tq"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Voting Stock</font>&#8221;
              of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEACAYKt862pvAyluJ"></a>any specified <a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person as of any date means the <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBHFN4ox2vohkDxu"></a>Capital Stock of
              such <a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person that is at the time entitled to vote <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7FIts4zljrsk0739A39Cy"></a>in the election of the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAEJSGmqusvLJ41n3GFK"></a>Board of <a name="z_9kMON5YVt5FE6CLUCxugw98D"></a>Directors of such <a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr18978CjPillzxiFS30xnsYXyvALpWAVU"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Weighted




                Average Life to Maturity</font>&#8221; means, when applied to any <a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness at any date, the number of years obtained by dividing:</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the sum of the products
                obtained by multiplying (a)&#160;the amount of each then remaining installment, sinking fund, serial maturity or other required payments of principal, including payment at final maturity, in respect of the <a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness, by (b)&#160;the number of years (calculated to the nearest <a name="z_9kR3WTr6B748DzwnuDzpr03"></a>one-twelfth) that will elapse between such date and the making of such payment; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">by</font></font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBIJ6xjw0mt4CIHI1w0w76"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the then outstanding principal amount of such <a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1896FHgSrwu8mfBulZV3JJ9v7AvkwCBJ"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Wholly




                Owned Restricted Subsidiary</font>&#8221; is any <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9AHoUtywAohDwnco43Bxyw6V"></a>Wholly Owned Subsidiary that is a <a name="z_9kMHz2K7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr18978FmSrwu8mfBulam219vwu4T"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Wholly
                Owned Subsidiary</font>&#8221; of any <a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person means a <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary of such <a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3566DJFBB"></a>100% <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBEKBxjr8EDExsws32SH1AF81"></a>of the outstanding <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBHFN4ox2vohkDxu"></a>Capital Stock or other ownership
              interests of which (other than directors&#8217; qualifying shares or shares required pursuant to applicable law) shall at the time be owned by <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9HGx2qyC2t"></a>such <a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person or by <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9AHoUtywAohDwnco43Bxyw6V"></a>Wholly Owned Subsidiaries of such <a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>

            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318513"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;1.03</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Rules of Construction</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Unless the context otherwise requires:</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">a term has the meaning
                assigned to it;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">an accounting term not
                otherwise defined has the meaning assigned to it in accordance with <a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBGDeE1kfv"></a>U.S.&#160;GAAP;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">&#8220;or&#8221; is not exclusive;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">&#8220;including&#8221; is not limiting;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(5)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">words in the singular include
                the plural, and in the plural include the singular;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div class="BRPFPageBreakArea" style="clear: both; margin-top: 10pt; margin-bottom: 10pt;">
              <div style="text-align: center;" class="BRPFPageNumberArea"><font style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 8pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal;">28</font></div>
              <div class="BRPFPageBreak" style="page-break-after: always;">
                <hr noshade="noshade" style="margin: 4px 0px; width: 100%; border-width: 0; height: 2px; color: #000000; background-color: #000000; clear: both;"></div>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(6)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">&#8220;will&#8221; shall be interpreted
                to express a command;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(7)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">provisions apply to
                successive events and transactions; and</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(8)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">references to sections of or
                rules under the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9JIOSxihovnIB1"></a>Exchange Act, the <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act or the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9HNk2k"></a>TIA will be deemed to include substitute, replacement of successor sections or rules adopted by the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAEDdxi"></a>SEC




                from time to time.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: center; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">ARTICLE&#160;2.<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><br>
              </font><a name="z_Toc227318514"></a>THE <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>NOTES</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318515"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;2.01</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Form and Dating</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">General</font>.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes and the <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee&#8217;s certificate of authentication will be substantially in the form of Exhibit A hereto.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes may have notations, legends or endorsements required by law, stock exchange rule or usage.&#160; Each <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note will be dated the
                date of its authentication.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes shall be in denominations of <a name="z_9kR3WTr1344BKHA9A"></a>$2,000 and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDMGrs4wkyto1BBB96A08J7"></a>integral




                multiples of <a name="z_9kR3WTr1344BLH99A"></a>$1,000 in excess thereof.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">The terms and provisions contained in the <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes will constitute, and
              are hereby expressly made, a part of this <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDEBOHy0poDK4q"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company,




              the <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors and the <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee, by
              their execution and delivery of this <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture, expressly agree to such terms and provisions and to be bound thereby.&#160; However, to the extent any
              provision of any <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note conflicts <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBBF9xjh1D8y0FDDDIDBC9FK"></a>with the express provisions of this <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDHH8xjs66B64528D"></a>the provisions of this <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture shall govern and be
              controlling.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Global Notes</font>.&#160; <a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes issued in <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7BIvoxobmsw98EB15wq8P98RA5P"></a>global form will be substantially in the form of Exhibit A<sup style="font-weight: bold; vertical-align: text-top; line-height: 1; font-size: smaller;">&#160;</sup>hereto (including the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9ILUIxobmaYB2VQst11"></a>Global Note
                Legend thereon and the &#8220;Schedule of Exchanges of Interests in the <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note&#8221; attached thereto).&#160; <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7EHtsogjoxy5696r2FE"></a>Notes issued in definitive form will be <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7CHuitux8ryHKA884IOODz"></a>substantially in the form of Exhibit A hereto (but without the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3AB9ILUIxobmaYB2VQst11"></a>Global Note Legend thereon and without the &#8220;Schedule of Exchanges of Interests in the <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note&#8221; attached thereto).&#160; Each <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8DGZS5w05vz60zD3562IOQBz"></a>Global Note will represent such <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8DMfS5wwtuH8y2"></a>of the outstanding <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes as will be specified therein and each shall provide that it represents the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEF9yqr7DCDwrvr21"></a>aggregate principal amount of outstanding <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes from time to time endorsed thereon and that the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEF9yqr7DCDwrvr21"></a>aggregate principal amount of outstanding <a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes represented thereby may from time to time be reduced or increased, as appropriate, to reflect exchanges and redemptions.&#160; Any endorsement of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEMImDJypcn"></a>a <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note to reflect the amount of any increase or decrease <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7FHss4zlfip10qn163HB83zD634"></a>in the aggregate principal amount of outstanding <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes represented thereby will be made by the <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee or the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9BBNNAA7snlr"></a>Custodian, at the direction of the <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee, in accordance with instructions given by the <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder thereof as required by Section&#160;2.06 hereof.</font></div>

                will be applicable to transfers of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDLMys4zlWRn4Ar095BqEYD4r2"></a>beneficial interests in the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9IMgMiz5mv406l9T8zmxljMD"></a>Regulation&#160;S Global Note that are held by <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABACBaGp91lm0tsC"></a>Participants through <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3456EIQP94qorhv"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3AB9HKSP94qorhv"></a>Euroclear or <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3AB9HIOEndrADDzjs"></a>Clearstream.</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318516"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;2.02</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Execution and Authentication</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">At least <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one




                <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAEGcKimkhx"></a>Officer must sign the <a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes for the <a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                by manual or facsimile signature.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If an <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBFHdLjnliy"></a>Officer whose signature is on a <a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note no longer holds that office at the time a <a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note is authenticated, the <a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note will nevertheless be valid.</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">A <a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note will not be valid until authenticated by the manual, facsimile or electronic signature of the <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee.&#160; The signature will be conclusive evidence that the <a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note has been
                authenticated under this <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture.</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee will, upon receipt of a written order of the <a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFOJOHy0poD9z078qu6KA2IICCOU"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(j)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company initially appoints the <a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFKCjp9zlWRns5HHz01y2fXDMCB"></a>act as the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu6GF7DKhNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAGMjMin0CCuv"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAHEaMin0CCuv"></a>Registrar




                and <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AAHGaGw5vuIDowC"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAHIcGw5vuIDowC"></a>Paying Agent.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAHGaGw5vuIDowC"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAHIcGw5vuIDowC"></a><a name="z_Toc227318518"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;2.04</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;




              <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Paying Agent to Hold Money in Trust</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                will require each <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAHGaGw5vuIDowC"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAHIcGw5vuIDowC"></a>Paying Agent other than the <a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee to agree in writing that the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent will hold in trust <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9AC0qKOzpjyD"></a>for the benefit of <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders or the <a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee all money held by the <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent for <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9FJ7vht5sglpqowv5Iz1H"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAHI6vhx1uzqgp4DDDF24HB83zD63I"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAKH2vhq4yvqm0tq"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAHD1vhDIz1qpEErqv41xMP2CP68O"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7CDxouxjs60xso2vs"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAHC0vhgx4wmo3CCCE13GA72yC52HC"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDG8hi793"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDHGoi73t5xwxzFC7D8u"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7DK3w2xj"></a>the <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC78F3ojs4wvwyEB67G7448A6KEB62G"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBADBywjk9kV8zz"></a>payment of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBHFlk9B50x91013J"></a>principal of, premium on, if any, or interest on, the <a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes, and
                will notify the <a name="z_9kMJ1G6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ1G6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ1G6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ1G6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee of any default by the <a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in making any such payment.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>

              <div style="text-align: center;" class="BRPFPageNumberArea"><font style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 8pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal;">30</font></div>

            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">While any such default continues, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECD9cb9BByktq3L22JCA7rdYENDC"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee may require
                a <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent to pay all money held by it to the <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                at any time may require a <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent to pay all money held by it to the <a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Upon payment over to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECEAcb9BByk04qZQ6F54"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee, the <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent (if other than <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDENJmPeut1nomwL"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                or a <a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary) will have no further liability for the money.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDFD12pRgwv3pqoyN"></a>the




                <a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or a <a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary acts as <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent, it will segregate and hold in a separate trust fund <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC78AyoIMxnhwB"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC99C6vhfs9umnquzx01kw0rs56z4J"></a>for the benefit of the <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders all money held by it as <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(f)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Upon any bankruptcy or reorganization
                proceedings relating <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE77HUHy0poDK4q"></a>to the <a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, the <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee will serve as <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent for the <a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes.</font></div>
            <div><br>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a><a name="z_Toc227318519"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;2.05</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Holder Lists</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee will preserve in as current a form as is reasonably practicable the most recent list available to it of the names
                and addresses of all <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee is not the <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu6GF7DKhNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAGMjMin0CCuv"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAHEaMin0CCuv"></a>Registrar, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECFIC1rvq0D7z557FGAw"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will furnish to the <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee (1)&#160;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1455AG5rmrgm08wo0E"></a>semi-annually at least <a name="z_9kR3WTr1456AF5rvwpNPD2yv1GcF7Q"></a>seven




                <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABADCMMAzvsyDZC4"></a>Business Days before each interest payment date a list, in such form and as of such date as the <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee may reasonably require of the names and addresses <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9DDyqwzlMR2sm1G"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders of
                <a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font> that the <a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                shall not be obligated to furnish or cause to be furnished such list at any time that the list shall not differ in any respect from the most recent list furnished to the <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee by the <a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and (2)&#160;at such other times
                as the <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee may request in writing within <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3676DGEDocyH"></a>30&#160;days




                after <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBGLAxjuvhip1D06P9vRWDF43SUC"></a>the receipt by the <a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company of any such request, a list of similar form and content as of a date
                not <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAHI5xfmEKxg2L"></a>more than <a name="z_9kR3WTr1454EHAErawF"></a>15&#160;days prior to the time such list is furnished.</font></div>

            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAGJibpm5yly"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Transfer and </font><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAGISSxihovn"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Exchange of </font><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7BKXIxobmaYB22Z"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Global Notes</font>.&#160; A <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global




                Note may not be transferred except as a whole by the <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary to a nominee of the <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary, by a nominee of the <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary to the <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary or to another nominee of the <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary, or by the <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary or any such nominee <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JFBJN94mrCxgj0FCCcK3EIDF87W"></a>to a successor <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary or a nominee of such successor <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary.&#160; All <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8FMdS5wwF6w0rlp98tsz6ywuG"></a>Notes will be exchanged by the <a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                for <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAHJR8hmvw3474XcF6"></a>Definitive Notes if:</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDJJRHy0poD4luzA74JMJKE0"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company delivers to the <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee notice from the <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary that it is unwilling or unable to continue to act as <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary or that it is
                no longer a clearing agency registered under the <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9JIOSxihovnIB1"></a>Exchange Act and, in either case, a successor <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary is not appointed by the <a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company within <a name="z_9kR3WTr14556BDBBnbxG"></a>120&#160;days <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9EK9vhstghr3B517xl279LGFKSSQE"></a>after the date of such notice from the <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in its sole discretion determines that the <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Notes (in whole but not in part) should be exchanged for <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAHJR8hmvw3474XcF6"></a>Definitive <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8DKdS5wwtptkmv0B85K49REHTFA"></a>Notes and delivers a written notice to such effect to the <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee; or</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>

                continuing <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCLPsA9ifv77"></a>a <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAHLT8heu66"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAHNWQxq68vLFol1DD"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AAIFNQxq68vLFol1DD"></a>Event of Default with respect to the <a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes.</font></div>
