            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">Upon the occurrence of either of the preceding events in (1) or (2) above, <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAHJR8hmvw3474XcF6"></a>Definitive Notes shall
              be issued in such names as the <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary shall instruct the <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee.&#160; <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Notes also may be exchanged or replaced, in whole or in part, as provided in Section&#160;2.07 and Section&#160;2.10 hereof.&#160; Every <a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note authenticated and delivered in exchange for, or <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7EIuswsmzAwj"></a>in lieu of, a <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note
              or any portion thereof, pursuant to this Section&#160;2.06 or Section&#160;2.07 or Section&#160;2.10 hereof, shall be authenticated and delivered in the form of, and shall be, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEMLpDJypcnbZC3L"></a>a <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note.&#160; A <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note may not be exchanged for another <a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note other than
              as provided in this Section&#160;2.06(a), however, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFLGncpqjomnmqz2E6568OPFB4Ye"></a>beneficial interests in a <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note may be transferred and exchanged as provided in
              Section&#160;2.06(b) or (c) hereof.</div>

                through the <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5CMyq2xj"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5DEpq2xjdp52wohhtx2GGLGEFCIN"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBGG5xjs66B64528DF39C2Epf7zA"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCAEE7zxxyzp1"></a>in accordance with the provisions of this <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture and the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9HFJG2ztleequZhDzqs9O9B"></a>Applicable




                Procedures.&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFMEK6pqjomnmqz2E6568OPFBNI4"></a>Beneficial interests in the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAGKhMuAA0my1mPS7ylwkiLC"></a>Restricted Global Notes will <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECC9343uwCC2o0739E"></a>be subject to

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 108pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(i)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">a written order from a <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABACBaGp91lm0tsC"></a>Participant or an <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9DBRMokzwiymOxH9tu810K"></a>Indirect Participant given to the <a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary in accordance with the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9HFJG2ztleequZhDzqs9O9B"></a>Applicable Procedures directing the <a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary to cause to be issued a <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAHJR8hmvw3474XcF6"></a>Definitive Note in an

            <div style="text-align: left; margin-left: 72pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">and, in each such case set forth in this subparagraph (A), if the <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu6GF7DKhNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4ABBHNkNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBIFbNjo1DDvw"></a>Registrar so requests or if the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9HFJG2ztleequZhDzqs9O9B"></a>Applicable Procedures so require, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC57DOF443vp3xhwB7ujvJ"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC59Fro10kmqwEyxGzuxp56q5KG3s4S"></a>an <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAEHdUvuvx34xMQFFE60"></a>Opinion <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBACG4ou7pm5yly30y0DCE35EECvtDQ"></a>of Counsel in form
              reasonably acceptable to the <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu6GF7DKhNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBHNkNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBIFbNjo1DDvw"></a>Registrar to the effect that such exchange or transfer is in compliance with the <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act and that the restrictions on transfer
              contained herein and <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCKNAxj"></a>in the <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBHGbYy3wv0XZrjoz02IrXz088"></a>Private Placement Legend are no longer required in order to maintain compliance with the <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDGCM6pqjomnmqZWE6568OPFBytN"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Beneficial Interests in </font><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBHIiZ3vxDD3p14pSVA1oznlOF"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Unrestricted Global </font><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6CDVQ3uuwt6tqlgA24KKAw8Bw"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCII72bMuAA0my1mMIrw56DEHE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6CEWQ3uuwt6WEns129ADA"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notes to </font><a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAFJkY2uwCC2o03oOKty78FGJGjo"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Unrestricted




                  Definitive Notes</font>.&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBLLVEdmB6x2sm1C1olq34x20104"></a>If any holder of a beneficial interest in an <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBHIiZ3vxDD3p14pSVA1oznlOF"></a>Unrestricted Global Note proposes to exchange such <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE89Ews4wvwyE2yByLKty78FGJG"></a>beneficial interest for a <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive Note or to transfer such beneficial interest to a <a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person who takes <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8HL1qdCBkpyz67A7"></a>delivery thereof in the form of a <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive Note, then, upon satisfaction of the
                conditions set forth in Section&#160;2.06(b)(2) hereof, the <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee will cause <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCMO9xjdgnzyolz4"></a>the aggregate principal amount of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAIL7xjdp52wohhtxhlF79PPF1DG"></a>the applicable <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBHIiZ3vxDD3p14pSVA1oznlOF"></a>Unrestricted Global Note to be
                reduced accordingly pursuant to Section&#160;2.06(g) hereof, and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDJKSHy0poDN8y2w9Aq7PAs26DI4"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will execute and the <a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee will authenticate and deliver to the <a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person




                designated in the instructions a <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive Note in the appropriate principal amount.&#160; Any <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDMPfS5wm1CF2mr2zA9ut07zzAN"></a>Note issued in exchange for a beneficial interest pursuant to this Section&#160;2.06(c)(3) will be registered in such name or names and in such authorized denomination or denominations as the
                holder of such beneficial interest requests through instructions to the <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu6GF7DKhNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4ABBHNkNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBIFbNjo1DDvw"></a>Registrar from or through the <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary and the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABACBaGp91lm0tsC"></a>Participant or <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9DBRMokzwiymOxH9tu810K"></a>Indirect Participant.&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECFE81rvoirw741GK5tVNw1ABIJM"></a>The <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee will deliver
                such <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive Notes to the <a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Persons in whose names such <a name="z_9kMNAL6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMNAL6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes are so registered.&#160; <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBHCIC7mNvBB1nz2nNJsx67EFIF"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDHAii7kLu9735DGzqp1A65CE0XS16"></a>Any <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6AHbQ3uoly332nmt0s"></a>Definitive <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDMPfS5wm1CF2mr2zA9ut07zzAN"></a>Note issued in exchange for a beneficial interest pursuant to this Section&#160;2.06(c)(3) will not bear <a name="z_9kMML5YVt9IDCLJ5xj"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBHGbYy3wv0XZrjoz02IrXz088"></a>Private Placement Legend.</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">&#8220;THIS <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>GLOBAL NOTE IS HELD BY THE <a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>DEPOSITARY (AS DEFINED
              IN THE <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>INDENTURE GOVERNING THIS <a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>NOTE) OR ITS NOMINEE IN CUSTODY FOR THE BENEFIT OF THE <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9CIS6pqjomnmqflH05"></a>BENEFICIAL OWNERS HEREOF, AND IS NOT TRANSFERABLE TO ANY <a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>PERSON UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES EXCEPT THAT (1) THE <a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>TRUSTEE MAY MAKE SUCH NOTATIONS HEREON AS MAY BE REQUIRED PURSUANT TO SECTION&#160;2.06
              OF THE <a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>INDENTURE, (2) THIS <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>GLOBAL NOTE MAY BE EXCHANGED IN WHOLE BUT NOT IN PART PURSUANT TO SECTION&#160;2.06(a) OF THE <a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>INDENTURE, (3) THIS <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>GLOBAL NOTE MAY BE DELIVERED TO THE <a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>TRUSTEE FOR CANCELLATION PURSUANT TO SECTION&#160;2.11 OF THE <a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>INDENTURE AND (4) THIS <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>GLOBAL NOTE MAY BE TRANSFERRED TO A SUCCESSOR <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>DEPOSITARY WITH THE PRIOR WRITTEN CONSENT
              OF THE <a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>COMPANY.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">UNLESS AND UNTIL IT IS EXCHANGED IN WHOLE OR IN PART FOR <a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>NOTES IN
              DEFINITIVE FORM, THIS <a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>NOTE MAY NOT BE TRANSFERRED EXCEPT AS A WHOLE BY THE <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>DEPOSITARY TO A NOMINEE OF THE <a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>DEPOSITARY OR BY A NOMINEE OF THE <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>DEPOSITARY TO THE <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>DEPOSITARY OR ANOTHER NOMINEE OF THE <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>DEPOSITARY OR BY THE <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>DEPOSITARY OR ANY SUCH NOMINEE <a name="z_9kR3WTr7HD9HL72kpAvehyDAAaI1CGBD65U"></a>TO A SUCCESSOR <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>DEPOSITARY OR A NOMINEE OF SUCH SUCCESSOR <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>DEPOSITARY.&#160; UNLESS THIS CERTIFICATE IS PRESENTED BY AN AUTHORIZED <a name="z_9kR3WTr3DC57Bcut7xz0wC01ADA"></a>REPRESENTATIVE




              OF <a name="z_9kR3WTr1236BCczlijw7B68FEPSMOQQB7IK98X"></a>THE DEPOSITORY TRUST COMPANY (&#8220;<a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3456DHPxx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1788ADQvv"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3BDCIEMxx"></a>DTC&#8221;), TO THE <a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>COMPANY OR ITS <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9IOR7iq6"></a>AGENT FOR REGISTRATION OF <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBHKjcqn6zmz"></a>TRANSFER, <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAGISSxihovn"></a>EXCHANGE OR PAYMENT, AND ANY
              CERTIFICATE ISSUED IS REGISTERED IN THE NAME OF <a name="z_9kR3WTr12356CPfhiit"></a>CEDE &amp; CO<a name="z_9kR3WTr5DA49E"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr5DA49I"></a>.             <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(g)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Cancellation and/or Adjustment of </font><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Global Notes</font>.&#160; At such
                time as all <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFLIpcpqjomnmqz2E6568OPFB478"></a>beneficial interests in a particular <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note have been exchanged for <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive




                Notes or a particular <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note has been redeemed, repurchased or canceled in whole and not in part, each such <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note will be returned to or
                retained and canceled by the <a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee in accordance with Section&#160;2.11 hereof.&#160;
                At any time prior to such cancellation, if any <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCMQsDJypcn"></a>beneficial interest in a <a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note is exchanged for or transferred <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDELH80t94uy7xpuopy3EB8T"></a>to a <a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person who will take delivery thereof in the form of a beneficial interest in another <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9IJz2us5VDmr0189C9"></a>Global Note or for <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive Notes, the principal amount <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8FIZS5wwAxwA023zF7sqCURC0fe"></a>of <a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes represented by such <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note will be reduced
                accordingly and an endorsement will be made on such <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note by the <a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee or by the <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary at the direction of the <a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee to reflect such reduction; and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7DFskwzlghuvotrsrv"></a>if the beneficial interest is being exchanged for or transferred <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDELH80t94uy7xpuopy3EB8T"></a>to a <a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person who will take delivery thereof in the form of a beneficial interest in another <a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8DHaS5wwDym"></a>Global Note, such other <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note will be increased accordingly and an endorsement will be made on such <a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note by the <a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee or by the

            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">All <a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Notes and <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive Notes issued upon any <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCED10sq3u10lkryq"></a>registration of transfer or exchange of <a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Notes <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7AIT8hmvw3474XcF66PG6A"></a>or <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive Notes will be <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBJK6xjyvmvovus0wp3C8EJ"></a>the
                valid obligations of the <a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, evidencing the same debt, and entitled to the same benefits under this <a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE899RMogr7FEzjyI8uUWB2p0omPG"></a>Indenture, as the <a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Notes or <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive Notes
                surrendered upon such registration of transfer or exchange.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(5)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Neither the <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu6GF7DKhNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBHNkNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4BCBIFbNjo1DDvw"></a>Registrar nor the <a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will be required:</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(A)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">to issue, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7FN40ryxihovn"></a>to <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCAAD75nk3wjw78z65qpw3v"></a>register the transfer of or to exchange any <a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes during a period
                beginning at the opening of business <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3676GJCGtcyH"></a>15&#160;days before the day of any selection of <a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Notes for redemption under Section&#160;3.02
                hereof and ending at the close of business on the day of selection;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(B)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">to register <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBIOBxjwAsp81o1C12FLJ5FEzy5C"></a>the transfer of or to exchange any <a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC59Dpo13nqA2ko60noyAIC8E"></a>Note selected for
                redemption in whole or in part, except <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAIG420sfgirskvAHEAIL4vu6Bx9LO"></a>the unredeemed portion of any <a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note being redeemed in part; or</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(C)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">to register the transfer of
                or to exchange a <a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBLNcT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBLOdT6xx"></a>Note between a record date and <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9A70vhgly9CdSA2124K"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9AG9vhJN5xwxzF"></a>the next succeeding <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JF89Gys4wvwyECu4Hy0G7p6B"></a>interest payment date.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(6)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Prior to due presentment for
                the registration of a transfer of any <a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note, the <a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee, any <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9IOR7iq6"></a>Agent and the <a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may deem and treat the <a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person in whose name any <a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is registered as the absolute owner of such <a name="z_9kMHz1J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHz1J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note for the purpose of receiving payment of principal of and interest on such <a name="z_9kMHz2K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHz2K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBJGkkoht6to04D7t4"></a>Notes and for all other purposes, and none of <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCAB9cZ799wis38vsH"></a>the <a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee, any <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9IOR7iq6"></a>Agent or the <a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall be affected by notice
                to the contrary.</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(9)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee shall have no obligation or duty to monitor, determine or inquire as to
                compliance with any <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECCD77pm5yly3z7AE5r8J3vAQH7J"></a>restrictions on transfer imposed under this <a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture or under applicable
                law <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFJHpk9GAsp81o1C1oxM"></a>with respect to any transfer of any interest in any <a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes (including any transfers between or among <a name="z_9kR3WTr267AJKP6p04z1utIrOxH9tu810KQ"></a>Depositary Participants or beneficial owners <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCEC0qlu6yxy0GH73wxMqYD4r2"></a>of interests in any <a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note) other than
                to require delivery of such certificates and other documentation or evidence as are expressly required by, and to do so if and when expressly required <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9FFyqwzp1"></a>by the terms of, this <a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture, and to examine the same to determine substantial compliance as to form with the express requirements hereof.&#160; Neither <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECDBeb9BByku5AxuJ"></a>the <a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee nor any <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9IOR7iq6"></a>Agent shall have any responsibility for any actions taken or not taken by the <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary.</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318521"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;2.07</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Replacement </font><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notes</font>.</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If any mutilated <a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is surrendered to the <a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee or <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDJIQHy0poD1rv27t"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDNNRFwynmBJ9tl0FI1w06404swED1"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and the <a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee receives evidence to its satisfaction of the destruction, loss or theft
                of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFIClk9kV8z04q"></a>any <a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note, the <a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8AJ0x8Byfpt05remKMM9vCOJI"></a>issue, and the <a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee,
                upon receipt of an <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9HOSLBzls84ohz84Alk6u9"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39A9IGJLBzls84ohz84Alk6u9"></a>Authentication Order, will authenticate, a replacement <a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If required by the <a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee or the <a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company,




                an indemnity bond must be supplied by the <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder that is sufficient in the judgment of the <a name="z_9kMN9K6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN9K6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN9K6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMN9K6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee and the <a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBKPA41558zjzH6sOTAC10PWG2"></a>to protect the
                <a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, the <a name="z_9kMNAL6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNAL6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNAL6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNAL6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee, any <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3AB9IOR7iq6"></a>Agent and any authenticating agent from any loss that any of them may suffer if a <a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is replaced.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may charge for its expenses in replacing a <a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Every replacement <a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is an additional obligation of the <a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and will be entitled to all of the benefits of this <a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture equally and proportionately with all other <a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes duly issued
                hereunder.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318522"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;2.08</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Outstanding </font><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notes</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes outstanding at any time are all the <a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes authenticated by the <a name="z_9kMNBM6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNBM6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNBM6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNBM6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee except for those canceled by it, those delivered to it for cancellation, those reductions in the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEMJnDJypcn"></a>interest in a <a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note effected by the <a name="z_9kMNCN6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNCN6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNCN6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNCN6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee in accordance with the provisions hereof, and those described in this Section&#160;2.08 as not outstanding.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Except as set forth in Section&#160;2.09 hereof, a <a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note does not cease to be outstanding because <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEGD12pmNAmqxyo0513"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                or an <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBFLT7jnuvlx2"></a>Affiliate of the <a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company holds the <a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note; however, <a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6CCUQ3uusfnxwzEH0rq27trD"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6DDUQ3uu5AAtki4"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6DKbQ3uuD4uypjn76rqx4wusE"></a>Notes held by <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDDFD12pRgwv3pqoyN"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or a <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary of the <a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                shall not be deemed to be outstanding for purposes of Section&#160;3.07(a) hereof.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If a <a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is replaced pursuant to Section&#160;2.07 hereof, it ceases to be outstanding unless the <a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee receives proof satisfactory to it that the replaced <a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is held by a
                protected purchaser and shall be deemed cancelled for all purposes.</font></div>

            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the principal amount of any <a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is considered paid under Section&#160;4.01 hereof, it ceases to be outstanding, shall be deemed cancelled and interest on it ceases to accrue.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent (other than <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE78AMHy0poD1Wl108uvt3S"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, a <a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9GI02pmNAmqxyo0513qzO"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or an <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBFLT7jnuvlx2"></a>Affiliate of any
                thereof) holds, on a redemption date or maturity date, money sufficient to pay <a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes payable on that date, then on and after that date such <a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes will be deemed to be no longer outstanding, shall be deemed cancelled, and will cease to accrue interest.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318523"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;2.09</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Treasury </font><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notes</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">In determining whether the <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders of the required <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCLIzqQU7yy"></a>principal
              amount of <a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes have concurred in any direction, waiver or consent, <a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8FFWS5ww7CCvmk6"></a>Notes owned by the <a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor, or by any <a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person directly or indirectly controlling or controlled by or under direct <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9IL12xuqm1yk01x87AC13FLQMHQ"></a>or indirect common control with the <a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor, will be considered as though not outstanding, except that for the purposes of determining whether the <a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee will be protected in relying on any such direction, waiver or consent, only
              <a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes that a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9DKjMu63273nrvZVtxvs8"></a>Responsible <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a>Officer of the <a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee has written notice of being so owned will be so disregarded.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318524"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;2.10</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Temporary </font><a name="z_9kMH19P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH19P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notes</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Until certificates representing <a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes are ready for delivery, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFOKPHy0poDDq3JD32z27r15CH3"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                may prepare and the <a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee, upon receipt of an <a name="z_9kMML5YVt39A9IGJLBzls84ohz84Alk6u9"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9HOSLBzls84ohz84Alk6u9"></a>Authentication Order, will authenticate temporary <a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Temporary <a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes will be substantially in the form of certificated <a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes but may have variations that the <a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company considers appropriate for temporary <a name="z_9kMH25K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH25K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and as may be reasonably acceptable to the <a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Without unreasonable delay, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE77CPHy0poDN8y27E43038s26DI4"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will prepare and the <a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee will authenticate definitive Notes in exchange for temporary <a name="z_9kMH26L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH26L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders of temporary <a name="z_9kMH27M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH27M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes
              will be entitled to all of the benefits of this <a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                at any time may deliver <a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8FLcS5wwC9"></a>Notes to the <a name="z_9kMOAK6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOAK6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOAK6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOAK6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee for cancellation.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBHFdRjUPlq3FFxyzw0dVBKA9"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu6GF7DKhNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBHNkNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBIFbNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAGHeKglyAAst89lP5E43"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDE6himtykxyx6fO4D32"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8BD2qglyAAstjN3C21"></a>Registrar and <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent will forward to the <a name="z_9kMOBL6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOBL6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOBL6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOBL6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee any <a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes surrendered to them <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9JHoo1olAFwmr4GGy1A6CD6CP74NG"></a>for registration of transfer, exchange or payment.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMOCM6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOCM6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOCM6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOCM6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee and no <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one else will cancel all <a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes surrendered for registration of transfer, exchange, payment, replacement or cancellation and will dispose of canceled <a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes




                (subject to the record retention requirements of the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9JIOSxihovnIB1"></a>Exchange Act) in accordance with its procedures for the disposition of canceled securities.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Certification of the disposition of all canceled
                <a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes will be delivered to the <a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company upon written request therefor.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                may not issue new <a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to replace <a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes that it has paid or that have been
                delivered to the <a name="z_9kMODN6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMODN6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMODN6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMODN6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee for cancellation.</font></div>

              <div style="text-align: center;" class="BRPFPageNumberArea"><font style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 8pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal;">42</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;2.12</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Defaulted Interest</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7DIvslopzCtvB"></a>the




                <a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company defaults in a payment of interest on the <a name="z_9kMH36K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH36K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, it will pay the
                defaulted interest in any lawful manner plus, to the extent lawful, interest payable on the defaulted interest, to the <a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Persons who are <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders on a subsequent special record date, in each case at the rate provided in the <a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and in Section&#160;4.01 hereof.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDGDOHy0poDN8y259GByFUE0"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will notify the <a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee in writing of the amount of defaulted interest proposed to be paid on each <a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note and the date of the proposed
                payment.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                will fix or cause to be fixed each such special record date and payment date; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font> that no such special record date may be less than <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455DD89mawF"></a>10&#160;days prior to the related payment date for such defaulted interest.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">At least <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3676GJCGtcyH"></a>15&#160;days




                before the special record date, the <a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company (or, upon the written request of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE78BNHy0poDK4q"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI27N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI27N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI27N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI27N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI27N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI27N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI27N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company,




                the <a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee in the name and at the expense of the <a name="z_9kMI28O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI28O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI28O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI28O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI28O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI28O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI28O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company) will mail or transmit, or cause to be mailed or transmitted, to <a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders a notice that states the special record date, the related payment date and the
                amount of such interest to be paid.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318527"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;2.13</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">CUSIP Numbers</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI29P7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI29P7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI29P7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI29P7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI29P7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI29P7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI29P7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                in issuing the <a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes may use &#8220;CUSIP&#8221; numbers (if then generally in use), and, if so, the <a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMP7G6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee shall use &#8220;CUSIP&#8221; numbers in notices of redemption as a convenience to <a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders;




                <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font> that any such notice may state that no representation is made as to the correctness of such numbers either as printed on the <a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or as contained in any notice of a redemption and that reliance may be placed only on the other identification numbers printed on the <a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes<a name="z_9kR3WTr5DA49J"></a>, and any such redemption shall not be affected by any defect in or omission of such numbers.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE77DQHy0poDN8y27EEACKHNQHOJ6"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI2AQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI2AQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI2AQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI2AQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI2AQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI2AQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI2AQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will promptly notify the <a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee in writing of any change in the &#8220;CUSIP&#8221; numbers.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: center; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">ARTICLE&#160;3.<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><br>
              </font><a name="z_Toc227318528"></a>REDEMPTION AND PREPAYMENT</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318529"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;3.01</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notices to </font><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Trustee</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the <a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                elects to redeem <a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBEJAxjr393z5sr93qr1DLFBHJOO"></a>pursuant to the optional redemption provisions of Section&#160;3.07 hereof, it must
                furnish to the <a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee, at least <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3676DGEDocyH"></a>30&#160;days
                but not more than <a name="z_9kR3WTr1454AKMEmawF"></a>60&#160;days before a redemption date, an <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAFIdKimkhxCYF1H9wxvo6B"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate setting forth:</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the clause of this <a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture pursuant to which the redemption shall occur;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the redemption date;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCLIzqQU7yy"></a>principal amount of <a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to be redeemed; and</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the redemption price.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318530"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;3.02</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Selection of </font><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notes to </font><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JEFKHP6TOhiktumxComL4vu6Bx"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Be Redeemed or Purchased</font>.</font></div>

            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If less than all of the <a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6CLdQ3uu5tgJS3tn2z05"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8DLeS5wwtty1C"></a>Notes are to be redeemed or purchased in an offer to purchase at any time,
                the <a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8FNeS5wwF6w0rl34yzr7Avx9M"></a>Notes will be selected for redemption or purchase on a <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">pro rata</font> basis (or, in <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9BC4vhOT6xn234FI5p"></a>the case of <a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes issued in global form
                pursuant to Article&#160;2 hereof, by lot or otherwise <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDELI91zzhq63xpiiuy"></a>in accordance with applicable procedures of <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3456DHPxx"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AACFSxx"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AACGTxx"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABACHUxx"></a>DTC) unless otherwise required by law or applicable stock exchange or depositary requirements.</font></div>
