            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">At the <a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s




                request, the <a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee will give the notice of redemption in the <a name="z_9kMI37M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI37M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI37M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI37M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI37M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI37M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI37M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s name and at its expense; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>, that <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDJLTHy0poD8lx1ox2DA78vBNOI4"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has delivered to the <a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee, at least <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455EJGHrawF"></a>45&#160;days prior to the redemption date (unless a shorter period
                shall be acceptable <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECDFib9BBykhr"></a>to the <a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee),
                an <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAFIdKimkhxCYF1H9wxvo6B"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate requesting that the <a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee give such notice and setting forth the information to be stated in such notice as provided in the preceding paragraph.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">In connection with any redemption of the <a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes (including with the net cash proceeds of an <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9JHNL811IoQoo1632"></a>Equity Offering), any such redemption may, at the <a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s discretion, be subject to <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more conditions precedent, including, but not limited to, completion of a sale of common stock or other corporate
                transaction (including any related <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9JHNL811IoQoo1632"></a>Equity Offering).&#160; In addition, if such redemption or notice is subject to satisfaction of <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more conditions
                precedent, such notice shall state that, in the <a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s discretion, the redemption date may be delayed until such time as any or all such conditions shall be
                satisfied, or such redemption may not occur and such notice may be rescinded in the event that any or all such conditions shall not have been satisfied by the redemption date, or by the redemption date so delayed.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318532"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;3.04</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Effect of Notice of Redemption</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">Once notice of redemption is sent in accordance with Section&#160;3.03 hereof, <a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes called for redemption without condition <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFKIqcep0ro2C05GyllxLEBD"></a>will become irrevocably due and payable on the redemption date at the redemption price.</div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318533"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;3.05</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Deposit of </font><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JFADHgMfgq2A4067ComL4vu6BjrH3"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Redemption




                  or Purchase </font><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED7CKgXxjg"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Price</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kR3WTr14569CZQnCNB0wtzEaD5"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">One
                <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABADCMMAzvsyDZC4"></a>Business Day prior to the redemption or <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt467CKPha9sjiuzLCz4"></a>purchase date, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE77ANHy0poDN8y2vp2DHCETJHHIJ"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will deposit with the <a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4BCBLIdcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBLKfcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBLLgcACCzl"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBLMhcACCzl"></a>Trustee
                or with the <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent money sufficient to pay the redemption or purchase price of and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBHJpZcsBzjozB3235LCzs1QSI54"></a>accrued




                interest, if any, on all <a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to be redeemed or purchased on that date.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEGI628zlUL1A0z"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7EFx0ndiqp1Ew25r"></a>or <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9FDbPhSNjo1DDvwxuybT9I87"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent will promptly return to the <a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                any money deposited with <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEGI628zlUL1A0z"></a>the <a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz0I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee




                or the <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent by the <a name="z_9kMI44I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI44I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI44I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI44I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI44I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI44I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI44I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in excess of the amounts necessary to pay the <a name="z_9kR3WTr7HD8BFeKdeo082y45AmkJ2ts49hpF1y"></a>redemption or purchase price of, and <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBHJpZcsBzjozB3235LCzs1QSI54"></a>accrued interest, if any, on all <a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to <a name="z_9kR3WTr7HCDIFN4RMfgirskvAmkJ2ts49v"></a>be redeemed or purchased.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the <a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                complies with the provisions of the preceding paragraph, on and after the redemption or <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt467CKPha9sjiuzLCz4"></a>purchase date, interest will cease to accrue on the <a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAAE328zlu58E628D"></a>Notes or the portions of <a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes called for redemption or purchase.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If a <a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is redeemed or purchased on or after an interest record date but <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBHG4xjuvqnw1mr2E6568OM4ER8A"></a>on or prior to the related interest payment date, then any accrued and
                unpaid interest shall be paid to the <a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person in whose name such <a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note was
                registered at the close of business on such record date.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If any <a name="z_9kMH7EO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH7EO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note called for redemption or purchase is not so paid upon surrender for redemption or purchase because of the failure of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFPOSHy0poDKBvw799J"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company to comply with the preceding paragraph, interest shall be paid on the unpaid principal, from the redemption or <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt467CKPha9sjiuzLCz4"></a>purchase date until such principal
                is paid, and to the extent lawful on any interest not paid on such unpaid principal, in each case at the rate provided in the <a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and in Section&#160;4.01 hereof.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8FHYS5wwkRklnwxp"></a><a name="z_Toc227318534"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;3.06</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notes Redeemed or Purchased in Part</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">Upon surrender of a <a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note that is redeemed or purchased in part,
              the <a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will issue and, upon receipt of an <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3AB9HOSLBzls84ohz84Alk6u9"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39A9IGJLBzls84ohz84Alk6u9"></a>Authentication
              Order, the <a name="z_9kMHz1J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz1J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz1J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz1J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will authenticate for the <a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder at the expense of the <a name="z_9kMI48M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI48M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI48M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI48M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI48M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI48M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI48M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company a new <a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note equal in principal
              amount to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCKI642uhiktumxCJGCKN6xw8DzB"></a>the unredeemed or unpurchased portion of the <a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note surrendered.</div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;3.07</font>&#160;&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Optional Redemption</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">At any time prior to <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3676DLQG4ytDIIJS"></a>April&#160;1, 2028, the <a name="z_9kMI49N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI49N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI49N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI49N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI49N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI49N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI49N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may on any <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more occasions redeem up to <a name="z_9kR3WTr13458EGG"></a>35% <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDFC0qwzlt72st1utuqx98yv9E"></a>of the original aggregate principal amount of <a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes issued under this <a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture (calculated after giving effect to any issuance of <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABABHS4ek12y4rqecF66"></a>Additional Notes), upon not less than 30 nor
                more than <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3676CMOGocyH"></a>60&#160;days&#8217; notice, at a redemption price equal to <a name="z_9kR3WTr13458889FOQO"></a>106.875% of the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCLG2xjQV8zz"></a>principal amount of the <a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes redeemed, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">plus</font> accrued and unpaid interest, if any, to the
                redemption date (<a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDGGxs4wvwyEB6"></a>subject to the rights of <a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes on the relevant
                record date to receive interest on the relevant interest payment date), with an amount of cash no greater than the net cash proceeds of all <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9JHNL811IoQoo1632"></a>Equity Offerings by the <a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company since the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABADGXR8ByI9w1"></a>Issue Date; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font> that:</font></div>
            <div><br>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">at least <a name="z_9kR3WTr13458HMJ"></a>65% <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDFC0qwzlt72st1utuqx98yv9E"></a>of <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAKM7vhbelxwmjx2"></a>the original aggregate principal amount of <a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes issued <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7GPZMogr7FEzn76vE7w76hkNEE"></a>under this <a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture (excluding <a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes held by <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDMLwy9jgwv3pqoy7v6"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries)

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318537"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;3.09</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Offer to Purchase by </font><a name="z_9kMHG5YV0B77679KG2ztlew51781SfAs9OwqM8z"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Application of </font><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AADDQSxfwBjd9vmpp4"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABADERSxfwBjd9vmpp4"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Excess Proceeds</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">In the event that, pursuant to Section&#160;4.10
                hereof, the <a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company is required to commence an <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JF9FGzqiiv"></a>offer <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7DEQMxnhwBEB8FI1sr38ejMDD"></a>to all <a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders to purchase <a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes (an &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1788DELH6tvkMmrVRpp2"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCHEKJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Asset Sale Offer</font>&#8221;), it will follow the procedures specified below.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AAFGNJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAFHOJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a>Asset Sale Offer shall be made to all <a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and all holders of
                other <a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness that is <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">pari passu</font> with the <a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes containing provisions similar to those set forth in this <a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture with respect to offers to purchase, prepay or redeem with the
                proceeds of sales <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8HO4qdrAxzEpZrLUJ68"></a>of assets.&#160; <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8HJ4vhdozyrtskvwyEG3qzaaPCE"></a>The <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AAFGNJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAFHOJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a>Asset
                Sale Offer will remain open for a period of at least <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455DIEAKMAzvsyDZC4N"></a>20 <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABADCMMAzvsyDZC4"></a>Business Days following its commencement and not more than <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455EFBBKMAzvsyDZC4N"></a>30 <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABADCMMAzvsyDZC4"></a>Business Days, except to the extent that a longer period is required by applicable law (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1786GIYIggtfNw1zv"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCJHZKiivhPy31x"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Offer Period</font>&#8221;).&#160; No later than <a name="z_9kR3WTr1456BF5vusgEPD2yv1GcF7Q"></a>three <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABADCMMAzvsyDZC4"></a>Business Days after the termination of the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A8IKaKiivhPy31x"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB8ILbKiivhPy31x"></a>Offer Period (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787FKdY7qhgsxJAx2"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCJNga9sjiuzLCz4"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Purchase Date</font>&#8221;), the <a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will apply all <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABADERSxfwBjd9vmpp4"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AADDQSxfwBjd9vmpp4"></a>Excess Proceeds (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787DBVIggtQG1AAA"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCJGYKiivSI3CCC"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt;                 such other <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">pari passu </font><a name="z_9kMOAK6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness surrendered, if applicable) or, if less than the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9FDXKiivSI3CCC"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9FEYKiivSI3CCC"></a>Offer Amount has been tendered, all <a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBJFjkoq71ny"></a>Notes




                and other <a name="z_9kMOBL6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness tendered in response to the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AAFGNJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAFHOJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a>Asset Sale Offer.&#160; Payment for any <a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes so purchased will be made in the same manner as interest payments are made.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9HLea9sjiuzLCz4"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9HMfa9sjiuzLCz4"></a>Purchase Date is on or after an interest record date and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCFByyz4sglw9037t450x6Bw1COG"></a>on or before the related interest payment date, any accrued and unpaid interest, if
                any, will be paid to the <a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person in whose name a <a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is registered at the close
                of business on such record date, and no additional interest will be payable to <a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders who tender <a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes pursuant to the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AAFGNJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAFHOJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a>Asset Sale Offer.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Upon <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAJL6xjfq10tvumxy0GI5s1ccREG"></a>the commencement <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCD8xouxjDMBy0"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6FM2obp8vxCnXpJSH46"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7CJ3ouyspx1nHQF24"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC77C1oDHz5A61cRpp2DEbXM9B"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBLK0ofbaiHNCz1"></a>of <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7DFYIggtvw6284q"></a>an <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AAFGNJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAFHOJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a>Asset
                Sale Offer, the <a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will send, by <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt8D967Eukx8B"></a>first-class mail or otherwise transmit, a notice to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCKGdb9BBykhrvnlks54ADz"></a>the




                <a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and each of the <a name="z_9kMM7J6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders,
                with a copy to the <a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee.&#160; The notice will contain all instructions and
                materials necessary to enable such <a name="z_9kMM8K6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders to tender <a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes pursuant to the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt39AAFGNJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAFHOJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a>Asset Sale Offer.&#160; The notice, which will govern the terms <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEFAzqwzlFOD02"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AAFGNJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAFHOJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a>Asset Sale Offer, will state:</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">that the <a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAFGNJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAFHOJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a>Asset Sale Offer is being made pursuant to this <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAEHgNeu1x3JKR2uyear7EAG"></a>Section&#160;3.09 and Section&#160;4.10 hereof and the
                length <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9EL5qw0urz3pJSH46"></a>of time the <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAFGNJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAFHOJ8vxmOotXTrr4"></a>Asset Sale Offer will remain open;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9FDXKiivSI3CCC"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9FEYKiivSI3CCC"></a>Offer Amount, the purchase price and the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9HLea9sjiuzLCz4"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9HMfa9sjiuzLCz4"></a>Purchase Date;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">that any <a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note not tendered or accepted for payment will continue to accrue interest;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">that, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7EJvsxlktxw2H2q4y8L24K"></a>unless the <a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company defaults in making such payment, any <a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note accepted for payment <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAHH52kk9XMBy0"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCIF42kkLLAxz"></a>pursuant to the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBGHOK9wynPpuYUss5"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBGIPK9wynPpuYUss5"></a>Asset Sale Offer will cease to accrue interest after the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9HLea9sjiuzLCz4"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9HMfa9sjiuzLCz4"></a>Purchase Date;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(5)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">that <a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders electing to have a <a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note purchased <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEKH64mmNNCz1"></a>pursuant <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9IF02lccm"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCAA932mnz4C70px2ku"></a>to an <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBGHOK9wynPpuYUss5"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBGIPK9wynPpuYUss5"></a>Asset Sale Offer may elect to have <a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes purchased in denominations of <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3566DMJCBC"></a>$2,000 <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCFAx090typr888637x5G4"></a>or an <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBKEpq2uiwrmz999748y6H5"></a>integral multiple of <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3566DNJBBC"></a>$1,000 in excess thereof;</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(6)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">that <a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders electing to have <a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes purchased <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCJJ74mmBZOD02"></a>pursuant to any <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBGHOK9wynPpuYUss5"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBGIPK9wynPpuYUss5"></a>Asset Sale Offer will be required to surrender the <a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note, with the
                form entitled &#8220;<a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9CBYU60w23wQU5vp4KIeW3vBzvU"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3DFDD8XU60w23wQU5vp4KIeW3vBzvU"></a>Option of Holder to Elect Purchase&#8221; attached to the <a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes completed, or transfer by book-entry transfer, to the <a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, a <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary, if
                appointed by <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAJPAxjFK13srGICzYT9I87"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, or a <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent at
                the address specified in the notice at least <a name="z_9kR3WTr1456BH7vusggdzI"></a>three&#160;days before the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9HLea9sjiuzLCz4"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9HMfa9sjiuzLCz4"></a>Purchase Date;</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(7)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">that <a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders will be entitled to withdraw their election if the <a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, the <a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEHBy28zlUL1A0zNIt1H55"></a>or the <a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent, as the case may be, receives, not later than the expiration of the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A8IKaKiivhPy31x"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB8ILbKiivhPy31x"></a>Offer Period, an electronic transmission or letter setting forth the name <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBCG9xjKP0qkzF6s"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7AG2ot9uiUW90"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7CH1ouxnzfW90"></a>the principal amount of the <a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note
                the <a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder delivered for purchase and a statement that such <a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder is withdrawing his election to have such <a name="z_9kMI27N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI27N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note purchased;</font></div>

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(8)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">that, if the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCLK1qQU7yy"></a>aggregate principal amount of <a name="z_9kMI28O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI28O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDFIskoq71ny"></a>and other <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">pari passu</font>&#160;<a name="z_9kMOCM6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness surrendered by holders thereof exceeds the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9FDXKiivSI3CCC"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9FEYKiivSI3CCC"></a>Offer Amount, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCJDbZ799wiy2o"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCADC6zptmgpu52zEI3rTLuz89GHKHk"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCADD7zptlbnqis85rOJsx67EFIFinQ"></a>the <a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will select the <a name="z_9kMI29P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI29P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and the applicable agent will select <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5EGQKmedtxisu0FC8"></a>such other <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">pari passu</font>&#160;<a name="z_9kMODN6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness to be purchased on a <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">pro rata</font> basis based on the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCLIzqQU7yy"></a>principal




                amount of <a name="z_9kMI2AQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI2AQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes (or, in <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9BG8vhOT6xx2y"></a>the case of <a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5CFrqmehmvw3474p0DC"></a>Notes issued in global form, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCJG7zxxfo41vnggsw"></a>in accordance with the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9JEDJGmm2ztleequzDDzqs9O9B"></a>applicable procedures <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9AAyqGzz7pt"></a>of <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3456DHPxx"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt39AACFSxx"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt39AACGTxx"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABACHUxx"></a>DTC) and such other <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">pari passu</font>&#160;<a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness tendered or required to be prepaid or redeemed <a name="OLE_LINK1"></a><a name="OLE_LINK2"></a>(with such
                adjustments as may be deemed appropriate by the <a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company so that only <a name="z_9kMI33I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI33I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes in

            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318539"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.01</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Payment of </font><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notes</font>.</font></div>
            <div><br>
            </div>
            <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company




                will pay or cause to be paid <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCMJ4xjs60xso2vs"></a>the principal of, premium on, if any, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDEFys4wvwyEB6C7t"></a>and interest on, the <a name="z_9kMI48M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI48M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes on the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3676GORMAzvsyDZC4"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABADCMMAzvsyDZC4"></a>Business Day prior to the dates and in the manner provided in the <a name="z_9kMI49N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI49N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEADBYXxuplzsp5C2y3CH60"></a>Principal, premium, if any, and interest will be considered paid on the date due if the <a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent, if other than <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDFD12pRgwv3pqoyN"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or a <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary thereof,
                holds as of 10:00 a.m. <a name="z_9kR3WTr5FC47GT3o8vu4hXxu"></a>Eastern Time on the due date money deposited by the <a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in immediately available funds and designated for and sufficient to
                pay all <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCMIz3xuplzsp5C2y3CH60"></a>principal, premium, if any, and interest, if any, then due.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will pay interest (including post-petition interest in any proceeding under any <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9IHL2lw1CBBz5pM4"></a>Bankruptcy Law) on overdue principal at a rate that is <a name="z_9kR3WTr13457EF"></a>1% higher than the then applicable interest rate on the <a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to the extent lawful; it will pay interest (including
                      post-petition interest in any proceeding under any <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9IHL2lw1CBBz5pM4"></a>Bankruptcy Law) on overdue installments of interest (without regard to any applicable grace period), at the same rate to the extent
                      lawful.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will maintain in the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4DHLE126znwvUKs0o1L3y"></a>Borough of Manhattan, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCLL7xjFE2JFx"></a>the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED6EMSBzGCuUO4zmC9"></a>City




                      of New York, an office or agency (which may be an <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9JEEGC0qimkh"></a>office of the <a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or an <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JEENMpcimtukw1"></a>affiliate of the <a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu6GF7DKhNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBHNkNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBIFbNjo1DDvw"></a>Registrar or co-<a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt467CLHaMin0CCuv"></a>registrar)




                      <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCACE9yhstw0mTYB22"></a>where <a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes may be surrendered for <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEGF32us5w32nmt0s"></a>registration of transfer or for
                      exchange and where notices and demands to or upon the <a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in respect <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9DK5qwzlSXA11yuy5A0C"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMI4CQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI4CQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and this <a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture may be served.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will give prompt
                      written notice to the <a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee of the location, and any change in the
                      location, of such office or agency.&#160; If at any time the <a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company fails to maintain any such required office or agency or fails to furnish the <a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee with the address thereof, such presentations, surrenders,
                      notices and demands may be made or served at the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9BCOH3536tw1ckIKKrYw0yv8AGJ"></a>Corporate Trust Office of the Trustee.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may also from time to time designate <a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more other offices or agencies <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECEGB0juvy2oVaD44"></a>where the <a name="z_9kMI54H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI54H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes may be presented or surrendered for any or all such purposes and may from time to time rescind such designations; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>, that no such designation or rescission will in any manner
                      relieve the <a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company of its obligation to maintain an office or agency in the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED6FJNG3481pyxWMu2q3N50"></a>Borough of Manhattan, <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCLL7xjFE2JFx"></a>the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt5ED6EMSBzGCuUO4zmC9"></a>City of New York for such purposes.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will give prompt
                      written notice to the <a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee of any such designation or rescission
                      and of any change in the location of any such other office or agency.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318541"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.03</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Reports</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Whether or not required by the rules and
                      regulations of the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAEDdxi"></a>SEC, so long as any <a name="z_9kMI55I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI55I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes are outstanding, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE779MHy0poDN8y2x7KE6CCEMNH3"></a>the




                      <a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will furnish to the <a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDBGKA45zlMR2sm1G"></a>to the <a name="z_9kMNBM6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes




                      (or file with the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAEDdxi"></a>SEC for public availability), within the time periods specified in the <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAEDdxi"></a>SEC&#8217;s rules and regulations:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">all <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455AH45qo8wv3B"></a>quarterly and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3676FLoky6um"></a>annual reports that would be required to be filed with the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAEDdxi"></a>SEC on Forms 10-Q and 10-K if the <a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company were required to file such reports, including a &#8220;Management&#8217;s Discussion and Analysis of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JEDLFOEtmnqmlpSQ8yuBC8E126lhF"></a>Financial




                      Condition and Results of Operations&#8221; and, with respect to the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3676FLoky6um"></a>annual information only, a report thereon by the <a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s certified
                      independent accountants; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">all current reports
                      that would be required to be filed with the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAEDdxi"></a>SEC on Form 8-K if the <a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company were required to file such reports.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">All such reports will be prepared in all material respects in accordance with all of the rules and regulations applicable to such reports.&#160;
                    In addition, the <a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will file a copy of each of the reports referred to in clauses (1) and (2) above with the <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAEDdxi"></a>SEC for public
                    availability within the time periods specified in the rules and regulations applicable to such reports (unless the <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAEDdxi"></a>SEC will not accept such a filing) and will post the reports on its website within
                    those time periods.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will comply with &#167;314(a) of the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9HNk2k"></a>TIA if the <a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture has been qualified under the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9HNk2k"></a>TIA.</div>

                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">If the <a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company is no longer subject to the periodic reporting requirements of
                    the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3AB9JIOSxihovnIB1"></a>Exchange Act for any reason, the <a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will nevertheless continue filing the reports specified in the
                    preceding paragraphs with the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBFEeyj"></a>SEC within the time periods specified above unless the <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBFEeyj"></a>SEC will not accept such a filing.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will not take any action for the purpose of causing the <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBFEeyj"></a>SEC not to accept any such filings.&#160; If, notwithstanding the foregoing, the <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBFEeyj"></a>SEC will not accept the <a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s filings for any reason<a name="z_9kR3WTr5DA4AB"></a>, the <a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will post the reports referred to in the preceding paragraphs on its website within the time periods that would apply if the <a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company were required to file those reports with the <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBFEeyj"></a>SEC.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFOINHy0poD8lx1o49y4z6Bwt4TV"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has designated any of its <a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries as <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAFLmY2uwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Unrestricted Subsidiaries, then the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3677CJ67sqAyx5D"></a>quarterly and <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3676FLoky6um"></a>annual financial information required by paragraph
                      (a) of this Section&#160;4.03 will include a reasonably detailed presentation, either on the face of the financial statements or in the footnotes thereto, and in &#8220;Management&#8217;s Discussion and Analysis of <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9JEDLFOEtmnqmlpSQ8yuBC8E126lhF"></a>Financial Condition and Results of Operations,&#8221; of the <a name="z_9kR3WTr7HCBJDMCrklokjnQO6ws9A6Cz04jfDUO"></a>financial condition and results of operations <a name="z_9kMON5YVt9IDBGFOHy0poD1rvr8J"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries separate from the
                      financial condition and results of operations <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9EI2qwzlZd7z1HH7t58tiuA9H34"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBGMnZ3vxDD3p14peq65Dz0y8X"></a>Unrestricted Subsidiaries of the <a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">For so long as any <a name="z_9kMI57K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI57K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes remain outstanding, if at any time they are not required to file with the <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBFEeyj"></a>SEC the reports required by paragraphs
                      (a) and (b) of this Section&#160;4.03, <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDBGGPHy0poD1rv27t"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and the <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors
                      will furnish to the <a name="z_9kMNCN6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders and to securities analysts and prospective investors, upon their request, the information required to be delivered pursuant to <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAECbc3o5JNU"></a>Rule&#160;144A(d)(4)

                      of its covenants hereunder (as to which the <a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee is entitled <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBKQB43upA443sBJ8C90LPF23"></a>to rely exclusively on an <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAFIdKimkhxCYF1H9wxvo6B"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate).</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMJ10I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ10I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ10I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ10I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ10I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ10I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ10I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and each <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor (to the extent that such <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor is so required under <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBIK7xjW5nO2lq2vpy3EB8"></a>the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9HNk2k"></a>TIA) shall deliver to the <a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, within <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3676GNOJocyH"></a>90&#160;days after the end of <a name="z_9kR3WTr14567BqZYgkm0veoD7ky"></a>each fiscal year, an <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAFIdKimkhxCYF1H9wxvo6B"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate stating that a review of the activities <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDDF9ry9jgwv3pqoy7v6"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries during the preceding <a name="z_9kR3WTr1454ENuiwrak93gu"></a>fiscal year has been made under the supervision of the
                      signing <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBFHdLjnliy"></a>Officers with a view to determining whether the <a name="z_9kMJ12K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ12K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ12K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ12K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ12K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ12K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ12K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has kept, observed,
                      performed and fulfilled its obligations under this <a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture, and further stating, as to each such <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBFHdLjnliy"></a>Officer signing such certificate, that to the best of his or her knowledge the <a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has kept, observed,
                      performed and fulfilled each and every covenant contained in this <a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture and is not in default in the performance or observance of any of the terms, provisions and
                      conditions of this <a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture (or, if <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt9IDCLPsA9ifv77"></a>a <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAHLT8heu66"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAHNWQxq68vLFol1DD"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt39AAIFNQxq68vLFol1DD"></a>Event of Default has occurred, describing all such <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAHLT8heu66"></a>Defaults or <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAHNWQxq68vLFol1DD"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AAIFNQxq68vLFol1DD"></a>Events of Default of which he or she may have knowledge and what action the <a name="z_9kMJ14M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ14M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ14M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ14M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ14M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ14M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ14M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company is taking or proposes to take with respect thereto) and that to the best of his or her knowledge no event has occurred and remains in existence by reason of which payments on account of
                      <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCMJ4xjs60xso2vs"></a>the principal of, premium on, if any, or interest on the <a name="z_9kMI58L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI58L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes is prohibited or if such event has occurred, a
                      description of the event and what action the <a name="z_9kMJ15N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ15N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ15N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ15N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ15N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ15N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ15N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company is taking or proposes to take with respect thereto.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">So long as not contrary to the then
                      current recommendations of the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt68668FPDouzleqZUBI9ANO957WQCSK"></a>American Institute of Certified Public Accountants, the year-end financial statements delivered pursuant to Section&#160;4.03 above shall be
                      accompanied by a written statement of the <a name="z_9kMJ16O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ16O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ16O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ16O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ16O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ16O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ16O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s independent public accountants (who shall be a firm of established national reputation) that in making
                      the examination necessary for certification of such financial statements, nothing has come to their attention that would lead them to believe that the <a name="z_9kMJ17P7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ17P7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ17P7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ17P7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ17P7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ17P7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ17P7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has violated any
                      provisions of Article&#160;4 or Article&#160;5 hereof or, if any such violation has occurred, specifying the nature and period of existence thereof, it being understood that such accountants shall not be liable directly or indirectly <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFIDmk9mNwB95"></a>to any <a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person for any failure to obtain knowledge of any such violation.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">So long as any of the <a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes are outstanding, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFPQUHy0poDN8y2vpy3EB8OMNH3"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ18Q7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ18Q7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ18Q7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ18Q7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ18Q7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ18Q7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ18Q7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will deliver to the <a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee,




                      forthwith upon any <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBFHdLjnliy"></a>Officer becoming aware of any <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAHLT8heu66"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAHNWQxq68vLFol1DD"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AAIFNQxq68vLFol1DD"></a>Event of Default, an <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAFIdKimkhxCYF1H9wxvo6B"></a>Officers&#8217; Certificate specifying such <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAHLT8heu66"></a>Default




                      or <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAHNWQxq68vLFol1DD"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AAIFNQxq68vLFol1DD"></a>Event of Default and what action the <a name="z_9kMJ20H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ20H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ20H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ20H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ20H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ20H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ20H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company is taking or proposes
                      to take with respect thereto.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318543"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.05</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Taxes</font>.</font></div>

                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECGC51rv0q01rv"></a>The <a name="z_9kMJ21I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ21I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ21I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ21I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ21I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ21I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ21I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will pay, and will cause
                    each of its <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries to pay, prior to delinquency, all material taxes, assessments, and governmental levies except such as are contested in good faith and by appropriate proceedings or
                    where the failure to effect such payment is not adverse in any material respect <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBGLB45zlMR2sm1GE28BxejMDD"></a>to <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAC8wobiuyt"></a>the <a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders of the <a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318544"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.06</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Stay, Extension and Usury Laws</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBHEMHy0poD1rvnlks54ADz"></a>The <a name="z_9kMJ22J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ22J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ22J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ22J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ22J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ22J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ22J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and each of the <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors covenants (to the extent that it may lawfully do so) that it will not at any time insist upon, plead, or in any manner whatsoever claim or take the benefit or advantage of, any stay,
                    extension or usury law wherever enacted, now or at any time hereafter in force, that may affect the covenants or the performance of this <a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture; and <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBHEMHy0poD1rvnlks54ADz"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and each of the <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors (to the extent that it may lawfully
                    do so) hereby expressly waives all benefit or advantage of any such law, and covenants that it will not, by resort to any such law, hinder, delay or impede the execution of any power herein granted to the <a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, but will suffer and permit the execution of every such power as
                    though no such law has been enacted.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the payment of any
                      dividend or the consummation of any irrevocable redemption within <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3676CMOGocyH"></a>60&#160;days after the date of declaration of the dividend or giving of the redemption notice, as the case may be, if at the date of
                      declaration or notice, the dividend or redemption payment would have complied with <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDHH8xjs66B64528D"></a>the provisions of this <a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture;</font></div>
