                      will not be considered to be net cash proceeds from an <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9JHNL811IoQoo1632"></a>Equity Offering for purposes of Section&#160;3.07 of this <a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture;</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318546"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.08</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Dividend and Other Payment Restrictions Affecting </font><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Restricted Subsidiaries</font>.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCAEA3zptyoyzpt"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6AEyw3ytowCtqu"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMJ78K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ78K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ78K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ78K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ78K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ78K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ78K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will not, and will not permit <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCLHkk9Bto3EnU2II8u69u"></a>any of its <a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries to, directly or indirectly, create or permit to exist or become effective any consensual encumbrance or restriction on <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAHOBxjdbkvw5MI0nwL"></a>the ability of any <a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary to:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">pay dividends or make
                      any other distributions on its <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBHFN4ox2vohkDxu"></a>Capital Stock to the <a name="z_9kMJ79L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ79L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ79L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ79L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ79L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ79L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ79L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWuAJEDLKolACup4FoV3JJ9v7Av"></a>or any of
                      its <a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries, or with respect to any other interest or participation in, or measured by, its profits, or pay <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFHFpk95vrjiy2nxz5KHMDvBNOI4"></a>any




                      indebtedness owed to the <a name="z_9kMJ7AM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7AM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7AM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7AM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7AM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7AM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7AM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWuAJEDLKolACup4FoV3JJ9v7Av"></a>or any of its <a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries
                      (it being understood that the priority of any preferred stock in receiving dividends or liquidating distributions prior to dividends or liquidating distributions being paid on common stock shall not be deemed a restriction on the
                      ability to make distributions on <a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu4BCBHFN4ox2vohkDxu"></a>Capital Stock);</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">make loans <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9GGy2pcywpsk1HEF9v"></a>or advances <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDKLSFwynmBD7"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC56BNFwynmBI2oOZ0yzwGIHMKK"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCIJ8260njj12o"></a>to the <a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt9IDCKL3ql0B"></a>of its <a name="z_9kMH19P7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries (it being understood that the subordination of loans or
                      advances made to <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCMLnk9oPxDD3p14p"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary to other <a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4BCBJPbNphgw0lvx3I"></a>Indebtedness incurred by <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCMLnk9oPxDD3p14p"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary shall not be deemed a restriction on the ability to make loans or advances); or</font></div>

                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(10)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Liens permitted <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBKK54nemwrzFD1o5G0s7NE0"></a>to be incurred under the provisions of Section&#160;4.12 hereof that limit the right of the debtor to dispose of the assets subject to such <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Liens;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(11)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">provisions limiting the
                      disposition or distribution of assets or property in joint venture agreements, asset sale agreements, sale-leaseback agreements, stock sale agreements and other similar agreements (including agreements entered into in connection with
                      a <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9GLhMuAA0my1mRWG86MH35L"></a>Restricted Investment), which limitation is applicable only to the assets or property that are the subject of such agreements;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(12)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">restrictions on cash or
                      other deposits or net worth imposed by customers under contracts entered into in the ordinary course of business;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(13)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">reciprocal easements
                      entered into in the ordinary course of business; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(14)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">encumbrances or
                      restrictions arising from a <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3AB9IIO8hiv9xkYU56zG8UT81251DC"></a>Deferred Revenue Financing Arrangement entered into subsequent to the <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABADGXR8ByI9w1"></a>Issue Date and provided that at the
                      time of entering into, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFOHMHy0poD9z"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ8DO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8DO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8DO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8DO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8DO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8DO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8DO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in good faith believes that such encumbrance or restriction shall <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCD8wy5sdz1yD1vG6ouus8QF1XcJ"></a>not adversely affect the <a name="z_9kMJ8EP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8EP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8EP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8EP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8EP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8EP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8EP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s ability to make principal and interest payments on the <a name="z_9kMI6BN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI6BN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes in any material respect.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318547"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.09</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Incurrence of </font><a name="z_9kMHz2K7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Indebtedness




                        and Issuance of Preferred Stock</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMJ8FQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8FQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8FQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8FQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8FQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8FQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8FQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will not, and will not permit <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCLHkk9Bto3EnU2II8u69u"></a>any of its <a name="z_9kMH27M7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries to, directly or
                      indirectly, create, incur, issue, assume, guarantee or otherwise become directly or indirectly liable, contingently or otherwise, with respect to (collectively, &#8220;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">incur</font>&#8221;) any <a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness (including <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9AGR3q920xkKGl1"></a>Acquired Debt), and the <a name="z_9kMJ97H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ97H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ97H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ97H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ97H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ97H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ97H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will not issue any <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBHENDz8BwoxsttpepI2z"></a>Disqualified Stock and will not permit <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCLHkk9Bto3EnU2II8u69u"></a>any of its <a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries to issue any shares of preferred stock; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>, that the <a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may incur <a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness




                      (including <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9AGR3q920xkKGl1"></a>Acquired Debt) or issue <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBHENDz8BwoxsttpepI2z"></a>Disqualified Stock, and the <a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAFJhdts0mnlv4s3Cv8H72AQpg80"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries may incur <a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5EFPKmedtxisu0F62xwF8x87kdCLD"></a>Indebtedness (including <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9AGR3q920xkKGl1"></a>Acquired Debt) or issue preferred stock, if the <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABADBPE30hGFkv2qNSI963tykbAJF"></a>Fixed Charge Coverage Ratio for the <a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s most recently ended <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt8D968Bqq6A"></a>four full <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3676FMukytcm3DywG43"></a>fiscal quarters for which internal financial statements are available
                      immediately preceding the date on which such additional <a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness is incurred or such <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBHENDz8BwoxsttpepI2z"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAAB027Bwky9zop2G4r"></a>Disqualified




                      Stock or such preferred stock is issued, as the case may be, would have been at least 2.0 to 1.0, determined on a pro forma basis (including a pro forma application of the net proceeds therefrom), as if the additional <a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness had been incurred or the <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBHENDz8BwoxsttpepI2z"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAAD228zlu8yno1F3q"></a>Disqualified Stock or the preferred stock had been
                      issued, as the case may be, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9CG2qvBwkowCGDH20K87"></a>at the beginning of such <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu9EA78Dtr7B8CxvF32"></a>four-quarter period.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The provisions of Section&#160;4.09(a) hereof
                      will not prohibit the incurrence of any of the following items of <a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness (collectively, &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1786GKbIr0s0CyjJFk0"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCJKdKt2u2E0lLHm2"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Permitted Debt</font>&#8221;):</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the incurrence by <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBHGOHy0poD1rvjuJ"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and any of its <a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries of <a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness and letters of credit under <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB8HNSKtgl2aCgpz09Aw7"></a>Credit Facilities in an <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDIDkjy7779BHGH0vzv65"></a>aggregate principal
                      amount outstanding under this clause (1) (with letters of credit being deemed to have a principal amount equal to the maximum amount drawable thereunder) not to exceed, as of any date of incurrence, the greater of (x) <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt35679HLEBCzvvzx17"></a>$400.0&#160;million and (y) <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3567AIJKJ"></a>28.0% of <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAC9LHz460vohy3oekH4xYaPCET"></a>Consolidated Total Assets as of such date of incurrence;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the incurrence by <a name="z_9kMML5YVt9IDBGIRHy0poD1rvr8J"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries of the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9BGUS3zB2xwSUwon37s24AP"></a>Existing Indebtedness (including any <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB8IHWIybO0qTZC33"></a>New Gold Notes that remain outstanding on the <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABADGXR8ByI9w1"></a>Issue Date
                      after giving effect to this offering);</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9EJ8vhstfgnzBy4N7tPUBD21QSAx6"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9HE0vhUcACCzlisw38u"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8FK7vh"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCLM8xjlvqyEC0xwoo9SCy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9BA2vhmrxA3ngx628928Bx"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the incurrence <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC55DQFwynmBL644mtI"></a>by the <a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any of its <a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8DHfbrqykljt2q1At6F508One6yxD"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries of <a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness represented by <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3AB9HHN3nw1unZNjy3aSw40t7GCI"></a>Capital Lease Obligations, mortgage financings or purchase money obligations or the issuance of <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBHENDz8BwoxsttpepI2z"></a>Disqualified Stock <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAA8x245vklyC0n2JG0xxCVF1"></a>or preferred stock by the <a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt9IDCKL3ql0B"></a>of its <a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries, in each case, incurred or issued for the purpose of financing all or any part of the purchase price or cost of design, construction, installation or
                      improvement of property, plant or equipment used in <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEIG7xjevD2yv1GD17Aw"></a>the business of the <a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any of its <a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries, in an <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDIDkjy7779BHGH0vzv65"></a>aggregate principal amount outstanding, including all <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBDEdLu3v3F1maWrw5yz2yA9fh9"></a>Permitted Refinancing <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCIIgc5pmlptwB1qr4I6t"></a>Indebtedness, <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBHENDz8BwoxsttpepI2z"></a>Disqualified Stock and preferred stock
                      incurred or issued to renew, refund, refinance, replace, defease or discharge any <a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness, <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBHENDz8BwoxsttpepI2z"></a>Disqualified Stock or preferred stock
                      incurred or issued pursuant to this clause (4), not to exceed, as of any date of incurrence, the greater of (x) <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt35679CDDIHzvvzx17"></a>$125.0&#160;million and (y) <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3567BCIN"></a>8.5% <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDHHPH6tvAsuDF0o"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCDB0ouxjgduz"></a>of <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAC9LHz460vohy3oekH4xYaPCET"></a>Consolidated Total Assets as of such date of incurrence;</font></div>
                  <div><br>

                      letters of credit relating to, <a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness of the <a name="z_9kMK27P7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK27P7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK27P7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK27P7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK27P7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK27P7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK27P7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or a <a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWuAJEDLLgNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6VTB"></a>Restricted Subsidiary of the <a name="z_9kMK28Q7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK28Q7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK28Q7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK28Q7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK28Q7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK28Q7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK28Q7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company to the extent that the guaranteed <a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7GJTMogfvzkuw2HM52I58H9HTF0"></a>Indebtedness was permitted to be incurred by another provision of this Section&#160;4.09; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided </font>that if the <a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness being guaranteed <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8AIzx8Bvq7xp0t05q6IEIK47G"></a>is subordinated to or <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">pari passu</font> with the <a name="z_9kMI6EQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI6EQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, then the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAFDQRsqro80m"></a>Guarantee must be subordinated or <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">pari passu</font>, as applicable, to the same extent as the <a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness guaranteed;</font></div>

                      <a name="z_9kMK43J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK43J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK43J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK43J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK43J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK43J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK43J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will not incur, and will not permit any <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor to incur, any <a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7GHRMogfvzkuw2H84zyHAzA9mfE"></a>Indebtedness (including <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A8IMdKt2u2E0lLHm2"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB8IPgKt2u2E0lLHm2"></a>Permitted Debt)
                      that is contractually subordinated in right of payment to any other <a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCHJ427BwkPXywxuEGFMJB3BQRUF"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or such <a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor unless such <a name="z_9kMH36K7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness will be <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCDEcS5wwtpt05rlxDA4wpp15inQ"></a>contractually subordinated in right of payment to the <a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and the applicable <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee to at least <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBHK8xjvsnsl5L3yE22LO9xANH3E"></a>the same extent as such other <a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>, that no <a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness will be deemed to be contractually subordinated in right of payment to <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDFDni73tphgw0lvx3IFKBt9LMG2"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFHIsk9B71nydUwon37s24AP"></a>any <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC89Ay2witqgyxluvxDJI50x6FA9GPp"></a>other <a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness of the <a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company solely by virtue of being unsecured or by virtue of being secured on a junior priority basis.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">For purposes of determining compliance
                      with this Section&#160;4.09, in the event that an item of <a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness meets the criteria of more than <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one of the categories of <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A8IMdKt2u2E0lLHm2"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB8IPgKt2u2E0lLHm2"></a>Permitted Debt described in clauses (1) through (16) above, or is entitled <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDLO0snvB9xkwEHGK3xHOKufwCJF"></a>to be
                      incurred pursuant to Section&#160;4.09(a) hereof, the <a name="z_9kMK46M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK46M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK46M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK46M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK46M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK46M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK46M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will be permitted to classify such item of <a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness
                      on the date of its incurrence, or later reclassify all or a portion of such item of <a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness, in any manner that complies with this Section&#160;4.09.&#160; The accrual of interest or preferred
                      stock dividends, the accretion or amortization of original issue discount, the payment of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCFE1ylmBhRtlk04pz17M"></a>interest on any <a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness in the form of
                      additional <a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness with the same terms, the reclassification of preferred stock as <a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness due to a change in accounting
                      principles, and the payment of dividends on preferred stock or <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBHENDz8BwoxsttpepI2z"></a>Disqualified Stock in the form of additional shares of the same class of preferred <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8DGea3nk20ivIEDBvnzBGNEFSTEZY"></a>stock or <a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu4BCBHENDz8BwoxsttpepI2z"></a>Disqualified Stock <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECFHB1rvy29xj"></a>will not be deemed to be an incurrence of <a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness or an issuance of preferred stock or <a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4BCBHENDz8BwoxsttpepI2z"></a>Disqualified Stock for purposes of this Section&#160;4.09 or Section&#160;4.12 hereof; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>, in each such case, that the amount thereof is included in <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9GISE30hGFkv2q3"></a>Fixed Charges of the <a name="z_9kMK47N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK47N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK47N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK47N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK47N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK47N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK47N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company as accrued.&#160; For purposes of determining compliance with any <a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr6C845FkBLoxvls"></a>U.S.&#160;dollar-denominated




                      restriction on the incurrence of <a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness, the <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt8EA67HmDNqzxnu"></a>U.S.&#160;dollar-equivalent <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9AF3qLOqihx1mwy4J"></a>principal amount of <a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness denominated in a foreign currency shall be utilized, calculated based on the relevant <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3457BKut97vsr3665qpw3v"></a>currency exchange rate in effect on the date such <a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness was incurred.&#160; Notwithstanding any other provision of this Section&#160;4.09, the
                      maximum amount <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9AG4qLOqihx1mwy4JLBt6QF1"></a>of <a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness that the <a name="z_9kMK48O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK48O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK48O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK48O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK48O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK48O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK48O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary may incur pursuant to this Section&#160;4.09 shall not be deemed to be exceeded solely as a result of fluctuations in exchange rates or currency values.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMK4AQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK4AQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK4AQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK4AQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK4AQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK4AQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK4AQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will not, and will not permit <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt9IDCLHkk9Bto3EnU2II8u69u"></a>any of its <a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECCB54op16E92rz4mw"></a>to, consummate an <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBFGOK9wynPpu"></a>Asset Sale unless:</font></div>
                  <div><br>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFNFLHy0poDF9F6sdY6MMCyADy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMK52H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK52H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK52H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK52H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK52H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK52H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK52H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company <a name="OLE_LINK33"></a><a name="OLE_LINK34"></a>(or the <a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary, as the case may be) receives consideration at the time of the <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBFGOK9wynPpu"></a>Asset Sale at least equal to the <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBFFS7hzeIu5t3vXuF9"></a>Fair Market Value (measured as of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE79Jvarwsu03pmnqv45CDGDtwED1"></a>the date of the definitive agreement with respect to such <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBFGOK9wynPpu"></a>Asset




                      Sale) of the assets or <a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu4BCBHHRM922JjTB3235LM"></a>Equity Interests issued or sold or otherwise disposed of; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">at least <a name="z_9kR3WTr1345FHGK"></a>75% of the consideration received in the <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBFGOK9wynPpu"></a>Asset Sale by <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt9IDBGH227BwkaS0GG6s47s"></a>the <a name="z_9kMK53I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK53I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK53I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK53I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK53I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK53I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK53I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or such <a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary is in the form of cash or <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBCAN4rzMQD681sx0GM"></a>Cash Equivalents, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font> that this requirement shall not apply to an <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBFGOK9wynPpu"></a>Asset Sale in respect of non-operating mining
                      assets.&#160; For purposes of this provision, each of the following will be deemed to be cash:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>

                      shown on the <a name="z_9kMK54J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK54J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK54J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK54J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK54J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK54J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK54J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s most recent consolidated balance sheet, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFJBjk9oPxDD3p14p"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMK55K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK55K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK55K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK55K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK55K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK55K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK55K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary (other than contingent liabilities and liabilities that are by their terms subordinated <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9GJ12pmB"></a>to the <a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or any <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note
                      Guarantee) that are assumed by the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt467CLJebpm5ylyzn"></a>transferee of any such assets pursuant to a customary novation or indemnity agreement that releases <a name="z_9kMML5YVt9IDBGH227BwkaS0GG6s47s"></a>the <a name="z_9kMK56L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK56L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK56L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK56L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK56L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK56L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK56L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or such <a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary from or indemnifies against further liability;</font></div>

                    that such <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9IKaIvha6sjmm1"></a>Net Proceeds will be applied to satisfy such commitment within <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455DHCHHnbxG"></a>180&#160;days of the date thereof; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font> that if any commitment is later canceled or terminated for any reason before such <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9IKaIvha6sjmm1"></a>Net Proceeds are applied, then such <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9IKaIvha6sjmm1"></a>Net Proceeds shall constitute <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AADDQSxfwBjd9vmpp4"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABADERSxfwBjd9vmpp4"></a>Excess Proceeds from and after the date of such cancelation or

                    temporarily reduce revolving credit borrowings or otherwise invest the <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3AB9IKaIvha6sjmm1"></a>Net Proceeds in any manner that is not prohibited by this <a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Any <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3AB9IKaIvha6sjmm1"></a>Net Proceeds from <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBFGOK9wynPpu"></a>Asset Sales that are not applied or invested as provided in Section&#160;4.10(b) hereof will constitute &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1788BBOQvdu9hb7tknn2"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCIHQSxfwBjd9vmpp4"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Excess Proceeds</font>.&#8221;&#160; When <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEIE5xjdgnzyolz4mvAJJJ"></a>the aggregate amount of <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABADERSxfwBjd9vmpp4"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AADDQSxfwBjd9vmpp4"></a>Excess Proceeds exceeds <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3566EJIFByuuyw06"></a>$50.0&#160;million,




                      within <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt367788ok1yhe0J"></a>five&#160;days thereof, the <a name="z_9kMK68M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK68M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK68M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK68M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK68M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK68M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK68M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will make an <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4ABBGHOK9wynPpuYUss5"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBGIPK9wynPpuYUss5"></a>Asset




                      Sale Offer <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9FI72RMxnhwB"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5BCOKvlfu9C96DGzqp16chKBB"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5BEQKvlfu9C96DGzqp168Cy0EumPG"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9EI823xjKP0qkzE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9EJ923xjKP0qkzEC069vchKBB"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAHL92RMxnhwB9x36sZeH88"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAID023xjKP0qkzEC05L6ugiLCCNBy"></a>to <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCLMpgsOJypcnbZC33"></a>all <a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9HEiimfr4rmy2B5r2"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9HDhimo5zlw"></a>Notes and all holders of

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDJJRHy0poD4luzA74JMJKE0"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMK78L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK78L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK78L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK78L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK78L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK78L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK78L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company delivers to the <a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee with respect to any <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9FJP6imtukw1ckyvE2n7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9FKQ6imtukw1ckyvE2n7EAG"></a>Affiliate <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEADG5snktyjGDpt01r38jr52L9uE"></a>Transaction or series of related <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9FKQ6imtukw1ckyvE2n7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9FJP6imtukw1ckyvE2n7EAG"></a>Affiliate Transactions involving
                      aggregate consideration in excess of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt35679EHDByuuyw06"></a>$30.0&#160;million, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBLN3ojy9SJptx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8HO9vhDIz1qpEKYPvz3"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCJJoXm2425sv406C7t"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCLEhklo85rwB2t2E7t"></a>a resolution <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC79Byojy9SJptx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7AF1ot9uijrB2vstDudv"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBFKTHnrvtwMK52o4HGL"></a>Board of <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu6GF7DMVDyvhxA9E"></a>Directors of the <a name="z_9kMK79M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK79M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK79M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK79M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK79M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK79M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK79M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company set forth in an <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s




                      Certificate certifying that such <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9FJP6imtukw1ckyvE2n7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9FKQ6imtukw1ckyvE2n7EAG"></a>Affiliate Transaction complies with this Section&#160;4.11 and that such <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9FKQ6imtukw1ckyvE2n7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39A9FJP6imtukw1ckyvE2n7EAG"></a>Affiliate Transaction has been approved by a majority of the disinterested members of the <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBFKTHnrvtwMK52o4HGL"></a>Board of <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu6GF7DMVDyvhxA9E"></a>Directors of the <a name="z_9kMK7AN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK7AN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK7AN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK7AN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK7AN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK7AN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK7AN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.</font></div>

                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(10)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">any transaction or
                      series of related transactions for which the <a name="z_9kMK8EQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK8EQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK8EQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK8EQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK8EQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK8EQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK8EQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWuAJEDLKolACup4FoV3JJ9v7Av"></a>or any of its <a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries delivers to the <a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee an opinion as to the fairness to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCHL628zlfr74yqjjvzgb9PPF1DG"></a>the <a name="z_9kMK96H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK96H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK96H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK96H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK96H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK96H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK96H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or the applicable <a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary of such transaction or series of related transactions from a financial point of view issued by an accounting, appraisal or investment banking firm of national
                      recognized standing qualified to perform the task for which it has been engaged.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a><a name="z_Toc227318550"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.12</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Liens</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMK97I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK97I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK97I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK97I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK97I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK97I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK97I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will not, and will not permit <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt9IDCLHkk9Bto3EnU2II8u69u"></a>any of its <a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries to, directly or
                      indirectly, create, incur, assume or suffer to exist any <a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien of any kind securing <a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness on any asset now owned or hereafter acquired, except
                      <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9DFcKt2u2E0lTTtzE"></a>Permitted Liens, unless contemporaneously therewith:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">in the case of any <a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien securing an obligation <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAHK7xfsAsp06Cvy7"></a>that ranks <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">pari passu </font>with the <a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or a <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee, effective provision is made to secure
                      <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEJH7xjQV8zzAAFJ4segJAYjA896"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or such <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee, as the case may be, at least equally and ratably with or prior to such obligation with a <a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien on the same assets <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDBHDx27BwkaS0GG6s47s"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDLJPFwynmBzuvrmhB35LLBx9CxmyE"></a>of <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDLDJFwynmBD7D4qbW4KKAw8Bw"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDLFLFwynmBD7D4qkwC93voo04lgEU"></a>the <a name="z_9kMK98J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK98J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK98J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK98J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK98J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK98J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK98J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or such <a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary, as the case may be;&#160;and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">in the case of any <a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien securing <a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCFH42pMV8z"></a>subordinated in right of payment to the <a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or a <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee, effective provision is made to secure <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEJH7xjQV8zzAAFJ4segJAYjA896"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or such <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee, as the case may be, with a <a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien on the same assets <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDBHDx27BwkaS0GG6s47s"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMK99K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK99K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK99K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK99K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK99K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK99K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK99K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or such <a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary, as the case may be, that is prior to the <a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien securing such subordinated <a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness.</font></div>
                  <div><br>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318551"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.13</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Business Activities</font>.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">The <a name="z_9kMK9AL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9AL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9AL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9AL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9AL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9AL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9AL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will not, and will not permit <a name="z_9kMON5YVt9IDCLHkk9Bto3EnU2II8u69u"></a>any of its <a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries to, engage in any business other than <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9GMgKt2u2E0lJVJ8417M"></a>Permitted
                    Businesses, except to such extent as would not be material to <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt9IDBGIRHy0poD1rvr8J"></a>the <a name="z_9kMK9BM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9BM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9BM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9BM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9BM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9BM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9BM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted




                    Subsidiaries taken as a whole.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318552"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.14</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Corporate Existence</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Subject to Article&#160;5 hereof, the <a name="z_9kMK9CN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9CN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9CN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9CN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9CN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9CN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9CN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall do or cause to be done all things necessary to preserve and keep in full force and effect:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">its corporate
                      existence, and the corporate, partnership or other existence of each of its <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries, in accordance with the respective organizational documents (as the same may be amended from time to
                      time) <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFIIrk9FCxl"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMK9DO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9DO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9DO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9DO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9DO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9DO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9DO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any such <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary; and</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the rights (charter and
                      statutory), licenses and franchises <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDF9ry9jgwv3pqoy7v6"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMK9EP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9EP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9EP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9EP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9EP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9EP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9EP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries;




                      <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>, that the <a name="z_9kMK9FQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9FQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9FQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9FQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9FQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9FQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMK9FQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall not be required to preserve any such right, license or franchise, or the corporate, partnership or other existence of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDMNyy9jgwv3pqoy7v6"></a>any of its <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries, if the <a name="z_9kMKA7H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA7H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA7H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA7H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA7H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA7H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA7H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall determine that
                      the preservation thereof is no longer desirable in the conduct <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAJH2xjevD2yv1GD17Aw"></a>of the business of the <a name="z_9kMKA8I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA8I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA8I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA8I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA8I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA8I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA8I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAFKidts0mnlv4s3J2uz3"></a>Subsidiaries, taken as a whole, and that the loss thereof is not adverse in any material respect <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDBGLB45zlMR2sm1GE28BxejMDD"></a>to the <a name="z_9kMOBL6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders of the <a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318553"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.15</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Offer </font><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECC824dOtADwnmy3gmDCbQv291"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">to
                        Repurchase Upon </font><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABACEQAfmtluwLP7DIE9"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Change of Control</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Upon the occurrence of a <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABACEQAfmtluwLP7DIE9"></a>Change of Control, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCADB5zptkevwwD641o4GAxw1"></a>the <a name="z_9kMKA9J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA9J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA9J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA9J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA9J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA9J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKA9J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will make an offer (a
                      &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1788BGR8dkrjsuJN5BGC7iXvv8"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCHHPAfmtluwLP7DIE9kZxxA"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Change of Control Offer</font>&#8221;) to each <a name="z_9kMOCM6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder to repurchase all or any part (equal to <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3566DMJCBC"></a>$2,000 or an integral multiple of <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3566DNJBBC"></a>$1,000 in excess thereof) of that <a name="z_9kMODN6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder&#8217;s <a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes at a purchase price in cash equal to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt35678ACBC"></a>101% <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEF8xqwzlfip10qn16"></a>of the aggregate principal amount of <a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes repurchased, plus accrued and unpaid interest, <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDEAlk9B172o"></a>if any, on the <a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes repurchased to (but excluding) the date of purchase, subject to the rights of <a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes on the relevant record date to receive interest due on the relevant interest payment date (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787CFO8dkrjsuJN5BGC7jT9M35L"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCHIQAfmtluwLP7DIE9lVBO57N"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Change of Control Payment</font>&#8221;).&#160; No later

                      the <a name="z_9kMJ27O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ27O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes properly accepted together with an <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s
                      Certificate stating the <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt9IDCLK1qQU7yy"></a>aggregate principal amount of <a name="z_9kMJ28P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ28P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or portions of <a name="z_9kMJ29Q7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ29Q7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8EEWS5wwuhpzy1GJ2ts49vtF"></a>Notes being purchased by the <a name="z_9kMKAFP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKAFP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKAFP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKAFP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKAFP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKAFP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKAFP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent will promptly mail or wire transfer (but in any case not later than <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt367788ok1yhe0J"></a>five&#160;days after the <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9FLTAfmtluwLP7DIE9lVBO57NoQ"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39A9FIQAfmtluwLP7DIE9lVBO57NoQ"></a>Change of Control Payment Date) to each <a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4BCBKKUNyoix"></a>Holder of <a name="z_9kMJ31H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ31H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes properly tendered the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9EHQAfmtluwLP7DIE9lVBO57N"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9EJSAfmtluwLP7DIE9lVBO57N"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9EIRAfmtluwLP7DIE9lVBO57N"></a>Change of Control Payment for such <a name="z_9kMJ32I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ32I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECGF81rv07735DAG63NBx4KG0tBG"></a>and
                      the <a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will promptly authenticate and mail (or cause to be

                      Offer in the manner, at the times and otherwise in compliance with the requirements set forth in this Section&#160;4.15 and purchases all <a name="z_9kMJ35L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ35L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes properly
                      tendered and not withdrawn under the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBEJUBgnumvxMQ8EJFAlayyB"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBEITBgnumvxMQ8EJFAlayyB"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBEGRBgnumvxMQ8EJFAlayyB"></a>Change of Control Offer, or (2)

                      <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3676DGEDocyH"></a>30&#160;days following such purchase pursuant to the <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4ABBEITBgnumvxMQ8EJFAlayyB"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4ABBEJUBgnumvxMQ8EJFAlayyB"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBEGRBgnumvxMQ8EJFAlayyB"></a>Change of Control Offer pursuant to this Section&#160;4.15, to redeem all <a name="z_9kMJ39P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ39P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes that remain outstanding

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318555"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;4.17</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Designation of Restricted and </font><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBGMnZ3vxDD3p14peq65Dz0y8X"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Unrestricted Subsidiaries</font>.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBFKTHnrvtwMK52o4HGL"></a>Board of <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu6GF7DMVDyvhxA9E"></a>Directors of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8BI2jw0hx2rxsz4mwL"></a>the <a name="z_9kMKBEN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBEN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBEN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBEN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBEN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBEN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBEN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may designate any <a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary to be an <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBGMnZ3vxDD3p14peq65Dz0y8X"></a>Unrestricted Subsidiary if
                      that designation would not cause a <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default.&#160; If a <a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary is designated as an <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBGMnZ3vxDD3p14peq65Dz0y8X"></a>Unrestricted Subsidiary, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAIJ5xjdgnzyolz4RIsA"></a>the aggregate <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBFFS7hzeIu5t3vXuF9"></a>Fair Market Value of all outstanding <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBHMaN7zxD8uwCI"></a>Investments owned by <a name="z_9kMON5YVt9IDBGIRHy0poD1rvr8J"></a>the <a name="z_9kMKBFO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBFO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBFO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBFO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBFO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBFO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBFO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted




                      Subsidiaries in the <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiary designated as Unrestricted <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCADF9zptw07vh"></a>will be deemed to be an <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4BCBHMaN7zxD8uwCI"></a>Investment made as of
                      the time of the designation and will reduce the amount available for <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4ABBGFdNvBB1nz2nZR7K13JP"></a><a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBGGeNvBB1nz2nZR7K13JP"></a>Restricted Payments under Section&#160;4.07 hereof or under <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more clauses of the definition of <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9DEbKt2u2E0lQVF75LG24KQ"></a>Permitted Investments, as determined by the <a name="z_9kMKBGP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBGP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBGP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBGP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBGP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBGP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBGP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.&#160; That designation will only be permitted if the <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBHMaN7zxD8uwCI"></a>Investment would be permitted at that time and if the <a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary otherwise meets the definition of an <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBGMnZ3vxDD3p14peq65Dz0y8X"></a>Unrestricted Subsidiary.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBFKTHnrvtwMK52o4HGL"></a>Board of <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu6GF7DMVDyvhxA9E"></a>Directors of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8BH1jwEvijz4tzu16oyN"></a>the <a name="z_9kMKBHQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBHQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBHQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBHQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBHQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBHQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMKBHQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may redesignate any <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBGMnZ3vxDD3p14peq65Dz0y8X"></a>Unrestricted Subsidiary <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFKGocc"></a>to be a <a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary if that redesignation would not cause a <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default.</font></div>

                      deemed <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCIG52retyfgkur"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDIEmaa"></a>to be incurred by a <a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a><a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWuAJEDLLgNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6VTB"></a>Restricted Subsidiary

                      is not permitted to be incurred as of such date under Section&#160;4.09 hereof, the <a name="z_9kML32K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML32K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML32K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML32K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML32K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML32K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML32K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will be in default <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9CH3qvBwkltD4xuvFwfx"></a>of such covenant.&#160;                       rating assigned by either such rating agency should subsequently decline to below Baa3 or BBB-, respectively, the covenants specified in Section&#160;4.18(a) will be reinstituted <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8HM2qdmqjy84A6s"></a>as of and from
                      the date of such rating decline (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787BFeKis3AtuztuwCdF27"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCKGaMku5Cvw1vwyEfH49"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Reinstatement
                        Date</font>&#8221;).&#160; Calculations under the reinstated Section&#160;4.07 hereof will be made as if Section&#160;4.07 hereof had been in effect since the date of this <a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7AKwyxft9E3lyC8ZKtq6II"></a>except that no <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default will
                      be deemed to have occurred solely by reason of a <a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu4BCBGGeNvBB1nz2nZR7K13JP"></a><a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu4ABBGFdNvBB1nz2nZR7K13JP"></a>Restricted Payment made while that covenant was suspended or for any other failure
                      to comply with any suspended covenants during a period when the covenants were suspended (a &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787CCbb84rq51y4gS1640"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCKKfdA6ts7306iU3862"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Suspension Period</font>&#8221;).&#160; Notwithstanding the foregoing, the continued existence after any reinstitution of the foregoing covenants of obligations arising from transactions that occurred
                      during a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9EEddA6ts7306iU3862"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9EDcdA6ts7306iU3862"></a>Suspension Period shall not constitute a breach of any covenant set forth in this <a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9HHy2rbuDyhrWZ6zF"></a>or cause an <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default hereunder.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">On the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9DHgMku5Cvw1vwyEfH49"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9DIhMku5Cvw1vwyEfH49"></a>Reinstatement Date, all <a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness incurred during a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9EDcdA6ts7306iU3862"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9EEddA6ts7306iU3862"></a>Suspension Period <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFKFncemltC3rsso4G"></a>will be classified to have been incurred or issued pursuant to
                      Section&#160;4.09(a) hereof or <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one of the clauses of Section&#160;4.09(b) hereof (in each case to the extent such <a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7GKUMogfvzkuw2HMJIG0rt89CLD"></a>Indebtedness would be permitted to be incurred thereunder as of the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9DHgMku5Cvw1vwyEfH49"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9DIhMku5Cvw1vwyEfH49"></a>Reinstatement




                      Date and after giving effect to <a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness incurred prior to the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9EEddA6ts7306iU3862"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9EDcdA6ts7306iU3862"></a>Suspension Period and
                      outstanding on the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9DHgMku5Cvw1vwyEfH49"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9DIhMku5Cvw1vwyEfH49"></a>Reinstatement Date).&#160; To <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9FI6vhtqlqj3J1wC00JM7v8LF1Cri"></a>the extent such <a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness would not be so permitted <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDLO0snvB9xkwEHGK3xHOKufwCJF"></a>to be incurred pursuant to Section&#160;4.09(a) hereof or Section&#160;4.09(b) hereof such <a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCADHBzptw07vh"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDIDlackjrA1pqqm2E"></a>will be deemed to have been outstanding on the <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBEHYS9CzJAx2"></a>Issue




                      Date, so that it is classified as <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9BGUS3zB2xwSUwon37s24AP"></a>Existing Indebtedness under Section&#160;4.09(b)(2) hereof.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall not be responsible for monitoring, or charged with knowledge of, the ratings of the <a name="z_9kMJ44J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ44J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.&#160; At the commencement of any <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9EDcdA6ts7306iU3862"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9EEddA6ts7306iU3862"></a>Suspension Period and
                      upon the occurrence of any <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9DIhMku5Cvw1vwyEfH49"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9DHgMku5Cvw1vwyEfH49"></a>Reinstatement Date, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFPJNHy0poDJ3mr3wqz4FC9JHOJ3"></a>the <a name="z_9kML40H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML40H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML40H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML40H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML40H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML40H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML40H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall deliver notice thereof to the <a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee in <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBCB4xjit653xkt"></a>the form of an <a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate, pursuant to this Section&#160;4.18.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318558"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;5.01</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Merger, </font><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JF79ALHz460vohy739"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Consolidation




                        or Sale of Assets</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kML41I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML41I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML41I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML41I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML41I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML41I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML41I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall not, directly or indirectly: (1) consolidate or merge with or into another <a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person (whether or not
                      the <a name="z_9kML42J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML42J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML42J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML42J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML42J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML42J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML42J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company is the surviving corporation), or (2) sell, assign, transfer, convey <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9IQ62360mxG852ot9HEI968"></a>or otherwise dispose of
                      all or substantially all of the properties or assets <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWuAJECHGPIz1qpE2sws9K"></a>of the <a name="z_9kML43K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML43K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML43K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML43K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML43K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML43K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML43K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and its <a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted




                      Subsidiaries taken as a whole, in <a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more related transactions, to another <a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person, unless:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">either:</font></div>
                  <div><br>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(A)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kML44L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML44L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML44L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML44L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML44L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML44L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML44L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company is the surviving corporation; or</font></div>
                  <div><br>
