                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9GE1vhtAvehyDAAmU3IGC"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(B)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person formed by or surviving any such consolidation or merger (if other than the <a name="z_9kML45M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML45M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML45M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML45M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML45M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML45M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML45M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company) or to which such sale, assignment, transfer, conveyance or other disposition has been made is an entity organized or existing under the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBIFyq"></a>laws of the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt5ED6DFeYt0xiXixy33"></a>United States, any state <a name="z_9kMML5YVt9IDBGJ4q"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt5ED6DFeYt0xiXixy33"></a>United States or the <a name="z_9kR3WTr46447DPAw88ykw9wLP5CEwtt"></a>District of Columbia; and, if such entity is not a corporation, a co-obligor of the <a name="z_9kMJ45K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ45K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes is a corporation
                      organized or existing under any such laws;</font></div>

                      obligations of the <a name="z_9kML47O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML47O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML47O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML47O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML47O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML47O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML47O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company under <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBABDbQ3uu557BEDH0uELHIC2E"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ46L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ46L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes




                      and this <a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture pursuant to agreements reasonably satisfactory to the <a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee;</font></div>

                      Default exists;</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kML48P7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML48P7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML48P7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML48P7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML48P7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML48P7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML48P7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or the <a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person formed by or surviving any such consolidation or
                      merger (if other than the <a name="z_9kML49Q7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML49Q7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML49Q7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML49Q7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML49Q7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML49Q7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML49Q7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company), or <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAHK82kk9FsmrhwF6v1802IPO63MF2"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCAAE85nk3wjw4six2nyAIAEB14w"></a>to which such <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCFD4nhmnoetyju6E6A7x0s"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCJC05nk3wjw4six2nyAIAEB14w"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8CD2nhmnoety0EwtC5s542EMEIF58"></a>sale, assignment, transfer, conveyance or other disposition has been made
                      would, on the date of such transaction after giving pro forma effect thereto and any related financing transactions as if the same had occurred at the beginning of the applicable <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu9EA78Dtr7B8CxvF32"></a>four-quarter




                      period (i) be permitted to incur at least <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt356789BBB"></a>$1.00 of additional <a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness pursuant to <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8GG2vhbauDvnTLA7o"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8HH2vhdaknx7ox628928Bx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9982vhefinwx451781TRGDu"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBECQF41iHGlw3rOTJA74uzlcBK"></a>Fixed Charge Coverage Ratio test set forth in Section&#160;4.09(a) hereof or
                      (ii) have had a <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBECQF41iHGlw3rOTJA74uzlcBK"></a>Fixed Charge Coverage Ratio greater than <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAII4xjdcwFxpVNC9q"></a>the actual <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBECQF41iHGlw3rOTJA74uzlcBK"></a>Fixed
                      Charge Coverage Ratio for the <a name="z_9kML51H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML51H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML51H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML51H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML51H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML51H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML51H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company for such <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu9EA78Dtr7B8CxvF32"></a>four-quarter period; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5ABocowjuvy9wxA1p9Aq7PAvs37y0"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDJLTHy0poD8lx1ox2DA78vBNOI4"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(5)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kML52I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML52I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML52I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML52I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML52I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML52I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML52I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has delivered to the <a name="z_9kMH25K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH25K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH25K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH25K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee an <a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s




                      Certificate <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCMPrkocncZ0z028"></a>and an <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBFIeVwvwy45yNRGGF71"></a>Opinion of Counsel, each stating that any such event complies with the foregoing.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">In addition, the <a name="z_9kML53J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML53J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML53J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML53J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML53J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML53J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML53J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will not, directly <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9IM22xuqm1yk0AGHyo38rzB"></a>or indirectly, lease all or substantially all of the properties and
                      assets <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9BAxql0toso5G"></a>of it and its <a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries taken as a whole, in <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more related transactions,
                      to any other <a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">This Section&#160;5.01 will not apply <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCJMA4mmBHuotjyH8x3A24KRQ85O"></a>to any sale, assignment, transfer, conveyance, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8BDwmcrwt7"></a>lease or other disposition of assets between or among <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFNIOHy0poD1rvjuJ"></a>the <a name="z_9kML54K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML54K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML54K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML54K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML54K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML54K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML54K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and any <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWuAJEDLM4rm1C"></a>of its <a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries or between or among any <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCHG121z5wuw25rNS9B0zOUyfDTT"></a>or more of the <a name="z_9kML55L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML55L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML55L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML55L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML55L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML55L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML55L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s <a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Clauses (3) and (4) of this Section&#160;5.01
                      will not apply to (a) any merger or consolidation <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBKMRHy0poDN8662D85HJFF68A"></a>of the <a name="z_9kML56M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML56M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML56M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML56M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML56M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML56M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML56M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company with or into <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one of its <a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries for any purpose or (b) with or into an <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBFLT7jnuvlx2"></a>Affiliate solely for the purpose of reincorporating the <a name="z_9kML57N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML57N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML57N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML57N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML57N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML57N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML57N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in another jurisdiction.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318559"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;5.02</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Successor Corporation Substituted</font>.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">Upon any consolidation or merger, or any <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDELE27pm5yly6ukz4p0CKCGD36y"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDICjn6xmszrt9zv7F7B8y1tBP74NG"></a>sale, assignment, transfer, lease, conveyance <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7GGw0sq3qlx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC898w067pm5ylyDxr3"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7GK00vsokzwiy8EFwm16px9"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7GO4014ykvE630mr7FCG746"></a>or other disposition <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC79Axojy9rsBy0F"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8GL7vhbq9wyD"></a>of <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8GM8vhbq9wyD"></a>all <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAFI306xj"></a>or
                    substantially all of the properties or assets of the <a name="z_9kML58O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML58O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML58O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML58O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML58O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML58O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML58O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in a transaction that is subject to, and that complies with the provisions of, Section&#160;5.01 hereof, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBIG3xjvCxgj0FCCoW5KIE"></a>the successor <a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person formed by such consolidation or into or with which the <a name="z_9kML59P7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML59P7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML59P7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML59P7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML59P7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML59P7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML59P7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company is merged <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC88D206xjSNwB95BD"></a>or <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECCGA7pm5yly6ukz4p0CKCGD36y"></a>to which such sale, assignment,
                    transfer, lease, conveyance or other disposition is made shall succeed to, and be substituted for (so that from and after the date of such consolidation, merger, <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDELE27pm5yly6ukz4p0CKCGD36y"></a>sale, assignment,
                    transfer, lease, conveyance or other disposition, <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDHH8xjs66B64528D"></a>the provisions of this <a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBKOZNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBKMXNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBKLWNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBKNYNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBKPaNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4ABBKQbNphs8GF0"></a><a name="z_9kMPGP6ZWu4BCBLJTNphs8GF0"></a>Indenture referring to the
                    &#8220;<a name="z_9kML5AQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML5AQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML5AQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML5AQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML5AQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML5AQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML5AQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8221; shall refer instead to the successor <a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person and not to the <a name="z_9kML62H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML62H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML62H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML62H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML62H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML62H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML62H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company), and may exercise every right and power of the <a name="z_9kML63I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML63I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML63I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML63I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML63I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML63I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML63I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company under this <a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHzzH7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture with the same effect as if such successor <a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person had been
                    named as the <a name="z_9kML64J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML64J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML64J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML64J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML64J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML64J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML64J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company herein; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBFG6xjs6wjkkl2HEEdVCE32R"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>,
                    <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>, that the predecessor <a name="z_9kML65K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML65K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML65K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML65K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML65K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML65K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML65K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall not be relieved
                    from the obligation to pay <a name="z_9kMML5YVt9IDCMJ4xjs60xso2vs"></a>the principal of, premium on, if any <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDEFys4wvwyEB6C7t"></a>and interest on, the <a name="z_9kMJ47M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ47M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes except in the case of a sale of all of the <a name="z_9kML66L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML66L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML66L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML66L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML66L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML66L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML66L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s assets in a transaction that is subject to, and that complies
                    with the provisions of, Section&#160;5.01 hereof.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: center; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">ARTICLE&#160;6.<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><br>
                    </font><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a><a name="z_Toc227318560"></a>DEFAULTS AND REMEDIES</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_Toc227318561"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.01</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;






                    <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Events of Default</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Each of the following is an &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1788GDLOvo46tJDmjzBB"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCIGPQxq68vLFol1DD"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Event of Default</font>&#8221;:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">default for <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3676DGEDocyH"></a>30&#160;days in the payment when due of interest on the <a name="z_9kMJ48N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ48N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JEDKJreheu66"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">default in the payment when due (at maturity, upon redemption or otherwise) <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9EH1qwzlu82zuq4xu945IKLB7CL"></a>of the principal of, or premium, if any, on, the <a name="z_9kMJ49O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ49O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">failure by the <a name="z_9kML67M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML67M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML67M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML67M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML67M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML67M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML67M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWuAJEDLKolACup4FoV3JJ9v7Av"></a>or any of its <a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries
                      to comply with Section&#160;5.01 hereof;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>

                      <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC798vojyrmqm3E"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAIM4ot9uiWOxCA6tuyuBM"></a>of its <a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries that is <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCFFgbrqykljtIGA"></a>a <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAFKjRmsvopngsCso43Bxyw6V"></a>Significant Subsidiary <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAIHli79rm1ClS0GG6s47s"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBC7ii7mNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6VTB"></a>or <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAJFii79rm1ClS0GG6s47s"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDF7HC7yfv0pvqx62892pds87F120A"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBC6hi7mNvBB1nz2nco43Bxyw6VTB"></a>any group <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC79Czojy9iPxDD3p14p"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7CG0ouxjXb5xzFF5r36rgs87F120A"></a>of <a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAIIdKs88ykwzkZl108uvt3SQ8"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries of the <a name="z_9kML7AO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7AO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7AO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7AO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7AO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7AO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7AO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company that, taken together,
                      would constitute a <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAFKjRmsvopngsCso43Bxyw6V"></a>Significant Subsidiary pursuant to or within the meaning of <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9IHL2lw1CBBz5pM4"></a>Bankruptcy Law:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(A)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">commences a voluntary
                      case,</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(B)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">consents to the entry
                      of an order for relief against it in an involuntary case,</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(C)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">consents to the
                      appointment of a custodian of it <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9IIy2us5snz"></a>or for all or substantially all of its property,</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(D)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">makes a general
                      assignment for the benefit of its creditors, or</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(E)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">generally is unable to
                      pay its debts as they become due; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(10)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">a court of competent
                      jurisdiction enters a final non-appealable order or decree under any <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9IHL2lw1CBBz5pM4"></a>Bankruptcy Law that:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(A)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">is for relief against
                      the <a name="z_9kML7BP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7BP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7BP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7BP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7BP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7BP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7BP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any of its <a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries that is a <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAFKjRmsvopngsCso43Bxyw6V"></a>Significant Subsidiary or any group of <a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries of the <a name="z_9kML7CQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7CQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7CQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7CQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7CQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7CQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML7CQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company that, taken together, would constitute a <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBGLkSntwpqohtDtp54Cyzx7W"></a>Significant Subsidiary in an involuntary case;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(B)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">appoints a custodian <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9IFKFwynmBzptvA"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDMLQFwynmBDvirG"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6FL1obp8vxCByklsA7qoATDz"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC78C0oJMogfvzkuw2HE2"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC78E2oJMogfvzkuw2HJ9r4ODz"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8GF1vhbarA3235628w8RBx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9DJ9vhq443uxDL45O8u"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9INSFwynmBI9A4qr27xr6LJ7"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9CB2vhOT6xxnXp"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9FBv059uiYQyEE4q25q"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9HFji7A4ujkxBzm1IFzw95s1Q5gEU"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBADG30nONvBB1nz2n"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCGG7vhDIz1qpEKBB"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDH9hi7mNvBB1nz2n"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9EDMFwynmBzptp6H"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9IKPFwynmBL6440B63FHDD468"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBACE2ot9uiWOxCA67CDA135"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAFCx0vy9jgwv3pqoy7v6"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAFDy0vy9"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC779yocsAzvsyDAy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7AI4ot9uiWOxCA67C"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9ACfzll2xvwtDFEJHH41QSAGJ57LW"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9FL9vht5sglpqqmYU3IGCDI"></a>of the <a name="z_9kML84H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML84H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML84H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML84H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML84H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML84H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML84H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any of its <a name="z_9kMI27N7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries that is a <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBGLkSntwpqohtDtp54Cyzx7W"></a>Significant Subsidiary or any group of <a name="z_9kMI28O7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted





                      Subsidiaries of the <a name="z_9kML85I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML85I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML85I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML85I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML85I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML85I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML85I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company that, taken together, would constitute a <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBGLkSntwpqohtDtp54Cyzx7W"></a>Significant Subsidiary or for all or
                      substantially all <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBGE3xjs665wzFNJ17Aw"></a>of the property of the <a name="z_9kML86J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML86J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML86J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML86J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML86J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML86J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML86J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any of its <a name="z_9kMI29P7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries that is a <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBGLkSntwpqohtDtp54Cyzx7W"></a>Significant Subsidiary or any group of <a name="z_9kMI2AQ7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted




                      Subsidiaries of the <a name="z_9kML87K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML87K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML87K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML87K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML87K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML87K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML87K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company that, taken together, would constitute a <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBGLkSntwpqohtDtp54Cyzx7W"></a>Significant Subsidiary; or</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(C)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">orders <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBDC4xjotzC5piz84AB4ADz"></a>the liquidation of the <a name="z_9kML88L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML88L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML88L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML88L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML88L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML88L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML88L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any of its <a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries that is a <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBGLkSntwpqohtDtp54Cyzx7W"></a>Significant Subsidiary or any group of <a name="z_9kMI33I7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries of the <a name="z_9kML89M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML89M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML89M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML89M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML89M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML89M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML89M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company that, taken together, would constitute a <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBGLkSntwpqohtDtp54Cyzx7W"></a>Significant Subsidiary;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; margin-left: 72pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">and the final non-appealable order or decree remains unstayed and in effect for <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455FGHHlnz4whyG585ol7Q"></a>90
                    consecutive days.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318562"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.02</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Acceleration</font>.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">In the case of an <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default specified in clause (9) or (10) of Section&#160;6.01 hereof, with respect to the <a name="z_9kML8AN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8AN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8AN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8AN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8AN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8AN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8AN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDE8jk9oPxDD3p14peq65Dz0y8XV"></a>any <a name="z_9kMI34J7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiary of the <a name="z_9kML8BO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8BO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8BO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8BO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8BO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8BO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8BO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company that is a <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBGLkSntwpqohtDtp54Cyzx7W"></a>Significant Subsidiary <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDIIpk93x6AC7ycW4KKAw8Bw"></a>or any group of <a name="z_9kMI35K7aXv5CDCLKeOwCC2o03odp54Cyzx7W"></a>Restricted Subsidiaries of the <a name="z_9kML8CP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8CP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8CP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8CP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8CP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8CP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8CP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company that, taken together, would constitute a <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBGLkSntwpqohtDtp54Cyzx7W"></a>Significant Subsidiary, all outstanding <a name="z_9kMJ53H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ53H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes will become due and payable immediately without further
                      action or notice.&#160; If <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDIKrk9B71nyZY5yE"></a>any other <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBECO6fcs441jvAvk3JH5sp04"></a>Event of
                      Default <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC57Bmlx3zu73xwkswsv7Aw"></a>occurs and is continuing, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEJKAxjw0mt"></a>the <a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or the <a name="z_9kMHz2K7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of at least <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3566EKGH"></a>25% in aggregate principal amount of the
                      then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJ54I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ54I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes may declare all the <a name="z_9kMJ55J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ55J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to be due and payable
                      immediately.<a name="footnote30"></a></font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Upon any such declaration, the <a name="z_9kMJ56K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ56K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes shall become due and payable immediately.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders





                      of a majority in aggregate principal amount of the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJ57L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ57L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes by written notice to the <a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may, on behalf of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCDH6qdkw0v"></a>the <a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders




                      of all of the <a name="z_9kMJ58M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ58M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, rescind an acceleration or waive any existing <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default and its consequences hereunder, if the rescission would not conflict with any judgment or decree, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC58Iuwvdr7C1jwA6XIro4GG"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCKDh87gdt5598ZY5yEG3TNwt9LLSE"></a>except <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCJLq87gdt5598vsXa70G"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCKLpix4zjgtv14qNIro4GG"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCLGjn7qrwqrt9FCznswDH76CRC0cU"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAJNq87gdt55"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCJKp87gdt5598ZY5yEG3TNwt9LLJE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCKEi87gdt5598ZY5yEG3TNwt9LLJE"></a>a continuing <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default in <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFIAjk9B5"></a>the payment of principal of,
                      premium on, if any or interest on, the <a name="z_9kMJ59N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ59N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318563"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.03</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Other Remedies</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If an <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default occurs and is continuing, the <a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may pursue any available remedy to collect <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9FM5y4zl"></a>the payment of principal of, premium on, if any, or interest on
                      the <a name="z_9kMJ5AO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5AO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or to enforce the performance of any provision <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEG9xqwzlSXA11CCI9zB"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMJ5BP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5BP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or this <a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz3L7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may maintain a proceeding even if it does not possess any of the <a name="z_9kMJ5CQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5CQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or does not produce any of them in the proceeding.&#160; A delay or omission by the <a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or any <a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCKM4qd"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMJ64H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ64H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note in exercising any right or remedy accruing upon an <a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default shall not impair the right
                      or remedy or constitute a waiver of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9GFx2pbsB4p0zmyxpw6IDzXjG9P"></a>or acquiescence in the <a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default.&#160; All
                      remedies are cumulative to the extent permitted by law.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318564"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.04</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Waiver of Past </font><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Defaults</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBD9xobq2oetDOO51"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9CA1vhOT6xxD3pw"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6FO4obq2oetDOO51"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC79D0onx3ux1jqIJ12"></a>Holders <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6FIyobaek12y4rqZWyqp59u46CRIE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7BAvouxjFK13srGC2vwxryA9zwAF"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBDAyouxjr50qrzsrsov76wt7C"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCD6vouxjdgnzyolz4"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6EJ0obdkwvliw1"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC77B0oeeesvfuzq0ih74zv92z"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC78Bzojsnsvfuzq0ih74zv92z"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCDC1ouxjKP0qkzEC0"></a>of <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCKImBQrpqn79830tuvpw87xu8D"></a>a majority <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBJJvqjklfmyxnky3"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5CLxq2xjdgnzyolz4"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5DFqq2xjdgnzyolz41F961xB4124J"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9CG7vhp6CBCvquq10"></a>in <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBDFphw555tuvqFM71y1IONO7262DC"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBGBihw55579FEFytxt43"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC79E1oOS5ww7AGFGzuyu54"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAJIzoOS5ww"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCD7wop5BABuptp0z"></a>aggregate <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAJE0vhOT6xx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAJGxoOS5ww"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC77D2oE8hmvw3474XcF66"></a>principal amount of the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJ65I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ65I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6BIbQ3uurnrikty963I27PCFRD8"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6CIaQ3uu418ykty9634r7J"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6DJaQ3uuA7"></a>Notes by <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6EHxw3yifx1nyzxz58u"></a>written notice to the <a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee




                      may, on behalf of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCEAyqdkw0v"></a>the <a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of all of the <a name="z_9kMJ66J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ66J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes waive any existing <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default and its consequences hereunder, except a continuing <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7FFw0pZsBwfpUX4xD"></a>or <a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default in the payment of principal
                      of, premium on, if any, or interest on, the <a name="z_9kMJ67K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ67K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes (including in connection with an offer to purchase); <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>, that <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDNL1qdlmkz836ND3"></a>the <a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of a majority in aggregate principal amount of the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJ68L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ68L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes may rescind an acceleration and
                      its consequences, including any related <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt467DDCcGw9qs8ZFol1DD"></a>payment default that resulted from such acceleration.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Upon any such waiver, such <a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default shall cease to exist, and any <a name="z_9kMJ1G6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMJ1G6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default arising therefrom <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEHG7wfkwnh"></a>shall be deemed to have been cured for every purpose of this <a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz4M7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture; but no such waiver shall extend to any subsequent or
                      other <a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or impair any right consequent thereon.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318565"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.05</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Control by Majority</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDNK0qdlmkz836ND3"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Holders of a majority in aggregate principal amount of the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJ69M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ69M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes may direct the
                      time, method and place of conducting any proceeding for exercising any remedy available to the <a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or exercising any trust or power conferred on it.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">However, the <a name="z_9kMH36K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH36K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH36K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH36K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may refuse to follow any direction that conflicts with law or
                      this <a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz5N7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture that the <a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee determines may be unduly prejudicial <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9CBxqr60mxbT4uo3I"></a>to the rights of other <a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMJ6AN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6AN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or that may involve the <a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee in personal liability.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318566"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.06</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Limitation on Suits</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">No <a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCKM4qd"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMJ6BO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6BO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note may pursue any remedy with respect to <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBEFWKmep5DCxhrv27t"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC668RKmep5DCxv941D8u"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC66CVKmep5DCxv9F6s"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC66EXKmep5DCxwDGFJ2wGNJNH400IJ"></a>this <a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz6O7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDGIeS5ww77"></a>Indenture, the <a name="z_9kMJ6CP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6CP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or the <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note





                      Guarantees unless:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">such <a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder has previously given the <a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee





                      written notice that an <a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7ACN8heu6644"></a>Event of Default is continuing;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8HQ6qds4qgvFQQ73"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Holders of at least <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3566EKGH"></a>25% in aggregate principal amount of the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJ6DQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6DQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes make a written request to the <a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee




                      to pursue the remedy;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">such <a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder or <a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders offer and, if requested, provide to the <a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee security or indemnity reasonably satisfactory to the <a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee against any loss, liability or expense;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee does not comply with such request within <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4787DNPHpdzI"></a>60&#160;days after receipt of the request and the offer of security or indemnity; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(5)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">during such <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455FIGEmaw"></a>60-day period, <a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDNK0qdlmkz836ND3"></a>Holders of a majority in aggregate principal amount of the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJ75H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ75H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes do not give the <a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee a direction inconsistent with such request.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">A <a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCKM4qd"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMJ76I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ76I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note may not use this <a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz7P7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture to
                      prejudice the rights of another <a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCKM4qd"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMJ77J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ77J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note or to obtain a preference or
                      priority over another <a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt9IDCKM4qd"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMJ78K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ78K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318567"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.07</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Rights </font><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDNO4qKOzpjyD"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">of </font><a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Holders of </font><a name="z_9kMJ79L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ79L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notes to Receive Payment</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">Notwithstanding <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDJDjk9B71nyABBGB9A7D"></a>any other provision of this <a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHz8Q7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, the contractual right of any <a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt9IDCKM4qd"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMJ7AM7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7AM7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note expressly set forth herein to receive payment of <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDBHFlk9B50x91013J"></a>principal of, premium on, if any, or interest on the <a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note, on or after the respective due dates expressed in the <a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note (including in connection with an offer to purchase),
                    or to bring suit for the enforcement of any such payment on or after such respective dates, shall not be impaired or affected without the consent of such <a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder.</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318568"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.08</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Collection Suit by </font><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Trustee</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">If an <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default specified in
                    Section&#160;6.01(1) or (2) hereof occurs and is continuing, the <a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee is
                    authorized to recover judgment in its own name and as <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt467CLLgb9BByk"></a>trustee of an express trust against the <a name="z_9kML8DQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8DQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8DQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8DQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8DQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8DQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML8DQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company for <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCJK8xjz3w1sir6FFFH46JDA51F8"></a>the whole amount of principal of, premium on, if any, and interest remaining unpaid on the <a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and
                    interest on overdue principal and, to the extent lawful, interest and such further amount as shall be sufficient to cover the costs and expenses of collection, including the reasonable compensation, expenses, disbursements and advances
                    <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC78G4ojy9"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, its agents and
                    counsel.</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH49M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a><a name="z_Toc227318569"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.09</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Trustee




                        May File Proofs of Claim</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee is authorized to file such proofs of claim and other papers or documents as may be necessary or
                      advisable in order to have the claims of the <a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee (including any
                      claim for the reasonable compensation, expenses, disbursements and advances of the <a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, its agents and counsel) and the <a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of the <a name="z_9kMJ7EQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7EQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes allowed in
                      any judicial proceedings relative <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFMNUHy0poDF9"></a>to the <a name="z_9kML95H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML95H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML95H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML95H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML95H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML95H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML95H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company (or any other obligor upon the <a name="z_9kMJ86H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ86H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes), its creditors or its property and shall be entitled and empowered to collect, receive and distribute any money or other property payable or
                      deliverable on any such claims and any custodian in any such judicial proceeding is hereby authorized by each <a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder to make such payments to the <a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, and in the event that the <a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall consent to the making of such payments directly to the <a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders,




                      to pay to the <a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee any amount due to it for the reasonable
                      compensation, expenses, disbursements and advances of the <a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee,
                      its agents and counsel, and any other amounts due the <a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee under
                      Section&#160;7.06 hereof.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">To the extent that the payment of any such
                      compensation, expenses, disbursements and advances of the <a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee,
                      its agents and counsel, and any other amounts due the <a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee under
                      Section&#160;7.06 hereof out of the estate in any such proceeding, shall be denied for any reason, payment of the same shall be secured by a <a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien on, and shall be paid out of, any and all
                      distributions, dividends, money, securities and other properties that the <a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders may be entitled to receive in such proceeding whether in liquidation or under any plan of reorganization or
                      arrangement or otherwise.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Nothing herein contained shall be deemed
                      to authorize the <a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee to authorize or consent to or accept or
                      adopt on behalf of any <a name="z_9kMH19P7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder any plan of reorganization, arrangement, adjustment or composition affecting the <a name="z_9kMJ87I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ87I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes




                      or the rights of any <a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder, or to authorize the <a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee to vote in respect of the claim of any <a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder in any such proceeding.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318570"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.10</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Priorities</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the <a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee collects any money pursuant to this Article&#160;6, it shall pay out
                      the money in the following order:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">First</font>:&#160; to the <a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, its agents and attorneys for amounts due under Section&#160;7.06
                    hereof, including payment of all compensation, expenses and liabilities incurred, and all advances made, by the <a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and the costs and expenses of collection;</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Second</font>:&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBHK94TOzpjyD"></a>to <a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMJ88J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ88J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes for amounts due and unpaid on the <a name="z_9kMJ89K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ89K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes for <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCMIz3xuplzsp5C2y3CH60"></a>principal, premium, if any, and interest ratably, without preference or priority of any kind,
                    according to the amounts due and payable on the <a name="z_9kMJ8AL7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8AL7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes for <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCMIz3xuplzsp5C2y3CH60"></a>principal, premium, if any, and interest,
                    respectively; and</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Third</font>:&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAB9x2866Dym"></a>to the <a name="z_9kML96I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML96I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML96I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML96I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML96I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML96I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML96I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or to such party as a court of competent jurisdiction shall direct.</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may fix a record date and payment date for any payment <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBHK94TOzpjyD"></a>to <a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMJ8BM7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8BM7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes pursuant to this Section&#160;6.10.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318571"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.11</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Undertaking for Costs</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">In any suit for the enforcement of any
                      right or remedy under this <a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH00H7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture or in any suit against the <a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH68J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee for any action taken or omitted by it as a <a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH69K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, a court in its discretion may require the filing by any party litigant in the suit of an undertaking to
                      pay the costs of the suit, and the court in its discretion may assess reasonable costs, including reasonable attorneys&#8217; fees, against any party litigant in the suit, having due regard to the merits and good faith of the claims or
                      defenses made by the party litigant.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">This Section&#160;6.11 does not apply to a suit
                      by the <a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, a suit by a <a name="z_9kMH25K7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt9IDCKM4qd"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMJ8CN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8CN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note pursuant to Section&#160;6.08 hereof, or a suit by <a name="z_9kMH26L7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9BF2qpz5wz3lsKL34"></a>Holders of more than <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt35678BDB"></a>10% in aggregate principal amount of the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJ8DO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8DO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.</font></div>
