                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318572"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;6.12</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notices of </font><a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Defaults</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Any notice of <a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default, notice of acceleration or instruction to the <a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, to provide a notice of <a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default, notice of acceleration or take any other action (a &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1788BHdQ3ujuzpjyYK52o4B7D"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCIMeS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Noteholder Direction</font>&#8221;) provided by any <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more <a name="z_9kMH27M7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders (each a &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787EEMAvseu1wvQT4uo3"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCHMVCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Directing




                        Holder</font>&#8221;) must be accompanied by a written representation from each such <a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder delivered <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFNMSHy0poD1rv27t"></a>to the <a name="z_9kML97J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML97J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML97J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML97J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML97J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML97J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML97J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and the <a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, that
                      such <a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder is not (or, in the case such <a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder is <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4567EIQyy"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AACFSxx"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AACGTxx"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABACHUxx"></a>DTC or its nominee, that such <a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder is being instructed solely by beneficial owners that are not) <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9CCYIvkTw7D"></a>Net Short (a &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787HMdS2xz0w2gSxB1340G45EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCJMfU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Position Representation</font>&#8221;), which representation, in the case <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7ABxoq3383mnyxl"></a>of a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AADJfS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABAEBWS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a>Noteholder




                      Direction relating to the delivery of a notice of <a name="z_9kMJ1G6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default shall be deemed a continuing representation until the resulting <a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default is cured or otherwise ceases to exist or the <a name="z_9kMJ8EP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8EP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes are accelerated.&#160; In addition, each <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9GGOCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9GFNCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a>Directing Holder is deemed, at the time <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9CDzqs55A5op0zn"></a>of providing a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AADJfS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABAEBWS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a>Noteholder Direction, to covenant to provide the <a name="z_9kML98K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML98K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML98K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML98K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML98K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML98K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML98K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company with such other
                      information as the <a name="z_9kML99L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML99L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML99L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML99L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML99L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML99L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML99L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may reasonably request from time to time in order to verify the accuracy of such <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9JOfU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9JPgU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a>Position Representation within <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt36778Hxk1yFQE3zw2HdG8R"></a>five <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBEDNNB0wtzEaD5"></a>Business Days of request therefor (a &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787DEfOrwlmkdv406VRH81yzJ"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCKMkQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Verification Covenant</font>&#8221;).&#160; In any case in
                      which the <a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder is <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4567EIQyy"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AACFSxx"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AACGTxx"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABACHUxx"></a>DTC or its nominee, any <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9JPgU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9JOfU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a>Position Representation or <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9FHiQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9FGhQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a>Verification






                      Covenant required hereunder shall be provided by the beneficial owner of the <a name="z_9kMJ8FQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8FQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes in lieu of <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4567EIQyy"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBDGTyy"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBDHUyy"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBDIVyy"></a>DTC or its nominee and <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4567EIQyy"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBDGTyy"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBDHUyy"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBDIVyy"></a>DTC shall be entitled to conclusively rely on such <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9JPgU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9JOfU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a>Position Representation and <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9FHiQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9FGhQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a>Verification Covenant in delivering its direction to the <a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If, following the delivery of a <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AADJfS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABAEBWS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a>Noteholder Direction, but prior to acceleration of the <a name="z_9kMJ97H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ97H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes,




                      the <a name="z_9kML9AM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9AM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9AM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9AM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9AM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9AM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9AM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company determines in good faith that there is a reasonable basis to believe a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9GFNCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9GGOCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a>Directing Holder was, at any relevant time, in breach of its <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9JPgU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9JOfU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a>Position
                      Representation and provides <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECDHkb9BBykhr"></a>to the <a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, an <a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate stating that the <a name="z_9kML9BN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9BN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9BN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9BN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9BN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9BN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9BN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has initiated litigation in a court of competent jurisdiction seeking a determination that such <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9GGOCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9GFNCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a>Directing




                      Holder was, at such time, in breach of its <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9JPgU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39A9JOfU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a>Position Representation, and seeking to invalidate any <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default or acceleration (or notice thereof) that resulted from the applicable <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AADJfS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABAEBWS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a>Noteholder Direction, the cure period with respect to such <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default shall be
                      automatically stayed and the cure period with respect to such <a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default shall be automatically reinstituted and any remedy stayed
                      pending a final and non-appealable determination of a court of competent jurisdiction on such matter.&#160; If, following the delivery of a <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AADJfS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABAEBWS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a>Noteholder




                      Direction, but prior to acceleration of the <a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFOPUHy0poDGAAFAtq6MJKE0"></a>the <a name="z_9kML9CO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9CO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9CO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9CO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9CO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9CO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9CO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company provides to the <a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee




                      an <a name="z_9kMJ1G6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate stating that a <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9GFNCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9GGOCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a>Directing




                      Holder failed to satisfy its <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9FGhQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9FHiQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a>Verification Covenant, the cure period with respect to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAGE19uiKCliyAA"></a>such




                      <a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default shall be automatically stayed and the cure period with respect to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDGAjk9aBkhx99"></a>any <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default that resulted from the applicable <a name="z_9kMML5YVt39AADJfS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABAEBWS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a>Noteholder Direction shall be automatically reinstituted and any remedy stayed pending satisfaction of such <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9FGhQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9FHiQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a>Verification Covenant.&#160; Any breach of the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9JPgU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt39A9JOfU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a>Position Representation shall
                      result in such <a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder&#8217;s participation in such <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39AADJfS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3ABAEBWS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a>Noteholder Direction being disregarded; and,
                      if, without the participation of such <a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder, the percentage of <a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes held by the remaining <a name="z_9kMH36K7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders that provided such <a name="z_9kMON5YVt39AADJfS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3ABAEBWS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a>Noteholder Direction would have been insufficient to validly
                      provide such <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AADJfS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABAEBWS5wlw1rl0aM74q6D9F"></a>Noteholder Direction, such <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABBEKgT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBFCXT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a>Noteholder Direction shall be void ab initio (other than any indemnity such <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39A9GGOCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9GFNCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a>Directing
                      Holder may have offered to the <a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee), with the effect that <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8ECz7sgIAjgw88"></a>such <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAEJ8wfkwnhklnwxpz1AB8OM"></a>shall be deemed never to
                      have occurred, acceleration voided and the <a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCFE5udiulf"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8CH6udiulfijluvnxz896MK"></a>shall not be deemed to have received such <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBEKgT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBFCXT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a>Noteholder




                      Direction or any notice <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCED1qvBwkMEnk0CC"></a>of such <a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of
                      Default.&#160; Notwithstanding anything in the preceding <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt8D96892C8"></a>two paragraphs to the contrary, any <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4ABBEKgT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBFCXT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a>Noteholder




                      Direction delivered to the <a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee during the pendency of an <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default as the result of a bankruptcy or insolvency shall not require compliance with the foregoing paragraphs.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">For the avoidance of doubt, the <a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall be entitled to conclusively rely on any <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4ABBEKgT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBFCXT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a>Noteholder Direction delivered to it <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECGG91zz01r3"></a>in accordance with this <a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH01I7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and shall have no duty to monitor, investigate, verify or otherwise determine if a <a name="z_9kMH37L7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder has a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9CCYIvkTw7D"></a>Net Short position or to inquire as to or investigate the accuracy of any <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3AB9JPgU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a><a name="z_9kMNM5YVt39A9JOfU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a>Position
                      Representation or determine whether it complies with the provisions of this <a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH02J7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, enforce compliance with any <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9FHiQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39A9FGhQtynomfx628XTJA301L"></a>Verification Covenant, monitor any court proceeding undertaken in connection therewith, inquire if the <a name="z_9kML9DP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9DP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9DP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9DP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9DP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9DP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9DP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will seek action to determine if a <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9GFNCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt39A9GGOCxugw3yxSV6wq5"></a>Directing
                      Holder has breached its <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3AB9JPgU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39A9JOfU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a>Position Representation, monitor or investigate whether <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDGAjk9aBkhx99"></a>any




                      <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default has been properly reported, verify any statements in any <a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate delivered to it, or otherwise make calculations, investigations or determinations with respect to <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9BDQ8ty3wv474SWDKKMI35L"></a>Derivative Instruments, <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9CCYIvkTw7D"></a>Net Shorts, <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB8HPdQzsJCx270z8B8WaHOOQM79P"></a>Long Derivative Instruments, <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9A8bQt4AXDy38109C9XbIPPRN8A"></a>Short Derivative Instruments or otherwise and shall have no liability for ceasing to take any action or staying any remedy or otherwise failing to act in accordance with the <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4ABBEKgT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBFCXT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a>Noteholder Direction as provided for herein.&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAEK9wfkwz3A4m16"></a>The <a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall not have <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFHGqk98tjdmxy7OPGHBxTYFH65U"></a>any liability to the <a name="z_9kML9EQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9EQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9EQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9EQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9EQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9EQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kML9EQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, any <a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder or any
                      other <a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person in acting in good faith on a <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4ABBEKgT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBFCXT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a>Noteholder




                      Direction, or for determining whether any <a name="z_9kMH39N7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder has delivered a <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3AB9JPgU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39A9JOfU4z12y4iUzD3562I67GCI"></a>Position
                      Representation, such <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCAKQhV5023z5jV0E4673J78HDJ"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABAKPgV5023z5jV0E4673J78HDJ"></a>Position Representation conforms with the requirements of this <a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH03K7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture or any other agreement or any <a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder is a regulated bank.</font></div>

                      <a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder by accepting a <a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note acknowledges and agrees that <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECDDgb9BBykz3mr36AH5r27xr37G"></a>the




                      <a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall not be liable to any person for acting or refraining to
                      act in accordance with (i) the foregoing provisions, (ii) any <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBEKgT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBFCXT6xmx2sm1bN85r7EAG"></a>Noteholder Direction, (iii) any <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate or (iv) its duties under this <a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH04L7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, as the <a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may determine in its sole discretion.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If an <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC58AL6fcs4422"></a>Event of Default has occurred and is continuing, the <a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will exercise such of the rights and powers vested in it by this <a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH05M7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, and use the same degree of care and skill in its exercise, as a prudent <a name="z_9kMML5YVt467CKNfKt862"></a>person would exercise or use under the circumstances in the conduct of
                      such <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt467CKNfKt862"></a>person&#8217;s own affairs.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Except during the continuance of an <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the duties of the <a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will be determined solely by <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBBD7xjh1D8y0FDDDIDBC9FK"></a>the express provisions of this <a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH06N7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and the <a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee need perform only those duties that are specifically set forth in this <a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and no others, and no implied covenants or obligations shall be read into this <a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture against the <a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee;




                      and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">in the absence of bad
                      faith on its part, the <a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may conclusively rely, as to the truth
                      of the statements and the correctness of the opinions expressed therein, upon certificates or opinions furnished to the <a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and conforming to the requirements of this <a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.&#160; However,
                      the <a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will examine the certificates and opinions to determine
                      whether or not they conform to the requirements of this <a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture (but need not confirm or investigate the accuracy of mathematical calculations or other facts
                      stated therein).</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may not be relieved from liabilities for its own negligent action, its own negligent failure to act, or
                      its own willful misconduct, except that:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">this paragraph does not
                      limit the effect of paragraph (b) of this Section&#160;7.01;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCABGjZ799wifptp6LB15"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC59Eqo1wt5xwxzFC7uvK"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC69CvoeYko0533202E1p5NJ11Q"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCABAdZ799wix1kp148F"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCABBeZ799wix1kp148F3p05vp15EP7"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCABCfZ799wix1kp148F3p679LIHMI2"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;




                    <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee




                      will not be liable for any error of judgment made in good faith by a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9DKjMu63273nrvZVtxvs8"></a>Responsible <a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a>Officer, unless it is proved that the <a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee was negligent in ascertaining the pertinent facts; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8BExqgamq2755424G3r7PL33S"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will not be liable with
                      respect to any action it takes or omits to take in good faith in accordance with a direction received by it pursuant to Section&#160;6.05 hereof.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Whether or not therein expressly so
                      provided, every provision of this <a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture that in any way relates to the <a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee is subject to paragraphs (a), (b), and (c) of this Section&#160;7.01.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">No provision of this <a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture will require the <a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee to expend or risk its own funds or incur any liability.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will be under no obligation to exercise any of its rights or powers under this <a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture at the
                      request of any <a name="z_9kMH3CQ7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders, unless such <a name="z_9kMH44H7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder has offered to the <a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee indemnity or security reasonably satisfactory to the <a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee against any loss, liability or expense.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7BGsq3yv7zyz1HE9wxM"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(f)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will not be liable for interest on any money
                      received by it except as the <a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may agree in writing with the <a name="z_9kMLA6H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA6H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA6H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA6H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA6H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA6H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA6H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.&#160; Money held in trust by the <a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee need not be segregated from other funds except to the extent required by law.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318575"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;7.02</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Rights of </font><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Trustee</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may conclusively rely upon any resolution, certificate, statement, instrument, opinion, report, notice,
                      request, direction, consent, order, bond, debenture, note, other evidence of indebtedness or other paper or document believed by it to be genuine and to have been signed or presented by the proper <a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee need not
                      investigate any fact or matter stated in the document.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Before the <a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee acts or refrains from acting, it may require <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBJKQ7t91opngy3zD0x"></a>an <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate or an <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBFIeVwvwy45yNRGGF71"></a>Opinion of
                      Counsel or both.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will not be liable for any action it
                      takes or omits to take in good faith in reliance on such <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBJMS7t91opngy3zDoh878AG"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate or <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBFIeVwvwy45yNRGGF71"></a>Opinion of Counsel.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee




                      may consult with counsel of its selection and the advice of such counsel or any <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBFIeVwvwy45yNRGGF71"></a>Opinion of Counsel will be full and complete authorization and protection from liability in respect of
                      any action taken, suffered or omitted by it hereunder in good faith and in reliance thereon.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may act through its attorneys and agents and will not be responsible for the misconduct or negligence of
                      any agent appointed with due care.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI15M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will not be liable for any action it takes or omits to take in good faith that it believes to be
                      authorized or within the rights or powers conferred upon it by this <a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH15L7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Unless otherwise specifically provided in
                      this <a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH16M7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, any demand, request, direction or notice from the <a name="z_9kMLA7I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA7I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA7I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA7I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA7I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA7I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA7I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will be sufficient if
                      signed by an <a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBFHdLjnliy"></a>Officer of the <a name="z_9kMLA8J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA8J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA8J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA8J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA8J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA8J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA8J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(f)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI16N7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will be under no obligation to exercise any of the rights or powers vested in it by this <a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH17N7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture at the request or direction of any of the <a name="z_9kMH45I7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders unless such <a name="z_9kMH46J7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders





                      have offered to the <a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI17O7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee indemnity or security reasonably
                      satisfactory to the <a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee against the losses, liabilities and
                      expenses that might be incurred by it in compliance with such request or direction.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(g)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall not be bound to make any investigation into the facts or matters stated in any resolution,
                      certificate, statement, instrument, opinion, report, notice, request, direction, consent, order, bond, debenture, note, other evidence of indebtedness or other paper or document, but the <a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, in its discretion, may make such further inquiry or investigation into such facts or matters as it may
                      see fit, and, if the <a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall determine to make such further
                      inquiry or investigation, it shall be entitled to examine the books, records and premises of the <a name="z_9kMLA9K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA9K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA9K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA9K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA9K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA9K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLA9K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, personally or by agent or attorney at the sole cost of the <a name="z_9kMLAAL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAAL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAAL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAAL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAAL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAAL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAAL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and shall incur no liability or additional liability of any kind by reason of such inquiry or investigation.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(h)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">In no event shall the <a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI23J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee be responsible or liable for special, indirect, punitive or
                      consequential loss or damage of any kind whatsoever (including, but not limited to, loss of profit) irrespective of whether the <a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI24K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee has been advised of the likelihood of such loss or damage and regardless of the form of action.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Hlk224300287"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(i)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall not be deemed to have notice or knowledge <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBACBzot9uiKCliyAA"></a>of <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDGAjk9aBkhx99"></a>any <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event





                      of Default unless written notice of any event which is in fact such a default is received by a <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9DKjMu63273nrvZVtxvs8"></a>Responsible <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7HD7DGzogkifv"></a>Officer




                      of the <a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI26M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee at the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9BCOH3536tw1ckIKKrYw0yv8AGJ"></a>Corporate Trust Office of the Trustee, and such notice references the <a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and this <a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI32H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee in its individual or any other capacity may become the owner or pledgee of <a name="z_9kMJ9CM7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9CM7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and may otherwise deal with the <a name="z_9kMLACN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLACN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLACN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLACN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLACN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLACN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLACN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFGDok9X9lpwxnz402"></a>any <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBFLT7jnuvlx2"></a>Affiliate of the <a name="z_9kMLADO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLADO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLADO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLADO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLADO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLADO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLADO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company with the same rights it would have if it were not <a name="z_9kMI33I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI33I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI33I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI33I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee.</font></div>

                      conflict within <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3676GNOJocyH"></a>90&#160;days, apply to the <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBFEeyj"></a>SEC for permission to continue as <a name="z_9kMI35K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI35K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI35K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI35K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee (if this <a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture has been qualified under the <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9HNk2k"></a>TIA) or resign.&#160; Any <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3AB9IOR7iq6"></a>Agent may do the same with like rights and duties.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI36L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee is also subject to Section&#160;7.09 hereof.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">The <a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI38N7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will not be responsible for and makes no representation as to the validity or adequacy of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE88EXMogr7FEzxBH8u"></a>this <a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture or the <a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, it shall not be accountable for the <a name="z_9kMLAEP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAEP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAEP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAEP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAEP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAEP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAEP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s use of the proceeds from the <a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or any money paid to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEABD12983283pLQ79yxMS8zEBxDK"></a>the <a name="z_9kMLAFQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAFQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAFQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAFQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAFQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAFQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLAFQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or upon the <a name="z_9kMLB7H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB7H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB7H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB7H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB7H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB7H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB7H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s direction under any
                    provision of this <a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH23I7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, it will not be responsible for the use or application of any money received by any <a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4J6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent other than <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECDIlb9BBykhrvr8ND37"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI39O7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, and it will not be responsible for any statement or recital herein or any statement in the <a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or any other document in connection with the sale of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCDFdS5ww779DGFJ2wGNJKE4G"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ9GQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9GQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes




                    or pursuant to this <a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH24J7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture other than its certificate of authentication.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318578"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;7.05</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notice of </font><a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Defaults</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If <a name="z_9kMML5YVt9IDCLPsA9ifv77"></a>a
                      <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE79Donz51w95zymuyux9Cy"></a>occurs and is
                      continuing and if the <a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI3AP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee receives <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8GJzy50khz3p01z17Aw"></a>written notice thereof, the <a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI3BQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will deliver <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDBHK94TOzpjyD"></a>to <a name="z_9kMH47K7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMJA8H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJA8H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes




                      <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEMNrkz61livx36sPKtq6II"></a>a notice of the <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default
                      within <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3676GNOJocyH"></a>90&#160;days after it occurs.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Except in the case of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDELMrA9ifv77BAba70GI5VPyvBNN"></a>a <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default in payment of
                      principal of, premium on, if any, or interest on, any <a name="z_9kMJA9I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJA9I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note, the <a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI43H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may withhold the notice if and so long as a committee of its <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9DKjMu63273nrvZVtxvs8"></a>Responsible <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a>Officers in good faith determines that withholding the notice is in <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBDA2xjlv7zyz1HIE28BxYdE4yDS"></a>the interests of the <a name="z_9kMH48L7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders
                      of the <a name="z_9kMJAAJ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJAAJ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.</font></div>

                      services hereunder as the <a name="z_9kMLB9J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB9J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB9J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB9J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB9J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB9J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLB9J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall from time to time agree in writing.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI45J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee&#8217;s compensation will not be limited by any law on compensation of a <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt467CLLgb9BByk"></a>trustee of an express trust.&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE77ERHy0poDN8y293v4y7ONBDH3"></a>The <a name="z_9kMLBAK7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBAK7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBAK7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBAK7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBAK7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBAK7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBAK7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will reimburse the <a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI46K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee promptly upon request for all reasonable disbursements, advances and expenses incurred or made by it in addition to the compensation for its
                      services.&#160; Such expenses will include the reasonable compensation, disbursements and expenses of the <a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI47L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee&#8217;s agents and counsel.</font></div>

                      or any other <a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person) or liability in connection with the exercise or performance of any of its powers or duties hereunder, except to the extent any such
                      loss, damage, claim, liability or expense is finally determined by <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBIDkl48865usBFFHD1"></a>a court of competent jurisdiction to be attributable to its negligence or bad faith.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI4AO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will notify the <a name="z_9kMLBEO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBEO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBEO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBEO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBEO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBEO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBEO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company promptly of any claim for which it may seek indemnity.&#160; Failure by the <a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI4BP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee to so notify the <a name="z_9kMLBFP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBFP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBFP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBFP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBFP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBFP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBFP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will not relieve <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAHM9xj"></a>the <a name="z_9kMLBGQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBGQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBGQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBGQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBGQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBGQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLBGQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any of the <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors of their obligations hereunder.&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBHH127BwkPXywxuEGF"></a>The




                      <a name="z_9kMLC8H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC8H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC8H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC8H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC8H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC8H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC8H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or such <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor will defend the claim and the <a name="z_9kMI4CQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI4CQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI4CQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI4CQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will cooperate in the defense.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMI54H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI54H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI54H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI54H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may have separate counsel and the <a name="z_9kMLC9I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC9I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC9I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC9I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC9I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC9I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLC9I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will pay the reasonable fees and expenses of such counsel.&#160; Neither <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBKINHy0poDE5AxuJ"></a>the <a name="z_9kMLCAJ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCAJ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCAJ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCAJ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCAJ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCAJ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCAJ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company nor any <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor need pay for any settlement made without its consent, which consent will not be unreasonably withheld.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBJNTHy0poD1rv27t"></a>obligations of the <a name="z_9kMLCBK7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCBK7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCBK7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCBK7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCBK7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCBK7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCBK7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and the <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors under this Section&#160;7.06 will <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9GF2vhuvu3vxqx62892"></a>survive the satisfaction and discharge of this <a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH28N7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">To secure the <a name="z_9kMLCCL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCCL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCCL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCCL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCCL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCCL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCCL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s and the <a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors&#8217; payment obligations in this Section&#160;7.06, the <a name="z_9kMI55I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI55I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI55I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI55I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will have a <a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien prior to
                      the <a name="z_9kMJABK7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJABK7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes on all money or property held or collected by the <a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, except that held in trust to pay principal <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9EM6qs5vrw5A572voxMOIDAMEDE"></a>of, premium on, if any, or interest on,
                      particular <a name="z_9kMJACL7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJACL7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.&#160; Such <a name="z_9kMM7J6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien will survive <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9BH9vhOT6xx88vxy0997qo8FBH"></a>the <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7BG1ouxjLPrjuAIH2"></a>satisfaction and discharge of this <a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH29O7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">When the <a name="z_9kMI57K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI57K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI57K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI57K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee incurs expenses or renders services after an <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default specified in clause (9) or (10) of Section&#160;6.01 hereof occurs, the expenses and the compensation for the services (including
                      the fees and expenses <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9AI6ql0B"></a>of its agents and counsel) are intended to constitute expenses of administration under any <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9IHL2lw1CBBz5pM4"></a>Bankruptcy Law.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318580"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;7.07</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Replacement of </font><a name="z_9kMI58L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI58L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI58L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI58L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Trustee</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">A resignation or removal of the <a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI59M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and appointment of a successor <a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will become effective only upon the successor <a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee&#8217;s acceptance of appointment <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDHIqn64rfkopngq2GLFFKFyvw"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8BBy1161khigit4GB3"></a>as provided in this Section&#160;7.07.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5CP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may resign in writing at any time and be discharged from the trust hereby created by so notifying the <a name="z_9kMLCDM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCDM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCDM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCDM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCDM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCDM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCDM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company at least <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4787EHFEpdzI"></a>30&#160;days prior to the effective date of such resignation.&#160; <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDNL1qdlmkz836ND3"></a>The <a name="z_9kMH4AN7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of a majority in aggregate principal amount of the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJADM7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJADM7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes may remove the <a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee by
                      so notifying the <a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI65H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and the <a name="z_9kMLCEN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCEN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCEN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCEN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCEN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCEN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCEN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in writing at least <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4787EHFEpdzI"></a>30&#160;days prior to the effective date of such removal.&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFOLQHy0poDDq3L2y9JA9Dz"></a>The <a name="z_9kMLCFO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCFO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCFO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCFO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCFO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCFO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCFO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may remove the <a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI66I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee if:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI67J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee fails to comply with Section&#160;7.09 hereof;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMI68K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI68K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI68K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI68K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee is adjudged a bankrupt or an insolvent or an order for relief
                      is entered with respect to the <a name="z_9kMI69L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI69L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI69L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI69L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee under any <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9IHL2lw1CBBz5pM4"></a>Bankruptcy Law;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">a custodian or public
                      officer takes charge of the <a name="z_9kMI6AM7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6AM7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6AM7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6AM7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or its property; or</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMI6BN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6BN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6BN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6BN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee becomes incapable of acting.</font></div>
