                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the <a name="z_9kMI6CO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6CO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6CO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6CO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee resigns or is removed or if a vacancy exists in the office of <a name="z_9kMI6DP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6DP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6DP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6DP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee for <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBGFmi7XBgnumvxMQ8EJFAGDz"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDGAji7iT6xy2o"></a>any reason, the <a name="z_9kMLCGP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCGP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCGP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCGP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCGP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCGP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCGP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will promptly appoint a successor <a name="z_9kMI6EQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6EQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6EQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI6EQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee.&#160; Within <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3676EN5yp12ft"></a>one year after the successor <a name="z_9kMI76H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI76H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI76H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI76H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECDGjb9BByk0xpu3E2uywtBF1"></a>Trustee takes
                      office, the <a name="z_9kMH4BO7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of a majority <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCMK5xjw0mt"></a>in aggregate principal amount of the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJAEN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJAEN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes may appoint a successor <a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI77I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee




                      to replace the successor <a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI78J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee appointed by the <a name="z_9kMLCHQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCHQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCHQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCHQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCHQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCHQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMLCHQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If a successor <a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI79K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee does not take office within <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4787DNPHpdzI"></a>60&#160;days




                      after the retiring <a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7AL7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee resigns or is removed, the retiring <a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7BM7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, at the expense of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE78COHy0poDK4qMR8AzyNPJ"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM4zH7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM4zH7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM4zH7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM4zH7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM4zH7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM4zH7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM4zH7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, the <a name="z_9kMM40I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM40I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM40I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM40I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM40I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM40I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM40I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, or the <a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of at least <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt35678BDB"></a>10% <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCMK5xjw0mt"></a>in aggregate principal amount of the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMJAFO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJAFO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes may petition any court of competent jurisdiction for the appointment of a successor <a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7CN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the <a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7DO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, after written request by any <a name="z_9kMH4DQ7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder who has been a <a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder for at least <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3676FO9x3802833"></a>six months, fails to comply with Section&#160;7.09 hereof, such <a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder may petition any court of competent jurisdiction for the removal of the <a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7EP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and the appointment of a successor <a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI7FQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(f)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">A successor <a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI87H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will deliver a written acceptance of its appointment to the
                      retiring <a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI88I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and to the <a name="z_9kMM41J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM41J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM41J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM41J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM41J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM41J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM41J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.&#160; Thereupon, the resignation or removal of the retiring <a name="z_9kMI89J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI89J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI89J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI89J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will become effective, and the successor <a name="z_9kMI8AK7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8AK7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8AK7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8AK7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will have all the rights, powers and duties of the <a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee under this <a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2AP7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.&#160; The successor <a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8CM7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will mail a notice of its succession to <a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders.&#160; The retiring <a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will promptly transfer all property held by it as <a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee to the successor <a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font> that all sums owing to the <a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee hereunder have been paid and subject to the <a name="z_9kMM8K6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Lien provided for in Section&#160;7.06 hereof.&#160; Notwithstanding replacement of the <a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee pursuant to this Section&#160;7.07, the <a name="z_9kMM42K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM42K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM42K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM42K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM42K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM42K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM42K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s obligations under Section&#160;7.06 hereof will continue for the
                      benefit of the retiring <a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI99I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318581"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;7.08</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Successor </font><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9AJ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Trustee by Merger, etc</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">If the <a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9BK7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee consolidates with, merges or converts into, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEABAy289ro70n0Fzt5"></a>or transfers all or substantially all of its corporate trust business to, another corporation,
                    the successor corporation without any further act will be the successor <a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9CL7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee.</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318582"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;7.09</font>&#160;&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Eligibility; Disqualification</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">There will at all times be a <a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9DM7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee hereunder that is a corporation organized and doing business under the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBIFyq"></a>laws of the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt5ED6GIeYt0xiXixy33E2PR28Dzs"></a>United States of America or of any state thereof that is authorized under such laws to exercise corporate <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt467CLLgb9BByk"></a>trustee power, that is subject to
                    supervision or examination by <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt6EC67Dtgfgvsn"></a>federal or state authorities and that has a combined capital and surplus of at least <a name="z_9kR3WTr1345CD999Axttxvz5"></a>$100.0&#160;million as set forth in its most
                    recent published <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3676FLoky6um"></a>annual report of condition.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: center; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">ARTICLE&#160;8.<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><br>
                    </font><a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB5AEWokhn"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9JLYGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9JKXGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9JMZGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBLHMilmixyuxpoy2s4OF856Q"></a><a name="z_Toc227318583"></a>LEGAL DEFEASANCE AND <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AABBOH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AABANH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABABCPH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a>COVENANT DEFEASANCE</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318584"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;8.01</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Option to Effect </font><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt5ED6DEUGifl"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9JKXGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9JLYGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9JMZGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Legal Defeasance or </font><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AABANH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AABBOH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABABCPH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Covenant Defeasance</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDMM1jwxtupE"></a>The <a name="z_9kMM43L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM43L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM43L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM43L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM43L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM43L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM43L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may at any time, at the
                    option <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9BD0ql0BULrvz"></a>of its <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBFKTHnrvtwMK52o4HGL"></a>Board of <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu6GF7DMVDyvhxA9E"></a>Directors evidenced by a resolution set forth in an <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate, elect to have either Section&#160;8.02 or Section&#160;8.03 hereof be applied to all outstanding <a name="z_9kMJAGP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJAGP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes upon compliance with the conditions set forth below in this Article&#160;8.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu6FE7EFVHjgm"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9JLYGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9JKXGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9JMZGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_Toc227318585"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;8.02</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Legal Defeasance and Discharge</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Upon the <a name="z_9kMM44M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM44M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM44M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM44M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM44M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM44M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM44M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s exercise under Section&#160;8.01 hereof of the option applicable to this Section&#160;8.02, <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDBHEMHy0poD1rvnlks54ADz"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM45N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM45N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM45N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM45N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM45N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM45N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM45N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and each of the <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors will, subject to the satisfaction of the conditions set forth in
                      Section&#160;8.04 hereof, be deemed to have been discharged from their obligations with respect to all outstanding <a name="z_9kMJAHQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMJAHQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8DIbS5ww1xsrA3s329Bx"></a>Notes




                      (including the <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees) on <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEJD3xjgduz04q"></a>the date the conditions set forth below are satisfied
                      (hereinafter, &#8220;<a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu6FE7EFVHjgm"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1787HIVEgdjNBklhwxtwo"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCIKaGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Legal
                        Defeasance</font>&#8221;).&#160; For this purpose, <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu6FE7EFVHjgm"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1787HJWEgdjNBklhwxtwo"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3BDCIKaGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a>Legal Defeasance means that <a name="z_9kMON5YVt9IDBGGPHy0poD1rv27t"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM46O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM46O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM46O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM46O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM46O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM46O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM46O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and the <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors will be deemed to have paid and
                      discharged the entire <a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness represented by <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBFC2xjr8EDExsws32dgJAAFB65O"></a>the outstanding <a name="z_9kMK2zH7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK2zH7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes (including the <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees), which will thereafter be deemed to be &#8220;outstanding&#8221; only for the
                      purposes of Section&#160;8.05 hereof and the other Sections of this <a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH2BQ7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture referred to in clauses (1) and (2) below, and to have satisfied all their other obligations
                      under such <a name="z_9kMK20I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK20I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8GIYS5wwC2o"></a>Notes, the <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note




                      Guarantees and this <a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture (and the <a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9EN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, on demand of and at the expense of the <a name="z_9kMM47P7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM47P7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM47P7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM47P7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM47P7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM47P7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM47P7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, shall execute proper instruments acknowledging the same),
                      except for the following provisions which will survive until otherwise terminated or discharged hereunder:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9CCyqr7DCDwrvr21cfI99"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the rights of <a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of outstanding <a name="z_9kMK21J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK21J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to receive payments in respect of <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCMJ4xjs60xso2vs"></a>the principal of, premium on, if any, or interest on such <a name="z_9kMK22K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK22K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes when such payments are due from <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBIM9xjwACEEE0pq3H5s8KAA"></a>the trust referred to in Section&#160;8.04 hereof;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMM48Q7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM48Q7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM48Q7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM48Q7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM48Q7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM48Q7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM48Q7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s obligations with respect to such <a name="z_9kMK23L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK23L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes under Article&#160;2 and
                      Section&#160;4.02 hereof;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the rights, powers,
                      trusts, duties and immunities of the <a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9FO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee hereunder, and the <a name="z_9kMM50H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM50H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM50H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM50H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM50H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM50H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM50H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s and the <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors&#8217; obligations in connection therewith; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">this Article&#160;8.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Subject to compliance with this Article&#160;8,
                      the <a name="z_9kMM51I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM51I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM51I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM51I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM51I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM51I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM51I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may exercise its option under this Section&#160;8.02 notwithstanding the prior exercise of its option under Section&#160;8.03 hereof.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AABANH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AABBOH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABABCPH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_Toc227318586"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;8.03</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Covenant





                        Defeasance</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Upon the <a name="z_9kMM52J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM52J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM52J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM52J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM52J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM52J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM52J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s exercise under Section&#160;8.01 hereof of the option applicable to this Section&#160;8.03, <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDBHEMHy0poD1rvnlks54ADz"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM53K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM53K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM53K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM53K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM53K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM53K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM53K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and each of the <a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors will, subject to the satisfaction of the conditions set forth in
                      Section&#160;8.04 hereof, be released from each of their obligations under the covenants contained in Sections&#160;4.07, 4.08, 4.09, 4.10, 4.11, 4.12, 4.13, 4.15, 4.16, 4.17 and 4.18 hereof and clause (4) of Section&#160;5.01 hereof <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBFD3xjr8EDExsws32dgJAA"></a>with respect to the outstanding <a name="z_9kMK24M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK24M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes on and after <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEJD3xjgduz04q"></a>the date <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCHE4vhmnjkssy02"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCHJ9vht9stystvBHH46"></a>the conditions set forth in Section&#160;8.04 hereof are satisfied (hereinafter, &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr178898LF5wpmn7YEnokz0wzr"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCHLTH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Covenant Defeasance</font>&#8221;), and the <a name="z_9kMK25N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK25N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes will thereafter be deemed not &#8220;outstanding&#8221; for the purposes of any direction, waiver, consent or declaration or act of <a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders (and the consequences
                      of any thereof) in connection with such covenants, but will continue to be deemed &#8220;outstanding&#8221; for all other purposes hereunder (it being understood that such <a name="z_9kMK26O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK26O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes




                      will not be deemed outstanding for accounting purposes).</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">For this purpose, <a name="z_9kR3WTr178899MF5wpmn7YEnokz0wzr"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3BDCHLTH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a>Covenant Defeasance means that, with respect to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBFE4xjr8EDExsws32dgJAA737io"></a>the outstanding <a name="z_9kMK27P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK27P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees, <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt9IDBGGPHy0poD1rv27t"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM54L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM54L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM54L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM54L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM54L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM54L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM54L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and the <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors may omit to comply with and will have no
                      liability in respect of any term, condition or limitation set forth in any such covenant, whether directly or indirectly, by reason of any reference elsewhere herein to any such covenant or by reason of any reference in any such
                      covenant to any other provision herein or in any other document and such omission to comply will not constitute <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDELNsA9ifv77BAxuZc92I"></a>a <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or an <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default under Section&#160;6.01 hereof, but, except as specified above, the remainder <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7GOYMogr7FEzjtx3L6ugiLCC"></a>of




                      this <a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and such <a name="z_9kMK28Q7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK28Q7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees will be unaffected thereby.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">In addition, upon the <a name="z_9kMM55M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM55M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM55M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM55M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM55M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM55M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM55M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s exercise under Section&#160;8.01 hereof of the option applicable to this Section&#160;8.03, subject to <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCHB1vhebsxy2o"></a>the
                      satisfaction of <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9GK7vhu8ACCCyno1F3q6I88"></a>the conditions set forth in Section&#160;8.04 hereof, Section&#160;6.01(3), (4), (5), (6), (7) and (8) hereof will not constitute <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Events of Default.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318587"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;8.04</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Conditions to </font><a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu6FE7EFVHjgm"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8BCVGifl07"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Legal or </font><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AABANH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABABCPH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AABBOH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Covenant Defeasance</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">In order to exercise either <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu6FE7EFVHjgm"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9JKXGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9JLYGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9JMZGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a>Legal Defeasance or <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AABANH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AABBOH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABABCPH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a>Covenant Defeasance under either Section&#160;8.02 or Section&#160;8.03 hereof:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8CEx3AA10Ay3EwjjvJCt6HLGIXN"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMM56N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM56N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM56N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM56N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM56N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM56N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM56N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company must irrevocably deposit with the <a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9GP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, in trust, for the benefit of the <a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders, cash in <a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt8EA67HmDNqzxnu"></a>U.S.&#160;dollars, non-callable <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABACIYL7yv51tvBrXo5LADE0B"></a>Government Securities, or a combination thereof, in such amounts as will be
                      sufficient, in the opinion of a nationally recognized investment bank, appraisal firm, or firm of independent public accountants, to pay <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCMJ4xjs60xso2vs"></a>the principal of, premium on, if any, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE89Fxs4wvwyEB6C7t1IONO7262DC"></a>and interest on, the outstanding <a name="z_9kMK30H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK30H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes on the stated date for payment thereof or on the applicable
                      redemption date, as the case may be, and the <a name="z_9kMM57O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM57O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM57O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM57O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM57O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM57O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM57O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company must specify whether the <a name="z_9kMK31I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK31I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes




                      are being defeased to such stated date for payment or to a particular redemption date;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">in the case of an
                      election under Section&#160;8.02 hereof, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDECPHy0poDDAHH3py3EB8OMNH3"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM58P7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM58P7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM58P7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM58P7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM58P7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM58P7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM58P7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company must deliver to the <a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee an opinion of <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a>U.S.&#160;tax <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDKEln665xr5zjyD9wlxL"></a>counsel




                      reasonably acceptable to the <a name="z_9kMJ1zH7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ1zH7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ1zH7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ1zH7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee confirming that:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(A)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMM59Q7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM59Q7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM59Q7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM59Q7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM59Q7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM59Q7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM59Q7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has received from, or there has been published by, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr46449AbB0M4wv5pogU56zG8hc8QI0x"></a>U.S.&#160;Internal Revenue Service a
                      ruling; or</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(B)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">since the date of this
                      <a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH35J7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, there has been a change in the applicable <a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr4CA46BfBNgfgvsn"></a>U.S.&#160;federal income
                      tax law,</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; margin-left: 72pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">in either case to the effect that, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEOIkkodbtyk05r231BGO9xknEDE"></a>and based thereon such <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBFIeVwvwy45yNRGGF71"></a>Opinion of Counsel shall confirm that, the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9CIS6pqjomnmqflH05"></a>Beneficial Owners <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6BKdQ3uursF6w0"></a>of the outstanding <a name="z_9kMK32J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK32J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes will not recognize income, gain or loss for <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt6EC67Dtgfgvsn"></a>U.S.&#160;federal income tax purposes
                    as a result of such <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu6FE7EFVHjgm"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39A9JLYGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39A9JKXGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9JMZGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a>Legal Defeasance and will be subject
                    to <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt6EC67Dtgfgvsn"></a>U.S.&#160;federal income tax on the same amounts, in the same manner and at the same times as would have been the case if such <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu6FE7EFVHjgm"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt39A9JLYGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt39A9JKXGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt3AB9JMZGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a>Legal Defeasance had not occurred;</div>
                  <div><br>

                      <a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ11J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee confirming that the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9CIS6pqjomnmqflH05"></a>Beneficial Owners of the outstanding <a name="z_9kMK33K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK33K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes will not recognize income, gain or loss for <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt6EC68DhDPihixup"></a>U.S.&#160;federal income tax purposes as a result of such <a name="z_9kMML5YVt39AABANH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt39AABBOH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMML5YVt3ABABCPH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a>Covenant Defeasance and will be subject to <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt6EC68DhDPihixup"></a>U.S.&#160;federal income tax on the same amounts, in the same manner

                      not occurred;</font></div>

                      continuing on the date of such deposit (other than <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCLPsA9ifv77"></a>a <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default resulting from the borrowing of funds to be applied to such deposit (and any similar concurrent deposit relating to other <a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness),

                      <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEKLA482pll34q"></a>to which the <a name="z_9kMM62I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM62I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM62I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM62I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM62I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM62I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM62I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any of the <a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors is a party <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEGE22qyK4rnn56s"></a>or by which the <a name="z_9kMM63J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM63J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM63J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM63J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM63J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM63J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM63J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any of the <a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors is bound;</font></div>

                      Certificate stating that the deposit was not made by the <a name="z_9kMM65L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM65L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM65L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM65L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM65L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM65L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM65L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company with the intent of defeating, hindering, delaying or defrauding <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFHBlk9ztwjo5CBGE2"></a>any creditors of the <a name="z_9kMM66M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM66M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM66M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM66M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM66M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM66M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM66M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or others; and</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDDECPHy0poDDAHH3py3EB8OMNH3"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(7)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMM67N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM67N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM67N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM67N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM67N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM67N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM67N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company must deliver to the <a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ13L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee an <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDCMPrkocncZ0z028"></a>and an <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBFIeVwvwy45yNRGGF71"></a>Opinion of Counsel, each stating that all conditions precedent relating to the <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu6FE7EFVHjgm"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39A9JLYGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39A9JKXGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt3AB9JMZGiflPDmnjyzvyq"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAAC128zlHMC3wtuE"></a>Legal Defeasance or the <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AABANH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt39AABBOH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABABCPH7yrop9aGpqm12y1t"></a>Covenant Defeasance have been complied with.</font></div>

                    such repayment, may at the expense of the <a name="z_9kMM79O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM79O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM79O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM79O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM79O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM79O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM79O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company cause to be published once, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBDD5xjQL1"></a>in the New York Times and The Wall
                    Street Journal (national edition), notice that such money remains unclaimed and that, after a date specified therein, which will not be less than <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4787EHFEpdzI"></a>30&#160;days from the date of such notification or
                    publication, any unclaimed balance of such money then remaining will be repaid to the <a name="z_9kMM7AP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7AP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7AP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7AP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7AP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7AP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7AP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.</div>

                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEKD2xjWeCEE1nyCoS8H76"></a>If <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAECy0nk9mJz8yx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCEG406xjSJz8yx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCF8v059uiWK09zy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8HM7vhDIz1qpEGAG7tcT9I87"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8HN8vhDIz1qpEGAxWR7G65"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9FFdPhSNjo1DDvwBC"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCAB7aZ799wiro1J00HA85pbWCLBA"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCAC8aZ799wiy2oXO4D32"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ23K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent is unable to apply any <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt8EA67HmDNqzxnu"></a>U.S.&#160;dollars or non-callable <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBDJZM8zw62uwCsYp6MBEF1C"></a>Government Securities in accordance with Section&#160;8.02 or Section&#160;8.03 hereof, as the case may be, by reason of any order or judgment of any court or governmental authority enjoining,
                    restraining or otherwise prohibiting such application, then the <a name="z_9kMM7BQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7BQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7BQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7BQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7BQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7BQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM7BQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s and the <a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors&#8217; obligations under this <a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH38M7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBLOYMogr7FEzjtx49vchKBB848F"></a>Indenture and the <a name="z_9kMK41H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK41H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes




                    and the <a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees will be revived and reinstated as though no deposit had occurred pursuant to Section&#160;8.02 or Section&#160;8.03 hereof until
                    such time as the <a name="z_9kMJ24L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ24L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ24L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ24L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent is permitted to apply all such money in accordance with Section&#160;8.02 or Section&#160;8.03 hereof, as the case may be; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>, that, if <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCJF3xjFK13srGGtsx63zOR4ER8A"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM83H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM83H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM83H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM83H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM83H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM83H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM83H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company makes any payment of principal of, premium on, if any, or <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC67Fxq2utuwC94rsH"></a>interest on, any <a name="z_9kMK42I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK42I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note following the reinstatement of its obligations, the <a name="z_9kMM84I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM84I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM84I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM84I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM84I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM84I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM84I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will be subrogated <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEFG5qwzlMR2sm1GE27N8wikNEE"></a>to the rights of the <a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of such <a name="z_9kMK43J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK43J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to receive such
                    payment from the money held by the <a name="z_9kMJ25M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ25M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ25M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ25M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Upon the request of the <a name="z_9kMM89N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM89N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM89N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM89N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM89N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM89N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM89N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company accompanied by <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDNP5ql0BULrvz"></a>a resolution of its <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu4BCBFKTHnrvtwMK52o4HGL"></a>Board of <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu6GF7DMVDyvhxA9E"></a>Directors authorizing the execution of any such amended or supplemental indenture, and upon receipt by the <a name="z_9kMJ27O7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ27O7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ27O7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ27O7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee of the documents described in Section&#160;7.02 hereof, the <a name="z_9kMJ28P7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ28P7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ28P7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ28P7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will join with <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBGGPHy0poD1rv27t"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM8AO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM8AO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM8AO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM8AO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM8AO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM8AO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM8AO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and the <a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors in the execution <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFGFqk9xmrttlm"></a>of any amended or supplemental indenture authorized or permitted by the terms <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFG9kkov71onsjtI"></a>of

                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">reduce the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt9IDCLIzqQU7yy"></a>principal amount of <a name="z_9kMK69N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK69N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes whose <a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders must consent to an amendment,
                      supplement or waiver;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">reduce the principal of
                      or change the fixed maturity of any <a name="z_9kMK6AO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK6AO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note or alter or waive any of the provisions <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBHE2xjuvijt5D739A39Cy"></a>with respect to the
                      redemption of the <a name="z_9kMK6BP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK6BP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes (except as provided above with respect to Section&#160;3.09, <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBILiNeu1x3KMJtuyear7EAG"></a>Section&#160;4.10 and
                      Section&#160;4.15 hereof);</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">reduce the rate of or
                      change the time for payment of interest, including default <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE89Hzs4wvwyEB6tuJ"></a>interest, on any <a name="z_9kMK6CQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK6CQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">waive <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCLPsA9ifv77"></a>a <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default in the payment of principal
                      of, premium on, if any, or interest on, the <a name="z_9kMK74H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK74H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes (except a rescission of acceleration of the <a name="z_9kMK75I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK75I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAHL8xj"></a>by the <a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of at least a majority <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCMK5xjw0mt"></a>in aggregate principal amount of
                      the then outstanding <a name="z_9kMK76J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK76J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and a waiver of the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt467DDCcGw9qs8ZFol1DD"></a>payment default that resulted from such acceleration);</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(5)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">make any <a name="z_9kMK77K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK77K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note payable in money other than that stated in the <a name="z_9kMK78L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK78L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>

                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(6)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">make any change <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7EO0s4zl"></a>in the provisions of this <a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH4CP7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture relating to waivers of past <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Defaults or the rights <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDNO4qKOzpjyD"></a>of <a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMK79M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK79M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to receive payments <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7CEyouxjs60xso2vs723GIJ95AJO"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7CFzouxjs60xso2vs723GIJ95AJOD"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9GGzoq3tpu38350tmvK8y2y9LDCDF"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7CK4oq3tpu38350tmvKMGB8KCBCEU"></a>of <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBHFlk9B50x91013J"></a>principal of, premium on, if any, or interest on, the <a name="z_9kMK7AN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK7AN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(7)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">waive a redemption
                      payment with respect to any <a name="z_9kMK7BO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK7BO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note (other than a payment required by <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8CFeLcszv1HIP0swcYp5C8E"></a>Section&#160;3.09, Section&#160;4.10 or
                      Section&#160;4.15 hereof);</font></div>

                  </div>

                      accordance with the terms of this <a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH55H7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture; or</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(9)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">make any change in the
                      preceding amendment and waiver provisions.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318594"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;9.03</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Revocation and Effect of Consents</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Until an amendment, supplement or waiver
                      becomes effective, a consent to it by a <a name="z_9kMH7EO7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMK7CP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK7CP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is a continuing consent by the <a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt9IDCKM4qd"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMK7DQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK7DQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note and every subsequent <a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMPO5YVt9IDCKM4qd"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMK85H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK85H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note or portion of a <a name="z_9kMK86I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK86I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note that
                      evidences the same debt as the consenting <a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder&#8217;s <a name="z_9kMK87J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK87J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note, even if notation of the consent is not made on any <a name="z_9kMK88K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK88K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">However, except as may be provided by the
                      terms of any request for consent, any such <a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWuAJEDLN5re"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMK89L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK89L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note or subsequent <a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWuAJEDLN5re"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMK8AM7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK8AM7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note may revoke the consent as to its <a name="z_9kMK8BN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK8BN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note if the <a name="z_9kMJ38O7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ38O7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ38O7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ38O7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee receives written notice of revocation before the date the amendment, supplement or waiver becomes effective.&#160; An amendment, supplement or waiver becomes effective in accordance with its
                      terms and thereafter binds every <a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318595"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;9.04</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notation on or </font><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBHJTTyjipwo"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Exchange
                        of </font><a name="z_9kMK8CO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK8CO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Notes</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMJ39P7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ39P7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ39P7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ39P7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may place an appropriate notation about an amendment, supplement or waiver on any <a name="z_9kMK8DP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK8DP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note thereafter authenticated.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMM98L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM98L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM98L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM98L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM98L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM98L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM98L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, in exchange for all <a name="z_9kMK8EQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK8EQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, may issue, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFGAlkov0mZhFHH4q59sx9JOJI"></a>and the <a name="z_9kMJ3AQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ3AQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ3AQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ3AQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall, upon receipt of an <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3AB9HOSLBzls84ohz84Alk6u9"></a><a name="z_9kMON5YVt39A9IGJLBzls84ohz84Alk6u9"></a>Authentication
                      Order, authenticate, new <a name="z_9kMK96H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK96H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes that reflect the amendment, supplement or waiver.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Failure to make the appropriate notation
                      or issue a new <a name="z_9kMK97I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK97I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note will not affect the validity and effect of such amendment, supplement or waiver.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMJ42H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ42H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ42H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ42H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a><a name="z_Toc227318596"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;9.05</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Trustee




                        to Sign Amendments, etc</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMJ43I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ43I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ43I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ43I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will sign <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDIGnk9xmrttlm"></a>any amended or supplemental indenture authorized
                      pursuant to this Article&#160;9 if the amendment or supplement does not adversely affect the rights, duties, liabilities or immunities of the <a name="z_9kMJ44J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ44J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ44J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ44J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMM99M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM99M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM99M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM99M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM99M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM99M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM99M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may not sign an amended or supplemental indenture until the <a name="z_9kMI2I6ZWu4BCBFKTHnrvtwMK52o4HGL"></a>Board of <a name="z_9kMI3J6ZWu6GF7DMVDyvhxA9E"></a>Directors of the <a name="z_9kMM9AN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9AN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9AN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9AN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9AN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9AN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9AN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company approves it.&#160; In executing <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDIGnk9xmrttlm"></a>any amended or supplemental indenture, the <a name="z_9kMJ45K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ45K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ45K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ45K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee will be entitled to receive and (subject to Section&#160;7.01
                      hereof) will be fully protected in relying upon, in addition to the documents required by Section&#160;12.02 hereof, an <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMI5L6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCMPrkocncZ0z028"></a>and an <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBFIeVwvwy45yNRGGF71"></a>Opinion of Counsel stating that the execution <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDBIH0qvBwk"></a>of such amended or supplemental indenture is
                      authorized or permitted by this <a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH56I7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</font></div>
