                    <div style="text-align: center;" class="BRPFPageNumberArea"><font style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 8pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal;">86</font></div>
                    <div style="page-break-after: always;" class="BRPFPageBreak">
                      <hr noshade="noshade" style="border-width: 0px; clear: both; margin: 4px 0px; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: #000000; background-color: #000000;"></div>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: center; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">ARTICLE&#160;10.<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><br>
                    </font><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5K6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_Toc227318597"></a>NOTE GUARANTEES</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBGERStrsp91n"></a><a name="z_Toc227318598"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;10.01</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Guarantee</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Subject to this Article&#160;10, each of the <a name="z_9kMM7J6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors hereby, jointly and severally, unconditionally guarantees to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8GO5qd"></a>each <a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder of a <a name="z_9kMK98J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK98J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note authenticated and delivered by the <a name="z_9kMJ46L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ46L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ46L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ46L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and to the <a name="z_9kMJ47M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ47M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ47M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ47M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and its successors and assigns, irrespective of the validity and enforceability <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5EMWKmep5DCxhrv1J4segJAA"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC66FYKmep5DCx04mz0xDAKTKpkNEE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCDD2ouxjLPrjuAIH259v"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC79Hest6Aytqz8329IJD3F"></a>of this <a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH57J7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, the <a name="z_9kMK99K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK99K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or the obligations of the <a name="z_9kMM9BO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9BO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9BO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9BO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9BO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9BO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9BO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company hereunder or thereunder, that:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCIG13tpu38xrktIKAxy2"></a>principal of, premium, if any, on, and interest on, the <a name="z_9kMK9AL7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK9AL7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes will be promptly paid in full when due,
                      whether at maturity, by acceleration, redemption or otherwise, and interest on the overdue principal <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBII1qs5vrw5A572voxMA040BNFE"></a>of, premium on, if any, and interest on, the <a name="z_9kMK9BM7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK9BM7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, if lawful, and all other obligations of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBKNSHy0poDKBC6sTY9zt8NLLRI4"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM9CP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9CP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9CP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9CP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9CP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9CP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9CP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company to the <a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders or the <a name="z_9kMJ48N7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ48N7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ48N7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ48N7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee hereunder or thereunder will be promptly paid in full or performed, all in accordance with the terms hereof and thereof; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">in case of any
                      extension of time of payment or renewal of any <a name="z_9kMK9CN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK9CN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or any of such other obligations, that same will be promptly paid in full when due or performed in
                      accordance with the terms of the extension or renewal, whether at <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9CHicrsxiRJxIH69Q"></a>Stated Maturity, by acceleration or otherwise.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Failing payment when due of any amount so
                      guaranteed or any performance so guaranteed for whatever reason, the <a name="z_9kMM8K6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors will be jointly and severally obligated to pay the same immediately.&#160; Each <a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor agrees that this is a guarantee of payment and not a guarantee of collection.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors hereby agree that their obligations hereunder are unconditional, irrespective of the validity, regularity or enforceability <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEG9xqwzlSXA11CCI9zB"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMK9DO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK9DO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or this <a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH58K7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, the absence of any action to enforce the same, any
                      waiver or consent by any <a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder of the <a name="z_9kMK9EP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK9EP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes with respect to any provisions hereof or thereof, the recovery of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFHDnk963ylvuwC0ops6HOQF1XcJ"></a>any judgment against the <a name="z_9kMM9DQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9DQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9DQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9DQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9DQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9DQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMM9DQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, any action to enforce the same or any other circumstance which
                      might otherwise constitute a legal or equitable discharge or defense of a guarantor.&#160; Each <a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor hereby waives diligence, presentment, demand of payment, filing of claims with a court in
                      the event of insolvency <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9GM42qany3EDD17K28BxTYFH65U"></a>or bankruptcy of the <a name="z_9kMMA5H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA5H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA5H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA5H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA5H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA5H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA5H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, any right to require a proceeding <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt8D967Eukx8B"></a>first against the <a name="z_9kMMA6I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA6I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA6I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA6I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA6I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA6I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA6I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, protest, notice and all demands whatsoever and covenant that this <a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee will not be discharged except by complete performance of the obligations contained in the <a name="z_9kMK9FQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMK9FQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and this <a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH59L7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If any <a name="z_9kMH8FO7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder or the <a name="z_9kMJ49O7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ49O7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ49O7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ49O7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee is
                      required by any court or otherwise to return <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE78DPHy0poDK4qQb201yIKJOMM"></a>to the <a name="z_9kMMA7J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA7J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA7J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA7J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA7J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA7J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA7J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, the <a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors or
                      any custodian, <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt467CLLgb9BByk"></a>trustee, liquidator or other similar official acting in relation to either <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFOOTHy0poDF9F6s"></a>the <a name="z_9kMMA8K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA8K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA8K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA8K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA8K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA8K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMA8K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or the <a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors, any amount paid by either to the <a name="z_9kMJ4AP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4AP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4AP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4AP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or such <a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder, this <a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7M6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee, to the extent theretofore discharged, will be reinstated in full force and effect.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Each <a name="z_9kMN5G6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor agrees that it will not be entitled to any right of subrogation in relation to the <a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders in respect of any obligations guaranteed hereby
                      until payment in full of all obligations guaranteed hereby.&#160; Each <a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor further agrees that, as between the <a name="z_9kMN7I6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors, on the <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one hand, and the <a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders and the <a name="z_9kMJ4BQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4BQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4BQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ4BQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, on the other hand, (1) the maturity of the obligations guaranteed hereby may be accelerated as provided in Article&#160;6 hereof for the purposes of this <a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8N6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee, notwithstanding any stay, injunction or other prohibition preventing such acceleration in respect of the obligations guaranteed
                      hereby, and (2) in the event of any declaration of acceleration of such obligations as provided in Article&#160;6 hereof, such obligations (whether or not due and payable) <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECFGA1rvqu7D48A88rpr2D4"></a>will forthwith
                      become due and payable by the <a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors for the purpose of this <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMN9K6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors will have the right to seek contribution from any non-paying <a name="z_9kMNAL6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor so long as the exercise of such right does not impair the rights
                      of the <a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECEF84ogvB2oVaD4"></a>under the <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="clear: both; margin-top: 10pt; margin-bottom: 10pt;" class="BRPFPageBreakArea">
                    <div style="text-align: center;" class="BRPFPageNumberArea"><font style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 8pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal;">87</font></div>
                    <div style="page-break-after: always;" class="BRPFPageBreak">
                      <hr noshade="noshade" style="border-width: 0px; clear: both; margin: 4px 0px; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: #000000; background-color: #000000;"></div>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318599"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;10.02</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Limitation on </font><a name="z_9kMNBM6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Guarantor




                        Liability</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Each <a name="z_9kMNCN6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor, and by its acceptance of <a name="z_9kMKA7H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKA7H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, each <a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder, hereby confirms
                      that it is the intention of all such parties that the <a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee of such <a name="z_9kMNDO6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor not
                      constitute a fraudulent transfer or conveyance for purposes of <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt3AB9IHL2lw1CBBz5pM4"></a>Bankruptcy Law, the Uniform Fraudulent Conveyance Act, the Uniform Fraudulent <a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4ABBHKjcqn6zmz"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3DFDDAebpm5yly"></a>Transfer Act or any similar <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt6EC67Dtgfgvsn"></a>federal or state law <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBBHBxjh1HzuAyvB82unnz3CN"></a>to the extent applicable to any <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">To effectuate the foregoing intention, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECEBdb9BByk04q"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ53H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ53H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ53H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ53H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, the <a name="z_9kMI02K7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders and the <a name="z_9kMNEP6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors hereby irrevocably agree that the obligations of such <a name="z_9kMO6G6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor will be limited
                      to the maximum amount that will, after giving effect to such maximum amount and all other contingent and fixed liabilities of such <a name="z_9kMO7H6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor that are relevant under such laws, and after
                      giving effect to any collections from, rights to receive contribution from or payments made by or on behalf of any other <a name="z_9kMO8I6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor in respect of the obligations of such other <a name="z_9kMO9J6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor under this Article&#160;10, result in the obligations of such <a name="z_9kMOAK6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor under <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDEH0y9"></a>its <a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee not constituting a fraudulent transfer or conveyance.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318600"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;10.03</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Execution and Delivery of </font><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Note Guarantee</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">To evidence <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDEH0y9"></a>its <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee set forth in Section&#160;10.01 hereof, each <a name="z_9kMOBL6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor




                      hereby agrees that a notation of such <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee substantially in the form attached as Exhibit E hereto will be endorsed by an <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBFHdLjnliy"></a>Officer of such <a name="z_9kMOCM6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor on each <a name="z_9kMKA8I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKA8I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note




                      authenticated and delivered by the <a name="z_9kMJ54I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ54I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ54I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ54I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and that this <a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5AM7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture will be executed on behalf of such <a name="z_9kMODN6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor by <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one of its
                      <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4BCBFHdLjnliy"></a>Officers.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Each <a name="z_9kMOEO6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor hereby agrees that <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDEH0y9"></a>its <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee set forth in
                      Section&#160;10.01 hereof will remain in full force and effect notwithstanding any failure to endorse on each <a name="z_9kMKA9J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKA9J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note a notation of such <a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If an <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBFHdLjnliy"></a>Officer whose signature is on this <a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5BN7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture or on the <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee no longer holds that office at the time the <a name="z_9kMJ55J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ55J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ55J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ55J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee authenticates the <a name="z_9kMKAAK7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKAAK7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note on which a <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee is endorsed, the <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee will be valid nevertheless.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(d)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The delivery of any <a name="z_9kMKABL7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKABL7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note by the <a name="z_9kMJ56K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ56K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ56K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ56K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, after the authentication thereof hereunder, will constitute due delivery of the <a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note
                      Guarantee set forth in this <a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5CO7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture on behalf of the <a name="z_9kMOFP6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantors.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt;                       unsecured basis <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCIH62z338312z5AG7233w3NLvgxDK"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9CH8vhp171x3qp71opzBJD9FHMMRM"></a>pursuant <a name="z_9kMML5YVt9IDCLN945zl"></a>to the provisions of Section&#160;4.16 hereof and this
                      Article&#160;10, to the extent applicable.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMP8H6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a><a name="z_Toc227318601"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;10.04</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Guarantors May Consolidate, etc., on Certain Terms</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Except as otherwise provided in
                      Section&#160;10.05 hereof, a <a name="z_9kMP9I6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor may not sell or otherwise dispose <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9BCzql0BtuD02H"></a>of all or substantially all of its assets to, or consolidate with or merge
                      with or into (whether or not such <a name="z_9kMPAJ6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor is the surviving <a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person) another <a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person, other than <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCGCy2pm182ozca1z0xHJI"></a>the <a name="z_9kMMACO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMACO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMACO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMACO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMACO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMACO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMACO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or another <a name="z_9kMPBK6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor, unless:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">immediately <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9GL92kk9FCxl"></a>after giving effect to <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEIC29ui0Btq9xi295BBDePyvBNN"></a>such transaction, no <a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default exists; and</font></div>

                  <div><br>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(A)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">subject to
                      Section&#160;10.05 hereof, the <a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person acquiring the property in any such sale or disposition or the <a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person formed by or surviving <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC57Allx24ytmfw5176y47v7"></a>any such consolidation or merger unconditionally assumes all the obligations of that <a name="z_9kMPCL6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor under <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDDEH0y9"></a>its <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee and this <a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5DP7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture on the terms set forth herein or therein, pursuant to a supplemental indenture reasonably satisfactory to the <a name="z_9kMJ57L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ57L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ57L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ57L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee; or</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 108pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(B)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the transaction is made without violating
                      Section&#160;4.10 hereof.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">In case of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE79Cnnz460vohy7398069x9"></a>any such consolidation, merger, sale or conveyance and upon the assumption by the successor <a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person, by
                      supplemental indenture, executed and delivered to the <a name="z_9kMJ58M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ58M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ58M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ58M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and
                      satisfactory in form to the <a name="z_9kMJ59N7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ59N7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ59N7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ59N7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, of the <a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee endorsed upon the <a name="z_9kMKADN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKADN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and the due and punctual
                      performance of all of the covenants and conditions of this <a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH5EQ7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture to be performed by the <a name="z_9kMPDM6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor, such successor <a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person will succeed to and be substituted for the <a name="z_9kMPEN6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor with the same effect as if it had been named herein
                      as a <a name="z_9kMPFO6ZWu4BCBJOYStrsp9BAF"></a>Guarantor.&#160; Such successor <a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person thereupon may cause to be signed any <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCFJ62pkw0v14q"></a>or all of the <a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees to be endorsed upon all of the <a name="z_9kMKAEO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKAEO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes issuable hereunder which theretofore shall not have been signed by the <a name="z_9kMMADP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMADP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMADP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMADP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMADP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMADP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMADP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and delivered to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBJH3xjWeCEE1nKM4DAw"></a>the




                      <a name="z_9kMJ5AO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5AO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5AO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5AO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee.&#160; All the <a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees so issued will in all respects have the same legal rank and benefit under this <a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH66H7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE889SMogr7FEzjyI8u"></a>Indenture as the <a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kML9M6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees theretofore and thereafter issued <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEGAyqwzp1cSumxDLK5"></a>in accordance with the terms of this <a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH67I7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture as though all of such <a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees had been issued at the date of the execution hereof.</font></div>

                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(6)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">upon <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu6FE7EFVHjgm"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABAKMZHjgmQEnokz0wzr"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCAKNaHjgmQEnokz0wzr"></a><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4ABAKLYHjgmQEnokz0wzr"></a>Legal Defeasance or <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBCBOI8zspqAbHqrn23z2u"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4ABBCCPI8zspqAbHqrn23z2u"></a><a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBCDQI8zspqAbHqrn23z2u"></a>Covenant Defeasance in accordance with Article&#160;8 hereof or satisfaction and
                      discharge of this <a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6AL7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture in accordance with Article&#160;11 hereof.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Any <a name="z_9kMH07O7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor not released from its obligations under its <a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMLCP6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee as provided in this
                      Section&#160;10.05 will remain liable for <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCJE2xjiz6yoq5EEEG35IC940E74"></a>the full amount of principal of, premium on, if any, and interest on, the <a name="z_9kMKB8H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKB8H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and for the other <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8GK1mksohv406BD1oxMqh8674OQ"></a>obligations of any <a name="z_9kMH08P7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor under this <a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6BM7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture as provided in this Article&#160;10.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: center; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">ARTICLE&#160;11.<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><br>
                    </font><a name="z_Toc227318603"></a>SATISFACTION AND DISCHARGE</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318604"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;11.01</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Satisfaction and Discharge</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">This <a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6CN7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture will be discharged and will cease to be of further effect as to all <a name="z_9kMKB9I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKB9I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes issued hereunder, when:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">either:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(A)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">all <a name="z_9kMKBAJ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKBAJ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes that have been authenticated, except lost, stolen or destroyed <a name="z_9kMKBBK7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKBBK7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes
                      that have been replaced or paid and <a name="z_9kMKBCL7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKBCL7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes for whose payment money has been deposited in trust and thereafter repaid to the <a name="z_9kMMC8I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC8I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC8I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC8I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC8I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC8I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC8I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company, have been delivered to the <a name="z_9kMJ5BP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5BP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5BP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5BP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee for cancellation; or</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 72pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(B)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">all <a name="z_9kMKBDM7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKBDM7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes that have not been delivered to the <a name="z_9kMJ5CQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5CQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5CQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ5CQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee for cancellation have become due and payable by reason of the sending of a notice of redemption or otherwise, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDIGoacnypm0Ay3EwjjvJC9B"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCADE8zptos5B26866pnp0B2"></a>will become due and payable within <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3676EN5yp12ft"></a>one year or will be called for redemption within <a name="z_9kMML5YVt3676EN5yp12ft"></a>one year under irrevocable arrangements reasonably satisfactory to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBJG2xjWeCEE1nkuy5Aw"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ64H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ64H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ64H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ64H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, and the <a name="z_9kMMC9J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC9J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC9J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC9J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC9J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC9J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMC9J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH09Q7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor has irrevocably deposited or caused to be deposited with the <a name="z_9kMJ65I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ65I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ65I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ65I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee as trust funds in trust solely for the benefit of the <a name="z_9kMI03L7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders, cash in <a name="z_9kMK5J6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt8EA67HmDNqzxnu"></a>U.S.&#160;dollars,




                      non-callable <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBDJZM8zw62uwCsYp6MBEF1C"></a>Government Securities, or a combination thereof, in amounts as will be sufficient, without consideration of any reinvestment of interest, to pay and discharge the
                      entire <a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness on the <a name="z_9kMKBEN7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKBEN7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8EKcS5ww63A0mv0B856t9L"></a>Notes not delivered to the <a name="z_9kMJ66J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ66J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ66J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ66J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee for cancellation for <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE89I0s4wvwyEB6C7t"></a>principal




                      of, premium on, if any, and interest, on, the <a name="z_9kMKBFO7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKBFO7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to the date of maturity or redemption;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">in respect of subclause
                      (B) of clause (1) of this Section&#160;11.01, no <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or <a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMLAN6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDGEQ8heu663lxCxm5LJ7ur26"></a>Event of Default has occurred and is continuing on the date of the deposit (other than <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDCLPsA9ifv77"></a>a <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4BCBIMU9ifv77"></a>Default or
                      <a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4BCBIOXRyr79wMGpm2EE"></a><a name="z_9kMLBO6ZWu4ABBJGORyr79wMGpm2EE"></a>Event of Default resulting from the borrowing of funds to be applied to such deposit and any similar deposit relating to other <a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness and, in each case, the granting of <a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Liens to secure such borrowings) and the deposit will not result in a breach or violation of, or
                      constitute a default under, any other instrument <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEKLA482pll34q"></a>to which the <a name="z_9kMMCAK7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCAK7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCAK7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCAK7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCAK7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCAK7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCAK7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH11H7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor
                      is a party <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEGE22qyK4rnn56s"></a>or by which the <a name="z_9kMMCBL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCBL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCBL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCBL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCBL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCBL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCBL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH12I7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor is bound (other than with respect to the
                      borrowing of funds to be applied concurrently to make the deposit required to effect such satisfaction and discharge and any similar concurrent deposit relating to other <a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5CDCKQcOqihx1mwy4J"></a>Indebtedness, and
                      in each case the granting of <a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4BCBINdLlr"></a>Liens to secure such borrowings);</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="clear: both; margin-top: 10pt; margin-bottom: 10pt;" class="BRPFPageBreakArea">
                    <div style="text-align: center;" class="BRPFPageNumberArea"><font style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 8pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal;">90</font></div>
                    <div style="page-break-after: always;" class="BRPFPageBreak">
                      <hr noshade="noshade" style="border-width: 0px; clear: both; margin: 4px 0px; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: #000000; background-color: #000000;"></div>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMMCCM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCCM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCCM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCCM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCCM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCCM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCCM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH13J7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor has paid or caused to be paid all sums payable by it under this <a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6DO7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">the <a name="z_9kMMCDN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCDN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCDN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCDN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCDN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCDN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCDN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has delivered irrevocable <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JF89Cus3AACyy517C"></a>instructions to the <a name="z_9kMJ67K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ67K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ67K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ67K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee under this <a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6EP7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture to apply
                      the deposited money toward the payment of the <a name="z_9kMKBGP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKBGP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes at maturity or on the redemption date, as the case may be.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">In addition, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEAJN8xjFK13srGGDKK6s16HEB85u"></a>the <a name="z_9kMMCEO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCEO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCEO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCEO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCEO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCEO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCEO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company must deliver <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9HIO5r7zmnlew1xByv"></a>an <a name="z_9kMK9N6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMI6M6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9HKQ5r7zmnlew1xBmf6568E"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCMPrkocncZ0z028"></a>and an <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu4BCBFIeVwvwy45yNRGGF71"></a>Opinion
                      of Counsel to the <a name="z_9kMJ68L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ68L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ68L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ68L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee stating that all conditions precedent to
                      satisfaction and discharge have been satisfied.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Notwithstanding the satisfaction and
                      discharge of this <a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH6FQ7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, if <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDMO3xzq26jvxkoyyq3EIDFCx"></a>money has been deposited with the <a name="z_9kMJ69M7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ69M7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ69M7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ69M7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee pursuant to subclause (b) of clause (1) of this Section&#160;11.01, the provisions of Section&#160;11.02 and
                      Section&#160;8.06 hereof will survive.&#160; In addition, nothing in this Section&#160;11.01 will be deemed to discharge those provisions of Section&#160;7.06 hereof, that, by their terms, survive <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCBBE8vhOT6xx88vxy0997qo8FBH"></a>the
                      satisfaction and discharge of this <a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH77H7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YV0B7767ALG2ztlew51781hoMOOtjH8K"></a><a name="z_Toc227318605"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;11.02</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Application of Trust Money</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Subject <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt9IDCLN945zl"></a>to




                      the provisions of Section&#160;8.06 hereof, all <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBKM1vxo04htvimwwo1CGBDAv"></a>money deposited with the <a name="z_9kMJ6AN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7HD5ACPAlljugfDFF"></a>held in trust and applied by it, in accordance <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9EDxqwzlSXA11yuy5A0C"></a>with the provisions of the <a name="z_9kMKBHQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMKBHQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and this <a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH78I7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a (including the <a name="z_9kMMCFP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCFP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCFP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCFP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a segregated from other funds except to the extent required by law.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEKD2xjWeCEE1nyCoS8H76"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the <a name="z_9kMJ6DQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6DQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6DQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ6DQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying Agent is unable to apply any money or <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBDJZM8zw62uwCsYp6MBEF1C"></a>Government Securities in accordance with Section&#160;11.01 hereof by reason of any legal
                      proceeding or by reason of any order or judgment of any court or governmental authority enjoining, restraining or otherwise prohibiting such application, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE78GSHy0poDJwswkvKof6452MONS"></a>the <a name="z_9kMMCGQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCGQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCGQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCGQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCGQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCGQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMCGQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s and any <a name="z_9kMH14K7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor&#8217;s <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6EIzkiqmft2y49BzmvKof6452MONU"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCACB42met90m"></a>obligations <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5ENXKmep5DCxl54tC5u54fiLCC"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCACC52met90mOSumxDLK5tDC1KD2DC"></a>under <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDGHYMogr7FEzjtx49v"></a>this <a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH79J7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and the <a name="z_9kML3zH7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML3zH7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes shall be revived and reinstated as though no
                      deposit had occurred pursuant to Section&#160;11.01 hereof; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font> that if the <a name="z_9kMMD8H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD8H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD8H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD8H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD8H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD8H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD8H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has made any <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCFD0ylmBmXA11"></a>payment of principal of, premium on, if any, or interest on, any <a name="z_9kML30I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML30I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes because of the reinstatement of its obligations, the <a name="z_9kMMD9I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD9I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD9I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD9I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD9I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD9I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMD9I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall be subrogated <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEFG5qwzlMR2sm1GE27N8wikNEE"></a>to the rights of the <a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of such <a name="z_9kML31J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML31J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to receive such
                      payment from the money or <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4BCBDJZM8zw62uwCsYp6MBEF1C"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8CEdLct9y12ozFCvmTOzz"></a>Government Securities held by the <a name="z_9kMJ75H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ75H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ75H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ75H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee or <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying

                      Failure to mail a notice or communication to a <a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder or any defect in it will not affect its sufficiency with respect to other <a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders.</font></div>

                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(e)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If a notice or communication is mailed or
                      otherwise delivered in the manner provided above within the time prescribed, it is duly given, whether or not the addressee receives it.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(f)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If the <a name="z_9kMMDEN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDEN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDEN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDEN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDEN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDEN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDEN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company mails a notice or communication to <a name="z_9kMI10H7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders, it will mail a copy to the <a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7BN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and each <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3AB9IOR7iq6"></a>Agent at the
                      same time.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(g)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7CO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall have the right to accept and act upon instructions, including funds transfer instructions (&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr17889CVK188Aww3z5A"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCIJWM3AACyy517C"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Instructions</font>&#8221;) given pursuant to this <a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7AK7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and delivered using <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9BFTGnfvB74zpURmwF"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9BESGnfvB74zpURmwF"></a>Electronic Means; <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9DE4vhq4uhiij0FCCbTAC10P"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">provided</font>, <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">however</font>,
                      that <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFPMQHy0poDJ3mr38FFKFyvCNOI4"></a>the <a name="z_9kMMDFO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDFO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDFO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDFO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDFO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDFO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDFO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall provide to the <a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7DP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee an incumbency certificate listing officers with the authority to provide such <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39AABEXM3AACyy517C"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3ABABDWM3AACyy517C"></a>Instructions (&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787CELJ9xt4z85kVSqusp5K"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCHGMLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Authorized </font><a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Officers</font>&#8221;) and containing specimen signatures of such <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9EFMLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9EGNLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a>Authorized <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a>Officers, which incumbency certificate shall be amended by the <a name="z_9kMMDGP7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDGP7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDGP7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDGP7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDGP7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDGP7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDGP7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company whenever a <a name="z_9kMON5YVt467CKNfKt862"></a>person is to be added or deleted from the listing.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(h)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">If <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFOGLHy0poD5tum2JKH50GDCG2"></a>the <a name="z_9kMMDHQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDHQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDHQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDHQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDHQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDHQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMMDHQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company elects to give the <a name="z_9kR3WTr267AJLgZ799wiNR8FFH33A6CH"></a>Trustee Instructions using <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9BFTGnfvB74zpURmwF"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9BESGnfvB74zpURmwF"></a>Electronic Means and the <a name="z_9kMJ7EQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7EQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7EQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ7EQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, in its discretion, elects to act upon such <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3ABABDWM3AACyy517C"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39AABEXM3AACyy517C"></a>Instructions,




                      the <a name="z_9kMJ86H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ86H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ86H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ86H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee&#8217;s understanding of such <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39AABEXM3AACyy517C"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3ABABDWM3AACyy517C"></a>Instructions shall be deemed controlling.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFPPTHy0poDLBvn2HK3y28626uyG"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(i)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMN5zH7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN5zH7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN5zH7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN5zH7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN5zH7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN5zH7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN5zH7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company understands and agrees that the <a name="z_9kMJ87I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ87I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ87I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ87I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee cannot determine the identity of the actual sender of such <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3ABABDWM3AACyy517C"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39AABEXM3AACyy517C"></a>Instructions




                      and that the <a name="z_9kMJ88J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ88J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ88J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ88J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall conclusively presume that directions that
                      purport to have been sent by an <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9EFMLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9EGNLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a>Authorized <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a>Officer listed on the incumbency certificate
                      provided to the <a name="z_9kMJ89K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ89K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ89K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ89K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee have been sent by such <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9EFMLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9EGNLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a>Authorized <a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a>Officer.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(j)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; &#160; &#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMN50I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN50I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN50I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN50I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN50I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN50I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN50I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall be responsible for ensuring that only <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9EFMLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9EGNLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a>Authorized




                      <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a>Officers transmit such <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39AABEXM3AACyy517C"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3ABABDWM3AACyy517C"></a>Instructions to the <a name="z_9kMJ8AL7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8AL7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8AL7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ8AL7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee and that the <a name="z_9kMN51J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN51J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN51J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN51J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN51J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN51J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN51J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and all <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt39A9EGNLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3AB9EFMLBzv61A7mXUswur7M"></a>Authorized <a name="z_9kML6J6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a>Officers are solely responsible to safeguard the use and confidentiality of
                      applicable user and authorization codes, passwords and/or authentication keys upon receipt by the <a name="z_9kMN52K7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN52K7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN52K7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN52K7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN52K7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN52K7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN52K7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">to assume all risks

                  <div><br>

                  <div><br>

                      of the security procedures.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(m)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr17879DREldt952xnSPkuD"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCIFOGnfvB74zpURmwF"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Electronic Means</font>&#8221; shall mean the following communications methods: e-mail, secure electronic
                      transmission containing applicable authorization codes, passwords and/or authentication keys issued by the <a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ98I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, or another method or system specified by the <a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ99J7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee as available for use in connection with its services hereunder.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(n)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Notwithstanding <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDJDjk9B71nyABBGB9A7D"></a>any other provision of this <a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7BL7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture or any <a name="z_9kML32K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML32K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note, where this <a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7CM7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture or any <a name="z_9kML33L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML33L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note
                      provides for notice of any event or any other communication (including any notice of redemption or repurchase) to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEMMqetyoix8xk"></a>a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9JF7CKxsxnhw"></a>holder of a <a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4BCBJLVJypcnbZC33"></a>Global Note (whether by mail or otherwise), such notice shall be sufficiently given if given to the <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary (or its designee) pursuant to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBIF2xjvBuptp0zv3ELLN99GCING"></a>the standing instructions from the <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary or its designee, including by electronic mail in accordance with accepted practices at
                      the <a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4BCBIGO9s3724xwL"></a>Depositary.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>

                    <div style="text-align: center;" class="BRPFPageNumberArea"><font style="font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 8pt; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal;">93</font></div>
