                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318608"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;12.02</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Certificate and Opinion as to Conditions Precedent</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Upon any request or application by <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFPNRHy0poDKBC6s"></a>the <a name="z_9kMN55N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN55N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN55N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN55N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN55N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN55N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN55N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company to the <a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9AK7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee to take any action under this <a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7DN7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFPLPHy0poDJ3mr3y8LF7DDFNOI4"></a>the <a name="z_9kMN56O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN56O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN56O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN56O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN56O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN56O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN56O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company shall furnish to the <a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9BL7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">an <a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMI7N6ZWu4BCBGJeLjnliyDZG2IAxywp7C"></a>Officer&#8217;s Certificate in form and substance reasonably satisfactory to the <a name="z_9kMJ9CM7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9CM7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9CM7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9CM7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee (which must include <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDEJLBxjvBuv0uvxDJJ68"></a>the statements set forth in
                      Section&#160;12.03 hereof) stating that, in the opinion of the signers, all conditions precedent and covenants, if any, provided for in this <a name="z_9kMH7EO7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7EO7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7EO7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7EO7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7EO7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7EO7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7EO7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture relating
                      to the proposed action have been satisfied; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE7BHtq32mosyG0zI1wzr78s7MI5u"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">an <a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBFIeVwvwy45yNRGGF71"></a>Opinion of Counsel in form and substance reasonably satisfactory to the <a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9DN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee (which must include <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDEJLBxjvBuv0uvxDJJ68"></a>the statements set forth in
                      Section&#160;12.03 hereof) stating that, in the opinion of such counsel, all such conditions precedent and covenants have been satisfied.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318609"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;12.03</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Statements Required in Certificate or Opinion</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Each certificate or opinion with respect
                      to compliance with a condition or covenant provided for in this <a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7FP7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture must include:</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(1)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">a statement that the <a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI18P7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person making such certificate or opinion has read such covenant or condition;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(2)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">a brief statement as to
                      the nature and scope of the examination or investigation upon which the statements or opinions contained in such certificate or opinion are based;</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(3)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">a statement that, in
                      the opinion of such <a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI19Q7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person, he or she has made such examination or investigation as is necessary to enable him or her to express an informed opinion as
                      to whether or not such covenant or condition has been satisfied; and</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(4)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">a statement as to
                      whether or not, in the opinion <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEACIgKt8627F0o"></a>of such <a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI21H7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person, such condition or covenant has been satisfied.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318610"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;12.04</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Rules by </font><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9EO7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Trustee and </font><a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCAJPS8jr7"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Agents</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">The <a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9FP7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee may make reasonable rules for action by or at a meeting of <a name="z_9kMI11I7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders.&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBHHfRjUPlq3FFxyDE"></a>The <a name="z_9kMK6K6ZWu6GF7DKhNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4ABBHNkNjo1DDvw"></a><a name="z_9kMK4I6ZWu4BCBIFbNjo1DDvw"></a>Registrar or <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4ABBIHbHx6wvJEpxD"></a><a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu4BCBIJdHx6wvJEpxD"></a>Paying
                    Agent may make reasonable rules and set reasonable requirements for its functions.</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318611"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;12.05</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">No Personal Liability of </font><a name="z_9kMI4K6ZWu6GF7DMVDyvhxA9E"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Directors, </font><a name="z_9kML8L6ZWu6GF7DJdLjnliy"></a><a name="z_9kMH8P6ZWu4BCBFHdLjnliy"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Officers, Employees and Stockholders</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">No director, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7DH0ogkifvvn2zl1ED40CCCQHy9NC"></a>officer, employee, incorporator or stockholder <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7EGy0nkL8kovwmy3z1oxM"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9EC1vhq443uxDLHz58u"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9IJOFwynmBI2kx66zOd4230KML"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAD8v0nDStrsp9BA"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAFH2059uiNVwuvsCEDKH919OPSD1"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDGGpi7DAvj"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMN57P7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN57P7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN57P7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN57P7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN57P7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN57P7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN57P7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH18O7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor, as
                    such, will have any liability for <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBGHoi7dNphgw0lvx3IF3"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDEBmi7V7jnuvlx2y0"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDEFQC70dht6Dywy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDEEpi7ZM922JjTB3235LMI6"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBDF9ji7xruhm3A9EC0"></a>any obligations <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCBC8woOS5wwC2oKP68xwLSCy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCBBCPFwynmBI2oo50yzwG8u57DG2"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMN58Q7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN58Q7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN58Q7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN58Q7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN58Q7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN58Q7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN58Q7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or the <a name="z_9kMH19P7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantors under <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDDNJYS5wwC2s4fVxp0GON8BF1"></a>the <a name="z_9kML34M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML34M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, this <a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH7GQ7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC667QKmep5DCxhwG6s"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9BE6vhOT6xxuqu16s"></a>Indenture, the <a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMM4G6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees or for any claim based on, in respect of, or by reason of, such obligations or their creation.&#160; Each <a name="z_9kMI12J7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder of <a name="z_9kML35N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML35N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes by accepting a <a name="z_9kML36O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML36O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note
                    waives and releases all such liability.&#160; The waiver and release are part of the consideration for issuance of the <a name="z_9kML37P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML37P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.&#160; The waiver may not be effective to
                    waive liabilities under the <a name="z_9kMML5YVt6EC67Dtgfgvsn"></a>federal securities laws.</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318612"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;12.06</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Governing Law; Submission to Jurisdiction</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">THE INTERNAL LAW OF THE STATE OF NEW YORK
                      <a name="z_9kR3WTr1675BKm3txtxD41B"></a>WILL GOVERN AND BE USED TO CONSTRUE THIS <a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH88H7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCDCa2900xtx49v"></a>INDENTURE, THE <a name="z_9kML38Q7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML38Q7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>NOTES AND THE <a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMM5H6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>NOTE GUARANTEES WITHOUT GIVING EFFECT TO
                      APPLICABLE PRINCIPLES OF CONFLICTS OF LAW <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GCBC70vhq44942306BD1oxMS9uBRGJK"></a>TO THE EXTENT THAT THE APPLICATION OF THE LAWS OF ANOTHER JURISDICTION WOULD BE REQUIRED THEREBY.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMN60H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN60H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN60H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN60H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN60H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN60H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN60H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company and each <a name="z_9kMH1AQ7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor hereby irrevocably submits to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBIMAxjm3C13zqq295BC5s1Q1cI"></a>the jurisdiction of any <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB5BBUGwre41dhwx2"></a>New York State court sitting in the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt5ED6FJNG3481pyxWMu2q3N50"></a>Borough of Manhattan in <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCLL7xjFE2JFx"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt5ED6EMSBzGCuUO4zmC9"></a>City of New York or any <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt6EC67Dtgfgvsn"></a>federal court sitting in the <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt5ED6FJNG3481pyxWMu2q3N50"></a>Borough of Manhattan in <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt9IDCLL7xjFE2JFx"></a>the <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt5ED6EMSBzGCuUO4zmC9"></a>City of New York in respect of any suit, action or proceeding arising out of or relating to this <a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH89I7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, the <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBGERStrsp91n"></a>Guarantees and the <a name="z_9kML40H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML40H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, and irrevocably accepts for
                      itself and in respect of its property, generally and unconditionally, jurisdiction of the aforesaid courts.</font></div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318613"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;12.07</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">No Adverse Interpretation of Other Agreements</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">This <a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8AJ7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture may not be used to interpret any other indenture, loan
                    or debt agreement <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCHEz2x0Bliyx5rsq09x8"></a>of the <a name="z_9kMN61I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN61I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN61I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN61I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN61I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN61I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN61I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or its <a name="z_9kML5I6ZWu4BCBIIfeut1nomwL"></a>Subsidiaries or of any other <a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5BCCLIaMvA84"></a><a name="z_9kMI22I7aXv5CDCLJbMvA84"></a>Person.&#160; Any such indenture, loan or debt agreement may not be used to interpret this <a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8BK7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">All agreements of the <a name="z_9kMN62J7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN62J7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN62J7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN62J7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN62J7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN62J7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN62J7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company in <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDGHYMogr7FEzjtx49v"></a>this <a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8CL7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and the <a name="z_9kML41I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML41I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes will
                    bind its successors.&#160; All agreements of the <a name="z_9kMJ9GQ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9GQ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9GQ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJ9GQ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee in this <a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8DM7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture will bind its successors.&#160; All agreements of each <a name="z_9kMH22H7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor in this <a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8EN7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture will bind its successors, except as otherwise provided in Section&#160;10.05 hereof.</div>

                    remaining provisions will not in any way be affected or impaired thereby.</div>

                      of this <a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8GP7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture<a name="z_9kMIH5YVt7FC6BG"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt7FC6BK"></a>.&#160; Each signed copy will be an original, but all of them together represent
                      the same agreemen<a name="z_9kMJI5YVt7FC6BK"></a>t<a name="z_9kMJI5YVt7FC6BG"></a>.&#160; Delivery of an executed counterpart of a signature page to this <a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMH8HQ7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture by email
                      or other electronic means shall be effective as delivery of a manually executed counterpart of this <a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI0zH7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</font></div>

                      &#8220;signature,&#8221; &#8220;delivery&#8221; and words of like import in or relating to this <a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI00I7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and/or any document, notice, instrument or
                      certificate to be signed and/or delivered in connection with this <a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI01J7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and the transactions contemplated hereby shall be deemed to include <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A8GGOGnfvB74zpabw2x4PO9B"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3DFCLQWGnfvB74zpabw2x4PO9B"></a>Electronic Signatures (as defined below), electronic deliveries or the keeping of records in electronic form, each of which shall
                      be of the same legal effect, validity or enforceability as a manually executed signature, physical delivery thereof or the use of a paper-based recordkeeping system, as the case may be.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(c)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1786EEMEldt952xnYZu0v2NM79"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1BDAJOUEldt952xnYZu0v2NM79"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Electronic Signatures</font>&#8221; means any electronic
                      symbol or <a name="z_9kR3WTr5DA4ACx11nevA"></a>process attached to, or associated with, any contract or other record and adopted by a <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt467CKNfKt862"></a>person with the intent to sign, authenticate or accept such
                      contract or record.</font></div>

                    <a name="z_9kMI13K7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>HOLDERS BY ACCEPTANCE OF THE <a name="z_9kML43K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML43K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>NOTES AND THE <a name="z_9kMJA8H7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJA8H7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJA8H7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJA8H7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>TRUSTEE HEREBY IRREVOCABLY WAIVES, TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9AFQG2ztleequVM4"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9B9JG2ztleequVM4"></a>APPLICABLE LAW, ANY AND ALL RIGHT TO TRIAL BY JURY IN ANY <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED7CGYqmjp"></a>LEGAL PROCEEDING ARISING OUT <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9BJguv8C0vs1A54BKLF5H"></a>OF OR RELATING
                    TO THIS <a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI04M7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>INDENTURE, THE <a name="z_9kML44L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML44L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>NOTES OR THE TRANSACTION CONTEMPLATED HEREBY.</div>

                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">In no event shall the <a name="z_9kMJA9I7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJA9I7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJA9I7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJA9I7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee be responsible or liable for any failure or delay in the performance of its obligations hereunder arising out of or caused by, directly or
                    indirectly, forces beyond its control, including, without limitation, strikes, work stoppages, accidents, acts of war or terrorism, civil or military disturbances, nuclear or natural catastrophes or acts of <a name="z_9kR3WTr695489NJn"></a>God,




                    epidemics or pandemics, and interruptions, loss or malfunctions of utilities, communications or computer (software and hardware) services; it being understood that the <a name="z_9kMJAAJ7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJAAJ7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJAAJ7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJAAJ7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall use reasonable efforts which are consistent with accepted practices in the banking industry to
                    resume performance as soon as practicable under the circumstances.</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_Toc227318620"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;12.14</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act (FATCA)</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;">In order to comply with applicable tax laws, rules and regulations (inclusive of directives, guidelines and interpretations promulgated by
                    competent authorities) in effect from time to time (&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr178797HE0xrjccosTK2"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCHDJG2ztleequVM4"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Applicable
                      Law</font>&#8221;) to which a foreign financial institution, issuer, <a name="z_9kMON5YVt467CLLgb9BByk"></a>trustee, paying agent, holder or other institution is or has agreed to be subject related to this <a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI05N7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, the <a name="z_9kMN64L7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN64L7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN64L7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN64L7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN64L7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN64L7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN64L7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company agrees (i) to provide to the <a name="z_9kMJABK7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJABK7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJABK7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJABK7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee, upon the <a name="z_9kMJACL7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJACL7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJACL7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJACL7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee&#8217;s request, information regarding the transaction that the <a name="z_9kMN65M7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN65M7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN65M7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN65M7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN65M7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN65M7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN65M7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company has in its possession to assist the <a name="z_9kMJADM7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJADM7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJADM7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJADM7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee in determining whether it has tax related obligations under <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9AFQG2ztleequVM4"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9B9JG2ztleequVM4"></a>Applicable Law and (ii) that the <a name="z_9kMJAEN7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJAEN7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJAEN7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMJAEN7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee shall be entitled to make any withholding or deduction from
                    payments under this <a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI06O7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture to the extent necessary to comply with <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9AFQG2ztleequVM4"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9B9JG2ztleequVM4"></a>Applicable
                    Law.&#160; The terms of this section shall <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBIH4xjwxw5xzsz84AB4"></a>survive the termination of this <a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI07P7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture.</div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; margin-left: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A8GNfuhf"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB8GOguhf"></a><a name="z_Toc227318621"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">Section&#160;12.15</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;




                    <font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">OFAC </font><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3AB9DJjJlov2y49"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A9ECbJlov2y49"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Sanctions</font>.</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(a)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMN66N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN66N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN66N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN66N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN66N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN66N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN66N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company covenants and represents that neither it nor any of its affiliates, subsidiaries, directors or officers are the target or subject of any sanctions enforced by the <a name="z_9kR3WTr46448HjByL7yv51tvB"></a>U.S.&#160;Government (including, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr46448FbIgkifsuMQ90sv1WWL8APjaIOT"></a>Office of Foreign Assets Control of the <a name="z_9kR3WTr46448GiBv8rorB7tvBD069viq8s7SSX"></a>U.S.&#160;Department




                      of the Treasury (&#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1786ELdsfd"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCJFXuhf"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">OFAC</font>&#8221;)), the <a name="z_9kR3WTr46449BcWryvgQIv406BrYp6MBEVpaPP8"></a>United Nations Security Council, the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt68668GUP943ugqlg139"></a>European Union, <a name="z_9kR3WTr46448CRs5btdsDDI"></a>HM Treasury, or other relevant
                      sanctions authority (collectively &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787CAZHjmt0w27"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCKIdJlov2y49"></a><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-style: italic;">Sanctions</font>&#8221;).</font></div>
                  <div><br>
                  </div>
                  <div style="text-align: left; text-indent: 36pt;"><font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">(b)</font>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman';">The <a name="z_9kMN67O7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN67O7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN67O7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN67O7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN67O7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN67O7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN67O7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company covenants and represents that neither it nor any of its affiliates, subsidiaries, directors or officers will use any payments made pursuant to this <a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI08Q7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, (i)&#160;to fund or facilitate any activities of or business with any <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEACE2qt862B6ztzJ8u7C6368DTE2"></a>person who, at
                      the time of such funding or facilitation, is the subject or target of <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3AB9DJjJlov2y49"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9ECbJlov2y49"></a>Sanctions, (ii)&#160;to fund or facilitate any activities of or business with any
                      country or territory that is the target or subject of <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3AB9DJjJlov2y49"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9ECbJlov2y49"></a>Sanctions, or (iii)&#160;in any other manner that will result in a violation of <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3AB9DJjJlov2y49"></a><a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9ECbJlov2y49"></a>Sanctions by any person.</font></div>
                  <div><br>

                      following pages</font>]</div>

                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;"><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDELG59ugkmxyq0"></a>Capitalized terms used herein have the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8BG0ncmvwv1wxG7w21s8K"></a>meanings assigned to them in the <a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI14L7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture referred to below unless otherwise indicated.</div>
                                  <div>&#160;</div>
                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">(1)&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-style: italic; font-variant: small-caps;">Interest</font>.&#160; <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3456DIPHqxBeQyz0zVXy"></a>Coeur Mining, Inc., a <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED6FHN8nkwxty"></a>Delaware corporation (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1789A8LFwynmB"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3BDCHKSHy0poD"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Company</font>&#8221;), promises to pay or cause
                                    to be paid interest on <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9EJ3qwzp1hYB2"></a>the principal amount of this <a name="z_9kML48P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML48P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note at <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3566EGGOQO"></a>6.875%



                                    <a name="z_9kR3WTr14569Bzorolz77"></a>per annum from <a name="z_9kR3WTr7D89CAor1x"></a>________________, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7D89CB422yr"></a>___ until maturity.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMN69Q7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN69Q7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN69Q7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN69Q7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN69Q7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN69Q7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN69Q7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will pay interest <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3677CI7totio2Ayq2G"></a>semi-annually in arrears on <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3676GMOG4ytD"></a>April 1 and <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3677CLgHt6pgxL"></a>October 1 of <a name="z_9kR3WTr14567ApZYg31es"></a>each year, or if any such day is not a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3676GORMAzvsyDZC4"></a><a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4BCBEDNNB0wtzEaD5"></a>Business



                                    Day, on the next succeeding <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3676GORMAzvsyDZC4"></a><a name="z_9kMH4L6ZWu4BCBEDNNB0wtzEaD5"></a>Business Day (each, an &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1787HHRK2utuwCkM2FwyEfH49"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Interest Payment Date</font>&#8221;).&#160; <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE89DVM4wvwyEB6"></a>Interest on the <a name="z_9kML49Q7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML49Q7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes will accrue from the most recent
                                    date to which interest has been paid or, if no interest has been paid, from the date of issuance; <font style="font-style: italic;">provided</font> that, if this <a name="z_9kML51H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML51H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note is authenticated between a record date referred to on the face hereof and the next succeeding <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A9JJTM4wvwyEmO4Hy0GhJ6B"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7HD67Ewq2utuwCAs2FwyE5n49"></a>Interest Payment Date, interest shall accrue from such next succeeding <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9JJTM4wvwyEmO4Hy0GhJ6B"></a>Interest Payment Date; <font style="font-style: italic;">provided further</font> that <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBC92xjin0BEfUC4346M"></a>the <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt8D967Eukx8B"></a>first <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9JJTM4wvwyEmO4Hy0GhJ6B"></a>Interest Payment Date shall be
                                    _<a name="z_9kR3WTr7D89CCma"></a>____________.&#160; The <a name="z_9kMN71H7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN71H7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN71H7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN71H7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN71H7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN71H7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN71H7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company will pay interest (including post-petition interest in any proceeding under any <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3AB9IHL2lw1CBBz5pM4"></a>Bankruptcy Law) on overdue principal at a rate that is <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt35679GH"></a>1% higher than the then applicable interest rate on the <a name="z_9kML52I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML52I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes to the extent lawful; it will pay interest (including post-petition interest in any proceeding under any <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3AB9IHL2lw1CBBz5pM4"></a>Bankruptcy Law) on overdue installments of interest (without regard to any applicable grace period), at the same rate to the extent lawful.</div>
                                  <div>&#160;</div>
                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">Interest will be computed on the basis of a <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455EIEHFnbx"></a>360-day year comprised of <a name="z_9kMML5YVt8D967F9Cyo60"></a>twelve <a name="z_9kR3WTr1455EGCBmaw"></a>30-day



                                    months.</div>

                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">(5)&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<font style="font-style: italic; font-variant: small-caps;">Optional Redemption</font>.</div>
                                  <div>&#160;</div>
                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;">(a)&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;At any time prior to <a name="z_9kMON5YVt3676DLQG4ytDIIJS"></a>April 1, 2028, the <a name="z_9kMN7AQ7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN7AQ7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN7AQ7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN7AQ7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN7AQ7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN7AQ7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN7AQ7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company may on any <a name="z_9kMK7L6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more occasions redeem up to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3567AGII"></a>35% <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDFC0qwzlt72st1utuqx98yv9E"></a>of



                                    the original aggregate principal amount of <a name="z_9kML66L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML66L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IECEC54ogvB2oQUwozFNM7"></a>Notes issued under the <a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI25L7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture (calculated after giving effect to any issuance of <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3ABABHS4ek12y4rqecF66"></a>Additional Notes), <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC58BmYuD55zx775C7ro"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBHDjo8xjuvijt5D739"></a>upon not less than 30 nor more than <a name="z_9kMH3K6ZWu4787DNPHpdzI"></a>60 days&#8217; notice, at a redemption price equal to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3567AAABHQSQ"></a>106.875% of the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt9IDCLG2xjQV8zz"></a>principal amount of the <a name="z_9kML67M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML67M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes redeemed, plus

                                    or purchased.</div>

                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">In connection with any redemption of the <a name="z_9kML9EQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kML9EQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes (including with the net cash proceeds of an <a name="z_9kMPO5YVt3AB9JHNL811IoQoo1632"></a>Equity Offering), any such redemption may, at the <a name="z_9kMN99N7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN99N7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN99N7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN99N7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN99N7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN99N7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN99N7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s discretion, be subject to <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more conditions precedent, including, but not limited to, completion of a sale of common stock or other corporate transaction (including any related <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCAKIOM922JpRpp2743"></a>Equity Offering).&#160; In addition, if such redemption or notice is subject to satisfaction of <a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu9EA78C1zq"></a>one or more conditions precedent, such notice
                                    shall state that, in the <a name="z_9kMN9AO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN9AO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN9AO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN9AO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN9AO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN9AO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMN9AO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company&#8217;s discretion, the redemption date may be delayed until such time as any or all such
                                    conditions shall be satisfied, or such redemption may not occur and such notice may be rescinded in the event that any or all such conditions shall not have been satisfied by the redemption date, or by the redemption
                                    date so delayed.</div>

                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">(14)&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-style: italic; font-variant: small-caps;">No Recourse Against Others</font>.&#160; No director, officer, employee, incorporator or stockholder of the <a name="z_9kMNCAL7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCAL7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCAL7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCAL7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCAL7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCAL7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCAL7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any <a name="z_9kMH33H7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantor, as such, will have any liability for any obligations of the <a name="z_9kMNCBM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCBM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCBM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCBM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCBM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCBM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNCBM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or the <a name="z_9kMH34I7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantors under <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBEB2xjQV8zzF5rTXzr2IQPADH3"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM42K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM42K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, the <a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBJEOPqopm6ykzFCuuJ"></a>the <a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMN6H6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees or for any claim based on, in respect of, or by reason of, such
                                    obligations or their creation.&#160; <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBJGRKvlfuD4x90WbE55"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC5AJWKvlfus0"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6EM3ob"></a>Each <a name="z_9kMI56J7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holder <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC6DGXQ3uu8vu8y01xD5qoASPAydcH8"></a>of <a name="z_9kMM43L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM43L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes by accepting a <a name="z_9kMM44M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM44M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note waives and releases all such liability.&#160; The waiver and release are part of the consideration for issuance of the <a name="z_9kMM45N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM45N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.&#160; The waiver may not be effective to waive liabilities under the <a name="z_9kMON5YVt6EC67Dtgfgvsn"></a>federal securities laws.</div>

                                    and the <a name="z_9kMJ1G6ZWu4BCBHGbYy3wv0XZrjoz02IrXz088"></a>Private Placement Legend are not required in order to maintain compliance with the <a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMM6I6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act and (iv) <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBJI4xjXb5xzFF5r36r"></a>the <a name="z_9kMI8O6ZWu4BCBGKlZ3vxDD3p14pPLuz89GHKHk"></a>Unrestricted Definitive Note is being acquired <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDDEExsnp022wmsvn8DBBt0P"></a>in compliance with any applicable blue sky securities laws of any
                                    state of the <a name="z_9kMH7O6ZWu6FE7EGfZu1yjYjyz44"></a>United States.</div>

                                    Definitive Notes or <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDCMNQ6pqjomnmqZWE6568OPFBvhF"></a>Beneficial Interests in <a name="z_9kMJ9O6ZWu4BCBHLiNvBB1nz2nQT8zmxljMD"></a>Restricted Global <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE8EHZS5wwyv8mU2II8u69uUQz4DE"></a>Notes for <a name="z_9kMKAO6ZWu4BCBILhNvBB1nz2nNJsx67EFIFinQ"></a>Restricted Definitive Notes or <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt9IDCMNQ6pqjomnmqZWE6568OPFBvhF"></a>Beneficial
                                    Interests in <a name="z_9kMJAP6ZWu4BCBHLiNvBB1nz2nQT8zmxljMD"></a>Restricted Global Notes.</div>

                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;">(a)&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<a name="z_9kMI9P6ZWu9JFCGE"></a>[_] <font style="font-weight: bold;">Check if </font><a name="z_9kMJ2H6ZWu4ABBHJTTyjipwo"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt9IDDKMVSxihovnq533D9xq34x20104"></a><font style="font-weight: bold;">Exchange is from beneficial interest in a </font><a name="z_9kMK2G6ZWu4BCBHLiNvBB1nz2nQT8zmxljMD"></a><font style="font-weight: bold;">Restricted Global Note to </font><a name="z_9kMKBP6ZWu4BCBILhNvBB1nz2nNJsx67EFIFinQ"></a><font style="font-weight: bold;">Restricted Definitive Note.</font>&#160; In connection with <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDHE5xjHV0lkryqz17AwerN6BQBy"></a>the <a name="z_9kMJ3I6ZWu4ABBHJTTyjipwo"></a>Exchange of the <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4ABBFJfc8rw"></a>Owner&#8217;s beneficial interest in a <a name="z_9kMK3H6ZWu4BCBHLiNvBB1nz2nQT8zmxljMD"></a>Restricted Global Note for a <a name="z_9kML3G6ZWu4BCBILhNvBB1nz2nNJsx67EFIFinQ"></a>Restricted Definitive Note with an equal principal amount, the <a name="z_9kMH6N6ZWu4ABBFJfc8rw"></a>Owner hereby certifies that <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IEBHI6xjUPxDD3p14pPLuz89GHKHk"></a>the <a name="z_9kML4H6ZWu4BCBILhNvBB1nz2nNJsx67EFIFinQ"></a>Restricted Definitive Note is being

                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;">(b)&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;<a name="z_9kMJ6L6ZWu9JFCGE"></a>[_] a <a name="z_9kML7K6ZWu4BCBIKS9inwx4585YdG7"></a>Definitive Note,</div>
                                  <div>&#160;</div>
                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt; margin-left: 36pt;">we confirm that:</div>
                                  <div>&#160;</div>
                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">1.&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; We understand that any subsequent transfer <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9DL6qwzlSXA11CCzwL"></a>of <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9GH00ocpqjomnmqz2E6568O"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAB8WQ3uurnrfqF"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM69P7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM69P7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or any interest therein is subject to certain restrictions and conditions set forth in the
                                    <a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8BL7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and the undersigned agrees to be bound by, and not to resell, pledge or otherwise transfer the <a name="z_9kMM6AQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM6AQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or any interest therein except in compliance with, such restrictions and conditions and the <a name="z_9kMM8K6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMM8K6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMM8K6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMM8K6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1788GGcLct9y12ozWB1"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt3BDCKJeNevB034q1YD3"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Securities Act</font>&#8221;).</div>
                                  <div>&#160; <br>
                                  </div>
                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">2.&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; We understand that the offer and sale of the <a name="z_9kMM72H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM72H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes have not been registered under the <a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMM9L6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act, and that <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCDAYS5wwtpthsH"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM73I7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM73I7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and any interest therein may not be offered or sold except as permitted in the following
                                    sentence.&#160; We agree, on our own behalf and on behalf of any accounts for which we are acting as hereinafter stated, that if we should sell the <a name="z_9kMM74J7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM74J7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes



                                    or any interest therein, we will do so only (A) to <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDFIJsk9FCwv3pqoyN"></a>the <a name="z_9kMNDCM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDCM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDCM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDCM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDCM7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDCM7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDCM7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company or any subsidiary thereof, (B) in accordance with
                                    <a name="z_9kMH5M6ZWu4BCBFDcd4p6KOV"></a>Rule 144A under the <a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMAM6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act to a &#8220;qualified institutional buyer&#8221; (as defined therein), (C) to an institutional &#8220;accredited investor&#8221; (as defined below) that, prior to such transfer,
                                    furnishes (or has furnished on its behalf by a <a name="z_9kMK8M6ZWu6FE9GHgE"></a>U.S. broker-dealer) to you and to the <a name="z_9kMNDDN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDDN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDDN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDDN7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDDN7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDDN7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDDN7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company a signed
                                    letter substantially in the form of this letter and an <a name="z_9kMI1H6ZWu4BCBFIeVwvwy45yNRGGF71"></a>Opinion of Counsel in form reasonably acceptable to the <a name="z_9kMNDEO7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDEO7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDEO7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDEO7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDEO7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDEO7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNDEO7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company to the effect that such transfer is in compliance with the <a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMBN6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act, (D) outside the <a name="z_9kMI0G6ZWu6FE7EGfZu1yjYjyz44"></a>United States in accordance with <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4BCBCHjd4pEOK"></a>Rule 904 of <a name="z_9kMH1I6ZWu4BCBDDeNj06nw517m"></a>Regulation S under the <a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMCO6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act, (E) pursuant to the provisions of <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu4BCBC9bd4p6KO"></a>Rule 144 under the <a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBJHdOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4BCBJIeOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBJJfOfwC145r2ZE4"></a><a name="z_9kMMDP6ZWu4ABBJKgOfwC145r2ZE4"></a>Securities Act or (F) pursuant to an

                                    as stated herein.</div>

                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">3.&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; We understand that, on any proposed resale of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBIJ22qerslqopos14G878AQ"></a>the <a name="z_9kMM75K7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM75K7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes

                                    unconditionally guaranteed, to the extent set forth in the <a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8DN7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and subject to the provisions in <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE88BUMogr7FEzmj05qn3I6TYMGBW"></a>the <a name="z_9kR3WTr7HD5ELvqmep5DCx"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7HD5EOYuqit9HG1"></a>Indenture dated as of <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3678FJOG4ytEJKJKR"></a>April 22, <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt3676EOKCDK"></a>2026 (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1788HJUKmep5DCx"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3BDCIIVMogr7FEz"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Indenture</font>&#8221;) among <a name="z_9kMH2J6ZWu4567EJQIryCfRz010WYz"></a>Coeur Mining, Inc., a <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt5ED6FHN8nkwxty"></a>Delaware corporation (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1789A6JFwynmB"></a><a name="z_9kMLK5YVt3BDCHKSHy0poD"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Company</font>&#8221;), the <a name="z_9kMH3AO7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantors party thereto and <a name="z_9kMH0H6ZWu4567ELjSkF6p02yYS83qGDjY4CGJ"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7HD8GNjzlgdq13zzz9UNHEA55DHKX93x"></a>The Bank of New York Mellon, as trustee (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr1788IIdZ799wi"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3BDCKLhb9BByk"></a><font style="font-style: italic;">Trustee</font>&#8221;),



                                    (a) the due and punctual payment of <a name="z_9kMLK5YVt9IDCMJ4xjs60xso2vs"></a>the <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAGF01vsnjxqn3A0w1AF4yr0PRLGDP"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAKGx1vsnjxqn3A0w1AF4y"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC8B9WVvsnjxqn3A0w1AF4y"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAGEz1rns16vpirGI8vw0"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC67Gyq2utuwC94A5r"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9FDji793yv7zyz1H"></a>principal of, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAGDy1rns16vpirGIC74G878AQ"></a>premium on, <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBC8ji79z50m"></a>if any, <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt9IDDEFys4wvwyEB6C7t"></a>and interest on, the <a name="z_9kMM79O7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM79O7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, whether at maturity, by acceleration, redemption or otherwise, the due and punctual <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IE9AH5qlu6yxy0GD89I966AC8MGD8"></a>payment of interest on overdue
                                    principal of, premium on, if any, <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt9IDDEFys4wvwyEB6C7t"></a>and interest on, the <a name="z_9kMM7AP7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM7AP7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes, if any, if lawful, and the due
                                    and punctual performance of all other obligations of the <a name="z_9kMNE9I7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNE9I7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNE9I7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNE9I7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNE9I7aXv5BCDEBOJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNE9I7aXv5BCDECPJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNE9I7aXv5BCDEDQJ02rqF"></a>Company to the <a name="z_9kMI5AN7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders or <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDCJI6xjWeCEE1nks425"></a>the <a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMK44K7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee



                                    all in accordance with the terms of the <a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8EO7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and (b) in case of any extension of time of payment or renewal of any <a name="z_9kMM7BQ7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM7BQ7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes or any of such other obligations, that the same will be promptly paid in full when due or performed in accordance with the terms of the
                                    extension or renewal, whether at <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt467CLIccrsxiRJxIH69Q"></a>stated maturity, by acceleration or otherwise.&#160; The obligations of the <a name="z_9kMH3BP7aXv5CDCKPZTustqACBG"></a>Guarantors <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9IDBGKA45zlMR2sm1G"></a>to the <a name="z_9kMI5BO7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a>Holders of <a name="z_9kMM83H7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM83H7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes and to the <a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5CDCMJedBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5BCCMLgdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5BCCMMhdBDD0m"></a><a name="z_9kMK45L7aXv5BCCMNidBDD0m"></a>Trustee pursuant to the <a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMN8J6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee and the <a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8FP7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture



                                    are expressly set forth in Article 10 of the <a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI8GQ7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture and reference is hereby made to the <a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCLQbOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5BCCLRcOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI98H7aXv5CDCMKUOqit9HG1"></a>Indenture for the precise terms of the <a name="z_9kMN9K6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a><a name="z_9kMN9K6ZWu4ABBJNeT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantee.</div>

                                    including but not limited to Article 10 thereof.</div>
                                  <div>&#160;</div>
                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">3.&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-variant: small-caps;">No Recourse Against Others</font>.&#160; No director, officer, employee, incorporator <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBBDC00pnz460vohy3o7DBBCDz"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCEE201qimkhxCAy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7EEw0nawunqizFCD7t"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7EJ10np8vxC8w"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7EK20oYlw1CBBz5I069vRWDF43SG6"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7EL30np8vxCDAB5r"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7FGx0pnz460vohy73945JLCKIBAHJ"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7FIz0pnz4C66wrBHD1"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7FK10pn665xr7BC6s"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7FM30qiytjit0oxD7t4ja2ut9Dy8A"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7GL10vs4671n"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC886v023tijwAyl0HEyvvATDz"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC887w023tijwAyl0HEyv84"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC899x074ogvADwrvr21BECCDE0"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCEC00owI2pll34q"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7FHy0pnyx68xngy739x9SCyUZGI76"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAFAv0vs4671nJO57wvKMG30FMG2Dq"></a>or stockholder of <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9FFz059uiNVwuvsCED"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9HMSFwynmBzptvA"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9IGLFwynmBC38vsH"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC567JFwynmBzpE"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBADE10nDStrsp9BA"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAEAw0nkz60mxaYzxyvFHG"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9JIQPqopm6872y3wotr381MRLFDNT"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBADD00nDStrsp9BAFJ4s"></a>the <a name="z_9kMNEDM7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNEDM7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNEDM7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNEDM7aXv5BCDEANJ02rqF"></a><a will have any liability <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9JGno19tk5zgqFlVxpo48t35BQNB"></a>for any <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB9HLRFwynmBzpt05r"></a>obligations <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC79F2oOS5wwC2oKP68xwLSCy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC56COFwynmBI2owC6s3ge5341LNMR"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC7GIy0TRsqro8A9E"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC89Bz0761061nJO57wvKQ6xC9vBIEK"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GC9CC3vhpnltpiw517CE28BxTYFH65U"></a>the <a name="z_9kMNEEN7aXv5BCCMQUJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNEEN7aXv5CDCMRVJ02rqF"></a><a name="z_9kMNEEN7aXv5BCCMSWJ02rqF"></a><a this <a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCCLNYOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCCLPaOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCCLMXOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMI9HQ7aXv5BCCLOZOqit9HG1"></a><a name="z_9kMNBM6ZWu4BCBJMdT6xLWxvwtD5r"></a>Note Guarantees or for any claim based on, in respect of, or by reason
                                    of, such obligations or their creation.&#160; Each <a name="z_9kMI5DQ7aXv5CDCLLVOzpjy"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBAIK2ob"></a>Holder of <a name="z_9kMM87L7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM87L7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes by
                                    accepting a <a name="z_9kMM88M7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM88M7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Note waives and releases all such liability.&#160; The waiver and release are part of the consideration for issuance of the <a name="z_9kMM89N7aXv5BCCMOdU7yy"></a><a name="z_9kMM89N7aXv5BCCMPeU7yy"></a>Notes.&#160; The waiver may not be effective to waive liabilities under the <a name="z_9kMHzG6ZWu7FD78Euhghwto"></a>federal securities laws.</div>
                                  <div>&#160;</div>
                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">4.&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; NEW YORK LAW TO <a name="z_9kR3WTr1675ACPt90x7"></a>GOVERN.&#160; THE INTERNAL LAW OF THE STATE OF NEW YORK SHALL <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3897CERvB2z9"></a>GOVERN AND BE USED TO
                                    CONSTRUE THIS <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A9GKhd730qstvBzsbY0s3JRQB"></a>SUPPLEMENTAL INDENTURE WITHOUT GIVING EFFECT TO APPLICABLE PRINCIPLES OF CONFLICTS OF LAW <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GBCHH7vhq44942306BD1oxMS9uBRGJK"></a>TO
                                    THE EXTENT THAT THE APPLICATION OF THE LAWS OF ANOTHER JURISDICTION WOULD BE REQUIRED THEREBY.</div>
                                  <div>&#160;</div>
                                  <div style="text-indent: 36pt;">5.&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <font style="font-variant: small-caps;">Counterparts</font>.&#160; The parties may sign any number of copies of this <a name="z_9kMKJ5YVt39A9GKhd730qstvBzsbY0s3JRQB"></a>Supplemental



                                    Indenture.&#160; Each signed copy shall be an original, but all of them together represent the same agreement.</div>

        certain <a name="z_9kR3WTr26656CREplmimqNS3tn2H"></a>Eligible Holders (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr178569OQvgfmtlUQoo1"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr24459EQQvgfmtlUQoo1"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1785FKQQvgfmtlUQoo1"></a>Exchange Offer&#8221;) for any and all of the US<a name="z_9kR3WTr13448GIC9ABCDEF"></a>$400,000,000 <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9ID7CHojy7779BHGH0vzv65Pfhf1iA"></a>aggregate principal amount outstanding <a name="z_9kR3WTr13449FIMOM"></a>of the 6.875% <a name="z_9kR3WTr26656DgLnsu4eW900"></a>Senior
        Notes due <a name="z_9kR3WTr14549EDACF"></a>2032 (CUSIP: 644535 AJ5 / C62944 AE0; ISIN: US644535AJ57 / USC62944AE04) (the &#8220;<a name="z_9kR3WTr2AA458NQ1x90vuVYB22"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr178568NQ1x90vuVYB22"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1785AALQ1x90vuVYB22"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1785DHPQ1x90vuVYB22"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr1785FIOQ1x90vuVYB22"></a>Existing Notes&#8221;) issued by <a name="z_9kR3WTr1235DMdGwZMyoMRs"></a>New Gold Inc.         aggregate principal amount of <a name="z_9kR3WTr2AA5DKSQ1x90vuVYB22"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A7HKQS3zB2xwXaD44"></a><a name="z_9kMHG5YVt9ID7HPeS5ww0jgikoyG4v4x1N"></a>Existing Notes had been validly tendered and not validly withdrawn after 5:00
        p.m., New York City time, on April 3, 2026 (the &#8220;Early Participation Date&#8221;), but prior to the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A7HLRSAwzsv406WE16"></a>Expiration Date.&#160; Subject to the terms and conditions of the <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt39A7HMSSxihovnWSqq3"></a>Exchange

        Offer, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt48889ANHqxBA"></a>Coeur is accepting for purchase all US<a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3567GJHFBCDE"></a>$500,000 aggregate principal amount of <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt4CC7FMUS3zB2xwXaD44"></a><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A7HKQS3zB2xwXaD44"></a>Existing

        Notes validly tendered after the Early Participation Date and at or prior to the <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt39A7HLRSAwzsv406WE16"></a>Expiration Date, in addition to the US<a name="z_9kR3WTr1345EIEJMIECDEF"></a>$385,300,000 <a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB676voOIyiV8zz"></a>aggregate principal amount of <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt4CC7FMUS3zB2xwXaD44"></a><a name="z_9kMJI5YVt39A7HKQS3zB2xwXaD44"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB5FNcQ3uuyhegimwE2t2vzL"></a><a name="z_9kR3WTr7GB5FOdQ3uuCvmvosE"></a>Existing

      <div style="text-align: left; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt; font-weight: bold;">About Coeur</div>
      <div style="font-size: 10pt;"><br>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: left; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: 10pt;"><a name="z_9kMIH5YVt3456AJTHqxBeQyz0zVXy"></a>Coeur Mining, Inc. (<a name="z_9kMHG5YVt3456BLfCIz"></a>NYSE: CDE) is a <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt5ED6BDeD"></a>U.S.-based,
        well-diversified, growing precious metals producer with <a name="z_9kR3WTr6B748B1rvwp"></a>seven wholly-owned operations: the <a name="z_9kR3WTr26658AWGwT7x72"></a>New <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4BEJ4u4z"></a>Afton gold-copper mine in <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB49HPHvyzzzKM29Btqq"></a>British Columbia, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED6AHR3lmde"></a>Canada, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4DEYGes9oT41y"></a>Rainy River gold-silver mine in <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4CMeQ2qpyw"></a>Ontario, <a name="z_9kMIH5YVt5ED6AHR3lmde"></a>Canada, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr266589TAoRBo08rv"></a>Las Chispas silver-gold mine in <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4DHcVxy3q"></a>Sonora, <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB49IbFx2ip"></a>Mexico, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr26658BZEhukqvoz"></a>Palmarejo gold-silver mine in <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4BJQ8lmzth2w"></a>Chihuahua, <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED6BKdHz4kr"></a>Mexico, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4DGaUmgjvByx"></a>Rochester silver-gold mine in <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4CJaGvsbc"></a>Nevada, the <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4CGUDn2yut094"></a>Kensington gold mine in <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4BFKAhp0j"></a>Alaska and the <a name="z_9kR3WTr26658ChSdou"></a>Wharf gold mine in <a name="z_9kR3WTr3CB4DIdV4AyJ7l0Ax"></a>South Dakota.&#160; In addition, the <a name="z_9kMNM5YVt48878DQHy0poD"></a>Company wholly-owns the <a name="z_9kR3WTr26658DePp3xuA2z"></a>Silvertip polymetallic critical minerals exploration project in <a name="z_9kMHG5YVt5ED6BJRJx0111MO4BDvss"></a>British Columbia, <a name="z_9kMJI5YVt5ED6AHR3lmde"></a>Canada.</div>

var Show={};Show.LastAR=null,Show.showAR=function(a,r,w){if(Show.LastAR)Show.hideAR();var e=a;while(e&&e.nodeName!='TABLE')e=e.nextSibling;if(!e||e.nodeName!='TABLE'){var ref=((window)?w.document:document).getElementById(r);if(ref){e=ref.cloneNode(!0);
e.removeAttribute('id');a.parentNode.appendChild(e)}}
if(e)e.style.display='block';Show.LastAR=e};Show.hideAR=function(){Show.LastAR.style.display='none'};Show.toggleNext=function(a){var e=a;while(e.nodeName!='DIV')e=e.nextSibling;if(!e.style){}else if(!e.style.display){}else{var d,p_;if(e.style.display=='none'){d='block';p='-'}else{d='none';p='+'}
e.style.display=d;if(a.textContent){a.textContent=p+a.textContent.substring(1)}else{a.innerText=p+a.innerText.substring(1)}}}
